"It won't take long. I should be back within a month. You can resume accepting guests after I leave."

Xu Xuan left the Autumn Phantom Manor through the back door shortly after.

'Boundless Yin Yang Sect… Su Yang!'

Instead of using teleport formations, Xu Xuan used her personal flying treasure to traverse the starry abyss, moving faster than the speed of light.

Meanwhile, when Su Yang returned to the Boundless Yin Yang Sect, he first visited the mission hall to see if he'd received the credit for his missions yet. Upon arriving at the mission hall, Su Yang entered the building and scanned the workers with a calm gaze.

He quickly identified the Sect Elder who approved of his missions and made his way to the elder's desk.

After waiting for a few minutes, when it was his turn, he approached the desk with a calm smile. "I am here to report my mission successful." Su Yang placed three pieces of paper on the desk before the elder, who raised his eyebrows upon seeing that they were all high-priority missions.

"Hm? You're that disciple who received the Sect Master's approval to leave the sect despite being an Outer Court disciple…" The Sect Elder recognized Su Yang due to his unique circumstances.

"Did you really manage to finish three high-priority missions at once? Let me check…"

The Sect Elder retrieved a scroll and poured his Profound Qi into it. After a disciple fulfills or fails their client's request, the client must report back to the sect with the results so the disciple can receive their credits. A few moments later, the Sect Elder placed the scroll down with a look of disbelief on his face.

'He actually managed to complete all three high-priority missions back-to-back! And all three of these missions had a high failure rate!' The Sect Elder was bewildered when he saw the results.

He'd expected Su Yang to fail at least two of the three missions, after all.

'According to his information, he joined the sect very recently through special admission… I guess there was a reason he was recruited…'

"I have confirmed the completion of all three missions. Here is your award, and you will be given 150 Pleasure Points for each mission, which will total 450 Pleasure Points." The Sect Elder placed several medium-quality spirit stones on the desk and beckoned.

"I need your identity jade slip to transfer you the points."

Su Yang handed the jade slip to the Sect Elder and accepted the spirit stones, casually tossing them into his storage pouch.

The Sect Elder handed the jade slip back to him a moment later.

"I have distributed 450 Pleasure Points to you."

"Thank you."

Su Yang didn't say anything else. He turned around and walked out of the building, making his way back to his living quarters in the Outcast Peak.

"Welcome back, Manager!" Mei Xing welcomed him back with a beaming smile on her face.

"I'm back. How have you been during these three months I was away? I hope there wasn't any trouble."

"No trouble at all! I've been cultivating diligently for the last three months and managed to have a breakthrough!" she excitedly said.

"That's good. And congratulations on your breakthrough." Su Yang smiled.

chapters.title: Chapter 1074 Chun Hua
chapters.body:
Chapter 1074 Chun Hua

Chapter 1074 Chun Hua

"Welcome back, Manager." Mei Ying came out to greet him shortly after she heard Mei Xing's excited voice.

He nodded, "I'm back, but I won't stay for long. It will take more than three missions to qualify for the Inner Court Disciple's examination."

"How long will you be staying?" she asked.

"I'll stay for a few days before returning to the mission hall to look for more missions."

"Okay."

After chatting with Mei Xing for a little longer, Su Yang went to Mei Ying's room to embrace her for the first time in three months.

"Several disciples came to see you when you were away." Mei Ying revealed after their cultivation session.

"Did any of them not want to cultivate with me?" he asked.

"No, all of them were looking to cultivate with you."

"I see. Then there's no need to worry about it."

Su Yang returned to his room to rest, spending the next several days refining the Profound Qi within him.

'In order to become an Inner Court disciple, I will need to raise my cultivation to the Divine Origin Realm. However, that will take years if I do it normally through cultivation.'

Su Yang knew that he needed a lot of cultivation resources to increase his cultivation quickly, but the ones he required were rare treasures that were hard to purchase, even with money. This is why he visited the Phantom Autumn Manor. He had hoped to acquire something that would give him a boost, but since its Master, Xu Xuan, wasn't available, he will now have to figure out another way to significantly boost his cultivation base in a short time.

Su Yang knew that he needed a lot of cultivation resources to increase his cultivation quickly, but the ones he required were rare treasures that were hard to purchase, even with money. This is why he visited the Phantom Autumn Manor. He had hoped to acquire something that would give him a boost, but since its Master, Xu Xuan, wasn't available, he will now have to figure out another way to significantly boost his cultivation base in a short time.

He retrieved his black storage back and stared at it in silence.

'No, it's still too early for that treasure… My body won't be able to endure it.'

After putting away the black pouch, Su Yang left his living quarters to head to the mission hall for more missions.

However, before he could even leave the Outcast Peak, someone entered his path and stopped him at the exit.

Su Yang calmly looked at the individual before him. She was an exceptionally pretty young lady with a natural, innocent face. The aura she exuded reminded him of Lin Xinyi, a noble who did not look like she belonged in a place like the Boundless Yin Yang Sect. However, she was wearing an Inner Court disciple's outfit.

"How can I help you?" Su Yang asked her with a calm smile on his face.

"You're Xiao Yang, correct? The one with the massage thing going on."

"Indeed, I am that Xiao Yang," he confirmed. "Are you looking for a massage? Unfortunately, I am on a break to focus on sect missions."

"Is that so? Perhaps we can negotiate?"

"Oh? What are you thinking?" This was the first time someone tried to negotiate with him, so Su Yang was intrigued and decided to see what she had to offer.

"I don't know what you desire, so give me some hints. I may not seem like it, but I have quite the influence within the Boundless Yin Yang Sect. For example, if there's a special place that you wish to access but cannot due to your status, I may be able to sneak you inside."

Su Yang didn't immediately respond.

After a moment of silence, he asked, "Can you get me inside the Eternal Yin Yang Cave?"

The Inner Court disciple's eyes widened with surprise after hearing such an unexpected answer.

"You want to enter the Eternal Yin Yang Cave? Even if I have the power to do that, who in their right mind would do such a favor for a massage?"

Su Yang chuckled, "You're right. It'd be an unfair exchange."

Naturally, he never expected this Inner Court disciple to have such authority and only said such a thing to tease her. In the entire sect, only the Sect Master would have the authority to make such decisions.

"How about this?" The Inner Court disciple suddenly spoke, "I may not be able to get you into the Eternal Yin Yang Cave, but I can get you inside the Fiery Yang Cavern. Have you heard of it?" "The Fiery Yang Cavern?" Su Yang raised his eyebrows in a surprised fashion.

The Fiery Yang Cavern is where male disciples go to improve the quality of their Yang Qi, but it was not accessible to every disciple.

"I have heard of it, but it's only accessible by Core Disciples. You're just an Inner Court disciple, so how could you possibly have the authority to get me inside?" Su Yang asked.

The Inner Court disciple chuckled and said, "My name's Chun Hua. Of course, I don't have the authority to let you inside. However, I know someone who has the schedule, so I know when it'll be unoccupied. If you use it during that time, you won't have to worry about such things."

"You're asking me to sneak inside the Fiery Yang Cavern?" Su Yang couldn't believe his ears.

"Being expelled from the sect would be the least of my worries if I am caught doing something so bold."

Chun Hua chuckled, "Even if you somehow get caught, I can make sure that you'll only receive light punishment, and I am willing to swear on my soul. Of course, I understand if you're too scared to do it."

'This little girl is provoking me…? What's she trying to achieve?' Su Yang thought to himself.

Although Chun Hua appeared quite suspicious in his eyes, if she was willing to swear on her soul, he wouldn't mind taking this risk. After all, he would benefit greatly from the Fiery Yang Cavern. Not just his Yang Qi but also his cultivation.

'Even if I am caught, I doubt they'll be willing to kick me out of the sect as long as I continue supplying them with my Yang Qi.'

After a moment of silence, Su Yang smiled and said, "Alright, let's do it."

Chun Hua smiled back, "You're bold. I like that."

She continued, "You can go ahead and finish whatever you plan on doing. I'll wait for you."

"My plans can wait. I only planned on visiting the mission hall."

"Okay, then let me experience your massage first."

Su Yang nodded and turned around, walking right back to his living quarters.

chapters.title: Chapter 1075 Chun Hua(2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 1075 Chun Hua(2)

Chapter 1075 Chun Hua(2)

"Hm? You're back already? Did you forget something?" Mei Ying asked when Su Yang suddenly returned to the house.

"No, there's been a slight change in today's schedule. I'm going to be working with a client now." Su Yang gestured at Chun Hua.

"Hello. I'm Chun Hua." she waved at Mei Ying with a friendly smile.

"Hello." Mei Ying respectfully bowed to her.

"Come, I'll take you to my room." Su Yang said.

Once they entered his room, Chun Hua immediately removed her clothes and tossed them aside.

"There's no need to rush. I won't be going anywhere." Su Yang chuckled when he saw her actions.

"I just prefer being naked. If I could, I would walk around naked." Chun Hua shrugged as she lay on the bed.

"Oh? This bed is so comfortable," she said as she began humping it.

'What a peculiar girl.' Su Yang laughed inwardly at her eccentric actions.

He walked to the bed and sat beside her, silently inspecting her peerless body.

Although Chun Hua had a short stature, it wasn't small enough to be petite. Her skin was pale like snow, silky smooth, and without the slightest imperfection.

"Are you ready?" he asked her as he stretched his limbs.

"I came here ready," she chuckled.

Su Yang didn't let her wait any longer and immediately placed his hands on her back.

"Oh~! This is definitely something!" Chun Hua moaned in a delighted voice.

"No wonder why the others were going crazy over your massages, Disciple Xiao. I am convinced the rumors were not exaggerated." fr𝚎𝗲𝐰ebnov𝐞𝐥.𝐜o𝗺

'This girl…' Su Yang narrowed his eyes at Chun Hua's deceptive appearance. Beneath her seemingly fragile form lay a reservoir of extraordinary endurance that surpasses every disciple he's massaged up to this point.

She was clearly very talented and experienced. It would not surprise Su Yang at all if this disciple were actually a Core Disciple disguised as an Inner Disciple.

Due to their exalted status and prideful nature, it would be incredibly unlikely for a Core Disciple to request a massage from an Outer Disciple in their real appearance without losing face and being ridiculed by the other Core Disciples.

If Chun Hua was truly a Core Disciple, it made perfect sense for her to disguise herself. It would also give her some credibility regarding the Fiery Yang Cavern. However, this was just Su Yang's speculation at this moment in time. He would need to spend more time with her body if he wanted to be certain.

After spending half an hour on her back, Su Yang made Chun Hua flip around, revealing her small yet perky breasts and hairless lower cave.

Chun Hua stared at Su Yang's eyes with a passionate gaze and said, "You can make it even more exciting, right…?"

In response, Su Yang fondled her small breasts and used the space between his fingers to tease her small pink peaks.

"Ah~" Chun Hua released a bashful moan that would make even animals go mad with lust.

After playing with her beasts for a few minutes, Su Yang navigated one of his hands to the slippery slit between her legs.

He slipped a finger inside her cave, which went in easily and smoothly. As he massaged her outer cave with his finger, Chun Hua's little sister would constantly try to suck his finger deeper into her cave.

"Faster~ Do it faster~!" Chun Hua held onto his arm as her body began trembling.

A few seconds later, her lower cave gushed with holy water, soaking Su Yang's hand.

"Haaa…"

Chun Hua wore a satisfied expression on her face. However, she wasn't completely satisfied. She turned to look at him with a lustful gaze and said, "My little sister's been lonely for a long time. Can you introduce your big brother to her?"

Su Yang chuckled at her words and quickly loosened his robes, revealing his big brother to her.

"Wow…"

Chun Hua pushed herself up and moved her body toward the majestic dragon between Su Yang's legs.

Once it was in the grasp of her hands, she began stroking it gently.

She opened her mouth a few seconds later and nibbled the tip like a squirrel, slowly shoving it deeper inside. Su Yang's rod quickly reached her throat, but she didn't stop there and continued shoving it deeper.

Once Su Yang's entire dragon was nearly inside her mouth, Chun Hua began rocking her head back and forth, using her tongue expertly as she moved.

"Mmm…"

"Mmmmhmmm…"

"Ahhh~"

After several minutes of intense mouth action, Chun Hua removed his rod from her mouth and laid back on the bed with her legs spread wide open.

"This little sister is ready for you, big brother."

Su Yin's face appeared in Su Yang's head at this moment, which made him smile.

He approached Chun Hua and rubbed his rod between her slit for a bit before poking its entrance with the tip.

"Ahn!" Chun Hua leaned back as she released a loud moan that caused Su Yang's ears to tremble.

"I'm going inside now," he warned her before slowly pushing his rod inside her tight cave that felt no different than a maiden's unused cave.

Chun Hua could feel her soul being pushed out of her body as Su Yang's rod pushed deeper into her cave.

Her body trembled, and her pink tips became stiff and fully erected.

Suddenly, Chun Hua embraced Su Yang with her legs and locked it.

"I'm not going to let you go until you make me unconscious," she licked her lips.

Hearing her words, Su Yang immediately went to work, thrusting his rod into her tight cave. "Harder! Do me harder!"

As Su Yang increased his intensity, Chun Hua's lower cave continued to gush with Yin Qi.

"Yes! This is the spot~! Ah~ I'm going crazy!!!"

"..."

While Chun Hua seemed to be enjoying herself immensely and was on the verge of losing her mind, Su Yang could tell that it was being exaggerated. 'Interesting… I'll need to start putting in some real effort if I want to truly satisfy her…' he thought to himself.

chapters.title: Chapter 1076 Chun Hua(3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 1076 Chun Hua(3)

Chapter 1076 Chun Hua(3)

Once he realized that Chun Hua was merely acting satisfied, Su Yang increased the intensity.

"Ah~!?" Chun Hua moaned loudly, her tone sounding a little different than before.

However, Su Yang didn't go all out and merely used enough skills to please a Core Disciple typically.

He was unsure why Chun Hua approached him or her goals, but he was certain she didn't approach him just for a massage.

'Did they send her to dig information from me?' he wondered as he plowed Chun Hua's cave with swift and precise movement, hitting the exact same spot with every thrust.

The spot he was hitting also happened to be Chun Hua's weak point. Chun Hua didn't want to admit it and refused to comment on it, but her moans gave away everything.

'Do they still doubt the origin of the Yang Qi I am supplying them? Well, it doesn't matter. As long as I continue supplying it to them, they will eventually stop questioning it.'

Before receiving the Sect Master's approval, he was an Outer Court disciple who was prohibited from leaving the sect. Unless he sneaked out or someone smuggled it into the sect for him, there was simply no way for him to receive the Yang Qi from a friend.

The Boundless Yin Yang Sect checked all of the guest records, but nobody came to visit Su Yang, so they were certain that he lied about the Yang Qi's origin.

Su Yang knew this would happen, but he didn't care, even if the truth was revealed. His true purpose for taking out such high-quality Yang Qi was to get the Sect Leader's attention, and he did so successfully.

"Aren't you feeling good? Why aren't you releasing any Yang Qi? I can't be the only one giving!" Chun Hua suddenly said.

Su Yang smiled and said, "My endurance is quite high, but I am almost there."

After thrusting for several more minutes, Su Yang released a load of Yang Qi into her cave, filling it completely.

"So hot and filling! Is this what it feels to be pregnant?" Chun Hua chuckled.

It was clear that Chun Hua still had plenty of energy left. Besides his own family members, Chun Hua had the highest endurance out of his partners since his reincarnation.

'Her endurance is very high and even better than some Core Disciples. Who knew I'd find a talent like this now?'

"Let's continue, shall we? Or do you need a break?" she asked him a moment later.

"I can continue."

"The first one to give up will owe the other a favor!"

"Sounds fun."

Su Yang accepted her challenge.

They started the second section shortly after. This time, Chun Hua did most of the moving.

As Su Yang lay on the bed, Chun Hua's hips elegantly danced on top of him. Su Yang recognized the technique she was using because it was one of the most popular techniques for Inner Court Disciples when he was a disciple using his real identity.

"Let's see how many laps it'll take to make you release your next load of Yang Qi!"

Each lap involved 28 movements, each providing the receiver with a different sensation of pleasure.

Most Inner Court Disciples last only seven to ten laps with the more experienced ones able to endure twenty. As for Core Disciples, most of them could easily endure over a hundred laps.

"Nineteenth lap! Wow, your endurance surpasses most Inner Court disciples!" Chun Hua commented as she started the twentieth lap.

Fifty laps later.

"You're halfway at the level of Core Disciples! I have never seen an Outer Court disciple like you before, Junior apprentice-brother Xiao!"

Not wanting to go overboard, Su Yang released his Yang Qi when Chun Hua was almost done with her fifty-fifth lap.

After a brief break that lasted exactly two minutes, Su Yang started the third session with him in charge again.

The two of them would take turns pleasuring the other, spending three whole days cultivating with enough intensity to knock most Inner Court disciples unconscious.

In the end, Su Yang tapped out and declared his defeat. Of course, he could've continued cultivating, but he didn't want to reveal too much of his abilities so soon, and he wanted to see what kind of favor Chun Hua would ask of him, as that could potentially reveal her ulterior motives.

"I'm glad you tapped out because I wouldn't have been able to continue after another hour or so." Chun Hua said as she lay on the bed with a body drenched in sweat.

"Really? You look like you can continue for another week!" Su Yang teased in a somewhat joking manner.

"If I could do that, I would already be a Core Disciple," she sighed.

"If you took the examination right now, I think you have a good chance of passing." 𝑓𝘳ℯℯ𝔀ℯ𝓫𝑛𝑜𝓋𝑒𝓵.𝘤𝘰𝓶

"Oh? You make it sound like you know about the examination for Core Disciples, but you're just an Outer Court disciple who recently joined the sect, so how's that possible?"

"It's just an assumption since you're already so experienced and talented."

"Why, thank you," she chuckled.

"Unfortunately, the requirements for Core Disciples are very strict and demanding. I'll need another decade or so before I can even start thinking about it. And you can only take the examination once every fifty years, so I want to be certain that I will pass before even attempting to take it."

Sometime later, after resting enough, Chun Hua spoke, "Now let's talk about the Fiery Yang Cavern, shall we? I will return in a day or two after I figure out the schedule. Once we find an empty slot, we'll sneak you inside."

"Sure," he said in a calm voice.

"You sure about this? This is your last chance to back out, you know."

"If I back out now, that means I cultivated with you for nothing," he smiled.

"How mean! Do you have any idea how many people want to cultivate with me?!" Chun Hua puffed her cheeks, trying to pretend to be angry.

"Jokes aside, I am certain that I want to do this." Su Yang suddenly turned serious.

"Okay." Chun Hua acknowledged with a similarly serious face.

chapters.title: Chapter 1077 Yang Qi King
chapters.body:
Chapter 1077 Yang Qi King

Chapter 1077 Yang Qi King

"Then I'll see you in a day or two."

Chun Hua left Su Yang's living quarters shortly after cleaning up.

Su Yang decided to wait until after Chun Hua returned with the Fiery Yang Cavern's schedule before going to the mission hall and accepting any more missions.

After adjusting his plans, Su Yang made his way to the Grand Yin Yang Peak to meet up with Elder Yao and supply her with some more of his Yang Qi.

He showed the guard of the peak Elder Yao's medallion and entered the Grand Yin Yang Peak without any issues.

Sometime later, he knocked on Elder Yao's door and waited for her to come out.

"You… where have you been?" Elder Yao greeted him with a frown on her pretty face after opening the door and realizing it was him.

"I left the sect to do some missions. You didn't know?" he asked.

"I've been busy," she sighed. "If I weren't so busy, I would've gone to your home to check up on you since you haven't supplied me with any Yang Qi in a while." "Why are you so occupied?" he asked, his curiosity piqued.

"With the Yang Qi King just around the corner, the sect's been swamped with pill requests from the Core Disciples," she sighed.

"Yang Qi King? What is that?" Su Yang raised his eyebrows in a puzzled manner.

This event never existed back in his days, so it was something new even for him.

"You don't know about such a popular event—oh, right. You joined the sect recently."

After realizing this, she explained the event, "The Yang Qi King is a competition where every disciple can submit their Yang Qi to be examined and graded by the sect. The disciple with the highest quality Yang Qi will be crowned Yang Qi King for the next hundred years."

"The Yang Qi King Qi will not only be granted special access to the Scorching Yang Sauna, but they'll also be rewarded a Golden Sun Pill."

"Scorching Yang Sauna and even a Golden Sun Pill? What a generous event." Su Yang commented out loud.

The Scorching Yang Sauna was a sanctum for tempering the body. By spending half a year in this place, one could acquire a body that can withstand extreme heat and naturally produce more Yang Qi. Unfortunately, the steam required to temper the body requires a lot of time to produce, so only one person could enter it every hundred years. This place used to be reserved for the Prime Disciple, but clearly, things have changed since Su Yang left.

As for the Golden Sun Pill, not only was it a great elixir for boosting one's cultivation, but it was also great for increasing the quality of one's Yang Qi.

"Can any disciple participate in this event?" Su Yang then asked.

"Of course, but only Core Disciples and some Inner Court disciples actually participate for obvious reasons," she said.

"Don't tell me you plan on participating. While your Yang Qi is above average for an Outer Court disciple and even beats some of the Inner Court disciples, it doesn't compare with the Core Disciples, who had spent much more time and effort improving their Yang Qi than you. However, if it's your Yang Qi supplier, that will be a different story."

"Unfortunately, he's not a disciple of the sect, so he wouldn't be able to participate, anyway." Su Yang calmly shook his head.

"That is indeed quite unfortunate." Elder Yao said with a hint of sarcasm in her tone.

"Anyway, here is the Yang Qi." Su Yang handed her twenty bottles of Yang Qi.

"This will more than make up for the three months of dry supply. Thank you." Elder Yao trembled in excitement after seeing so many bottles.

Su Yang returned to his living quarters shortly after and spent the rest of the day cultivating.

Chun Hua returned the very next day.

"The Fiery Yang Cavern will be fully occupied for the next two months, but starting on the second week of the third month, there'll be fourteen days of unscheduled time, so you'll have the other half of the month to use it," Chun Hua revealed the schedule to him.

"What if that time gets filled during these next two months?" he asked.

"That won't happen because it's a downtime meant to allow the place to recover its resources. Nobody will be allowed to visit during that time. The third month's schedule is already filled, too," she explained.

Su Yang didn't doubt her claims, as it was common practice to shut down such places periodically to allow them to replenish their resources. Continuous use without breaks could deplete the resources entirely, causing the place to cease functioning properly.

"If you're worried about potentially draining the place completely, you should know that ignoring the downtimes once in a while won't damage the place. You would need to continuously use it for centuries to exhaust these kinds of places fully. Moreover, the sect rarely ignores these downtimes, so messing with it once every several years won't do it any harm."

"In simpler terms, not taking a break every once in a while won't break down the place, so you can go inside and cultivate worry-free."

Naturally, Su Yang had no such worries in the first place. He could tell if a place was about to lose its powers with a glance, so he could easily avoid these issues.

"I understand," he calmly nodded.

"Then I will come pick you up in two months," she said.

Chun Hua did not linger and left shortly after.

"Two months, huh? I can do at least two missions."

Not wanting to waste any time, he immediately went to the mission hall to accept more missions.

Sometime later, he picked out 2 high-priority missions and went to get them approved.

"You're going back out already? With two missions, too?" The same Sect Elder who checked him out last time was surprised to see him again so soon.

chapters.title: Chapter 1078 Xu Xuan
chapters.body:
Chapter 1078 Xu Xuan

Chapter 1078 Xu Xuan

"Is there something wrong with me accepting more missions? I thought disciples are encouraged to accept as many missions as possible." Su Yang asked with his head tilted in a puzzled manner.

"No… there's nothing wrong. And you are right. Disciples are encouraged to accept missions since it increases our reputation and karma." The Sect Elder grabbed the missions and started recording them down in his scroll.

"You will have two months to complete these missions. Here are your necessities." The Sect Elder handed him a pouch with the usual items inside.

Su Yang left the mission hall and returned to his living quarters to notify Mei Ying and Mei Xing of his departure.

"Stay safe, Manager." Mei Xing said.

"It's not like I'm going out to fight spiritual beasts or anything like that."

Sometime later, Su Yang left the Boundless Yin Yang Sect.

Three days after Su Yang left, a small figure appeared above the Boundless Yin Yang Sect and used spiritual sense to sweep the entire sect.

Using spiritual sense on an entire sect was highly frowned upon, akin to spying, and could be mistaken as a declaration of war. Due to this, it was an unspoken rule in the cultivation world to never use spiritual sense on a wide scale whenever one is near a sect or any place with a large settlement.

However, this small cat-like figure couldn't care less about such human rules. Moreover, it was confident that nobody would be able to sense its spiritual sense.

'I don't sense the Phantom Cat's presence here… Maybe they haven't returned to the sect yet?' Xu Xuan wondered to herself after failing to find Xiao Rong.

However, a certain area within the Boundless Yin Yang Sect immediately piqued her interest when she saw it due to how elaborate it was. That area was the Outcast Peak. More specifically, Su Yang's living quarters.

Right before Xing Aiying left Su Yang's side, she'd created several top formations around Su Yang's living quarters to protect him. As one of the best formation experts in the Divine Heavens, Xing Aiying could make her formations invisible and undetectable by even other top formation experts, so she wasn't worried about her formations catching any attention.

In fact, even the Heavenly Emperor would not be able to detect her formations if she really wanted to conceal them. However, even Xing Aiying could have never anticipated that a Phantom Cat would appear in the Boundless Yin Yang Sect and sweep the whole place with spiritual sense. A Phantom Cat's spiritual power is so obscenely powerful that no other existence in the Divine Heavens even comes close to it, much less rival it. Furthermore, paired with their treasure-seeking ability, nearly everything in this world is visible to them if they want to see it.

After discovering Su Yang's living quarters, Xu Xuan approached it to take a better look at the formations.

Her transparent figure approached the building, her presence nonexistent.

'Hmm… there are only three formation experts I can think of who could possibly create such a skillful formation, and one of them is from the Su Family…' Xu Xuan proceeded to spend the next few days studying the formation while she waited for Su Yang's return.

On the fifth day, she noticed a small human coming out of the house to sweep the front door and the area around the house.

'She is the definition of out-of-place… Why is a little girl like her in this sort of place? Is that woman inside her guardian? Her cultivation is too weak to be a disciple, so she must be a servant. They were probably brought here by that man with the Phantom Cat, but why?' Xu Xuan quickly comprehended their situation. A few more days later, Xu Xuan observed a young lady wearing disciple clothes approach the building.

"Good morning, Miss Luo." Mei Ying greed her.

"Hey, I'm just here for a wellness check. Is everything okay? Did anyone bother you?" Luo Li asked.

"No, it's been really peaceful here."

"Disciple Xiao's really something, though. He's completed 3 high-priority missions as an Outer Court disciple, and he's now out to do 2 more. He's not only talented but hardworking as well." Luo Li said.

"The manager is definitely a hard worker. I've known this since our time in the City of Pleasure." Mei Ying agreed with a head nod.

'Disciple Xiao, huh?' Xu Xuan suddenly had an idea.

She consumed an appearance-altering pill and transformed into a disciple. Then, she left the Outcast Peak and pretended to enter the place for the first time.

"Hello. Is Disciple Xiao here?" Xu Xuan approached Luo Li and asked.

"No, he's out doing missions."

"Do you know when he'll return?"

"He left only a few days ago, but he'll be back within two months." Mei Ying said.

Xu Xuan sucked her teeth in an annoyed manner when she realized that she missed him by a few days.

"For what purpose are you looking for Disciple Xiao?" Luo Li asked, her eyes examining Xu Xuan from top to bottom.

"Oh, I'm a friend of his. He visited me first, but I wasn't available at that time, so I am visiting him now."

"Disciple Xiao's friend?" Luo Li raised an eyebrow. "Yup. His friend. By the way, is his cat home?" Xu Xuan suddenly asked.

"Cat? Disciple Xiao has a cat?" Luo Li looked at Mei Ying for answers.

However, Mei Ying shook her head and said, "No, he doesn't."

Since Xiao Rong typically spends her time exploring outside, she rarely sees Mei Ying or Mei Xing. Whenever she does show up, she's always in her human form, so Mei Ying wasn't aware of her true identity.

"He doesn't? He told me he had a cat at home. Perhaps I'd misheard…" Xu Xuan said in a puzzled manner. Her acting was so good that neither Luo Li or Mei Ying suspected anything.

"How did you become friends with Disciple Xiao?" Luo Li asked out of curiosity.

"How we met, huh…" Xu Xuan's expression suddenly became nostalgic as she recalled an old memory of hers.

"He found me when I was on the brink of death and saved my life… That's how we first met." Xu Xuan spoke in a gentle voice.

chapters.title: Chapter 1079 Xu Xuan(2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 1079 Xu Xuan(2)

Chapter 1079 Xu Xuan(2)

"He saved your life? When did this happen? Was it recently?" Luo Li asked.

"No, it happened a long time ago. I doubt he even remembers our first encounter." Xu Xuan shook her head in a slightly dispirited manner.

"Huh? A long time ago? You met him before he was a disciple?" Luo Li didn't expect this development.

"Indeed. I was young and reckless back then, so I often found myself in danger. After doing many things, karma eventually caught up with me. If it weren't for Disciple Xiao, I probably wouldn't be standing here right now." Xu Xuan revealed this information for the first time since that event.

Xu Xuan had intended to keep this information secret forever. However, after Su Yang's death, she often found herself sharing stories of their past before she even realized it, as if reminiscing was her way of keeping his memory alive.

Luo Li suddenly chuckled and said, "You make it sound like you've been alive for thousands of years when you're probably just a hundred years old or so."

Xu Xuan silently smiled without responding.

After a moment of silence, Xu Xuan said, "Since he's not here, I will come back another day. See you later, fellow disciple."

She quickly disappeared from the Outcast Peak.

However, Xu Xuan didn't leave the Boundless Yin Yang Sect and actually made her way to the mission hall.

Despite having never been a disciple, Xu Xuan has visited the Boundless Yin Yang Sect on many occasions—enough to know the whole place like it's on the back of her hand. Of course, she did it in secret, and it was hidden even from Su Yang.

Upon arriving at the mission hall, Xu Xuan walked straight to an open reception and asked the Sect Elder, "This is an emergency. I'm looking for a Disciple Xiao. He left a few days ago on two missions."

"What kind of emergency?" The subconsciously Sect Elder asked.

"His family was murdered. I need to notify him immediately."

"O-oh…" The Sect Elder no longer asked any questions and immediately looked into their logbook.

"Disciple Xiao… he accepted two high-priority missions. I'll give you the locations of where he's supposed to meet his client."

"Thank you, Elder! You're a lifesaver!" Xu Xuan bowed to him.

Once she received his location, Xu Xuan left the Boundless Yin Yang Sect and sped towards them.

Meanwhile, Su Yang just met with his client face to face. She was a mature widow with a seemingly insatiable lust.

"It's nice to meet you, madam. I'm Xiao Yang." Su Yang introduced himself with a gentle smile.

When the client saw his face, she nearly teared up.

"Y-you… you look so much like my late husband, who passed away three hundred years ago, during his younger days…" she muttered with a dazed expression.

"Oh… You have my condolences…" Su Yang kept the smile on his face, but he was a little surprised inwardly because he had picked the disguise randomly.

The woman slowly approached him with her hands raised, looking like she wanted to touch his face.

"May I…?" she asked.

"Of course." The woman proceeded to caress his face gently and passionately, tears forming in her eyes.

She stopped a few moments later and smiled, "Thank you very much. I know it must have felt awkward for you."

"No, I don't feel that way at all. I feel the love you had for your late husband, and it's very warming." Su Yang smiled.

"Ah… I cannot hold myself any longer… please… I want you to touch me all over my body…" The woman spoke with a lustful gaze on her face.

"With pleasure."

It was now Su Yang's turn to touch her. He caressed her face just like how she'd caressed him a moment later, but he moved lower and lower, from her neck to her massive breasts that resembled two melons.

He eventually removed her clothes and started massaging her entire body.

Once she was wet enough, Su Yang plugged his thick rod inside her riped cave.

"Ahh~!"

The woman moaned loudly.

"Yes~! Yes~! I want you to do me harder!"

Sometime later, when the woman was fully absorbed in their passionate cultivation, she subconsciously changed the way she addressed him, "That's the spot, dear! Oh~! Yes!!!" This wasn't Su Yang's first time roleplaying as the husband, so he didn't mind it at all. A few hours later, Su Yang filled her body with his Yang Qi.

However, the client wasn't done yet and proceeded to lick all over his body before moving to his sword. Without hesitation, she gobbled up the monster and began making sloppy noises.

'The oral skills of a married woman with immense lust never ceases to amaze me.' Su Yang chuckled inwardly. After spending many minutes slurping his rod, she started riding him like a horse, her massive breasts bouncing up and down. They would continue to cultivate nonstop for an entire week straight before taking a break.

"Although my late husband lacked the techniques, his endurance more than made up for it. You, however, have both endurance and techniques. I have never felt so satisfied since his passing."

"I don't want to say this, but you're essentially a superior version of my late husband…"

"I'm humbled, but I can never replace your late husband."

"..."

After a moment of silence, she spoke, "Do you want to put that to the test? Become my husband. I may not seem like it, but I have quite a significant influence around this place. You surely won't regret it."

"I appreciate the offer—I truly do. However, I already have a family of my own."

She looked at him with a surprised face and said, "Dual cultivators are truly something else. I wouldn't dare do this if my late husband was still alive."

After chatting for a little longer, his client initiated their second session, which would go on for another week straight.

Towards the end of their second session, a presence neither Su Yang nor the woman could sense approached their room.

chapters.title: Chapter 1080 Xu Xuan(3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 1080 Xu Xuan(3)

Chapter 1080 Xu Xuan(3)

'Hm… he's pretty good at dual cultivation, but it's definitely nowhere near Su Yang's level…' Xu Xuan thought to herself as she analyzed Su Yang's cultivation with his client through her spiritual sense.

Naturally, she knew it was highly likely that he was hiding his true skills. However, she couldn't tell so quickly, as she'd just arrived.

As she watched more of their cultivation, Xu Xuan became convinced that Su Yang was hiding his true skills. Normally, if Su Yang seriously wanted to hide his skills, not even the Sect Master of the Boundless Yin Yang Sect would be able to tell. However, he was currently alone with a client, so he didn't put too much effort into hiding his skills. Xu Xuan watched Su Yang's cultivation session until the very end.

"Thank you very much for letting me experience what it is like to be young again; I will never forget our moment together for the rest of my life."

Su Yang smiled and said, "You can always send another request to the Boundless Yin Yang Sect for another session."

"Do you have any idea how many disciples I sent back before I met you?" she asked.

"You can request specifically for me. That way, I'll receive your request directly, and you won't have to go through the hassle."

"I didn't know that. Thank you for letting me know. I'll definitely send you a request whenever I can."

"Then I'll see you next time."

Su Yang left the hotel and made his way to his next client. Unbeknownst to him, a cat-like figure was following behind him, watching his every movement.

Xu Xuan thought about stopping him for a conversation, but she decided to watch over him a little longer.

Several days later, Su Yang arrived at the designated meeting spot with his client. It was an outdoor restaurant with a pavilion built on top of a small pond. He sat there for an entire day, occasionally ordering food and drinks. However, nobody showed up even many days later. Despite this, Su Yang didn't leave and continued to wait.

A few pretty ladies approached Su Yang when they noticed a handsome man sitting alone, but he politely refused them.

The restaurant's manager was aware of Su Yang's purpose there and didn't make things difficult for him, even accommodating him with drinks at times. With only two weeks left on his schedule, a figure approached his side.

"Umm… Hello…" Su Yang turned his head to look at the ordinary-looking young lady standing beside him and smiled, "Yes?"

Despite her ordinary face, the young woman wore high-quality robes.

"Are you…?" The woman's expression was incredibly bashful. "Indeed, I am waiting for Miss Li."

The young lady immediately bowed and said, "I'm so sorry! I was held up by my family and couldn't show up earlier!" Su Yang knew that she was lying because he'd noticed her watching him for the last several days. However, he kept this to himself and played along with her, "No problem. We still have plenty of time."

Miss Li didn't immediately respond, her profound gaze on his calm and handsome face.

"You don't mind me?" Miss Li asked a moment later.

"I don't understand. What wouldn't I mind?" Su Yang wore a genuinely puzzled expression on his face.

Miss Li showed a faint smile on her face before responding, "Never mind. Let's go. I know a place."

Su Yang nodded and followed her to a hotel located two blocks away from the restaurant.

Once they were inside, Miss Li sat on the bed and said, "My name's Li Dai. What's yours?"

"Xiao Yang."

"This is my first time doing something like this, so I am a little nervous…" she said.

Su Yang could tell that she was telling the truth about being nervous. Even at the restaurant where she was hiding, she was quite anxious. Perhaps that's why it took her several days to approach him—because she was building up the courage.

When he first looked at this high-priority mission, it was noted that the client was frequently absent, so very few disciples actually met with her. As for those who were approached by her, none of them made it to the hotel for some reason.

Her puzzling actions made the Boundless Yin Yang Sect wonder if she was just messing with them. However, Li Dai had already paid for the request ahead of time, so the sect just left it be for the time being.

"It's okay. Take your time." Su Yang said with a calm smile.

"Okay…"

Li Dai nodded. For some reason, she felt really comfortable around him. The other disciples were either too aggressive, or she simply didn't feel comfortable approaching them. This is why it took her so long to find a suitable partner. Silence filled the room as Li Dai sat on the bed with her eyes staring at the floor.

"Do you mind if I sit next to you?" Su Yang asked, his voice as gentle as a pillow.

"Sure…" she nodded.

After another moment of silence, Su Yang asked, "Is there a reason you're forcing yourself to do this?"

"H-huh? Why do you think I'm forcing myself?" she looked at him, seemingly astonished.

"For starters, you're clearly hesitant about doing this. Secondly, you're still a maiden. Now, why would someone like that send a high-priority request to a place like the Boundless Yin Yang Sect?"

Li Dai stared at him with her mouth wide open. How did he know she was a maiden? After a moment of silence, she sighed, "Because I feel left out…"

"All my friends at the sect have experienced sex, and they're always talking about it. Meanwhile, I have no experience, so I feel left out. I'm ugly, not to mention my shy nature, so this is the only way for me to have sex."

After learning of her situation, Su Yang said, "I won't tell you how you should find your partner or that you should value your first time more, but I will ask you this—are you certain you want to do this? It's not too late to turn around."

chapters.title: Chapter 1081 Xu Xuan(4)
chapters.body:
Chapter 1081 Xu Xuan(4)

Chapter 1081 Xu Xuan(4)

"I…" Li Dai became even more hesitant after hearing Su Yang's words.

Seeing her like this, Su Yang said, "How about this? I can let you experience sex without actually experiencing it for real."

Li Dai's eyes flickered profoundly after hearing his words. "Really? You can do that?"

"Yes. It's a technique that will let you experience dual cultivation inside your mind, akin to a dream, and it's almost indistinguishable from reality."

"Let's do that instead!" she immediately said.

Su Yang nodded and said, "Lie down on the bed and close your eyes."

Li Dai followed his instructions.

Once she was lying on the bed, Su Yang placed two fingers on her forehead and used World of Pleasure on her.

Meanwhile, Li Dai didn't feel any different and wondered how long it would take for the technique to take effect.

"Umm… are you done yet?" Li Dai asked, her eyes still closed.

Suddenly, she could feel someone caressing her face.

"Eh?!"

Surprised by this, Li Dai quickly opened her eyes to find Su Yang caressing her face.

"X-Xiao Yang?"

"You're already affected by the technique. Just relax and let me do all of the work," he said.

"O-okay…?"

Li Dai couldn't tell if he was messing with her or if she was actually dreaming right now. Everything about their situation felt too real for her to distinguish it.

'This is exactly just like he'd said… but what if he's messing with me? What if there's no such technique, and we're actually doing this for real?' she wondered inwardly.

While she was in deep thought, Su Yang suddenly began removing her robes.

Even though she was confused, Li Dai did not put up any resistance.

'Whatever… even if he's messing with me, it's what I came here for, anyway.'

With that thought in mind, Li Dai decided to follow the flow and allowed Su Yang to do whatever he wanted to her body.

Once her clothes were fully removed, Su Yang began massaging her body.

Li Dai immediately clenched her teeth when Su Yang started kneading her large breasts like dough. Her body looked modest at a glance due to her clothes, but it was quite plentiful underneath them, especially her breasts.

"Relax, you don't have to hold your voice back. It'll feel much better to let it out."

Li Dai nodded and began moaning softly. As the pleasure in her body intensified, so did her voice.

"Mmmh…"

"Mmmm~!"

"Ahn~!"

Li Dai's lower lips quickly became soaking wet, her entire body tingling with delight.

Once her body was ready, Su Yang removed his clothes, revealing his dragon to her.

Li Dai's eyes nearly popped out of their sockets when she saw his massive dragon.

"Are they typically that big?!" she couldn't help but ask.

Su Yang shrugged, "How would I know? I am not into that sort of thing." "Then… will that really fit inside my body?" she asked another question.

"Of course. Our body is surprisingly flexible," he reassured.

Su Yang gave her little sister a few slaps with his rod before poking the entrance with it.

Li Dai immediately clenched her teeth again.

"I'm going inside now." Su Yang warned her before tearing her maiden hole open.

"AHH!"

Li Dai was not prepared for the immense pain and screamed loudly.

Sometime later, once the pain passed, Su Yang began moving his hips, rubbing her inner walls with his thick rod.

"Ah~! Ah~! Ahhhh!!!" Li Dai's sweet voice filled the room.

Su Yang suddenly leaned over and kissed her.

'To think I would lose my virginity before I have my first kiss!' she cried inwardly.

As time passed, Li Dai's boldness grew, as did her desire for more pleasure.

"Ah~! Yes~! Faster~!"

"T-there! Keep poking me right there!" Li Dai lasted only several minutes for her first time, but she quickly regained enough stamina to go another round.

Over the next several days, Li Dai indulged in an experience that she never thought was possible.

Sometime later, Li Dai slowly opened her eyes and sat up on the bed.

"Hm?"

She noticed that her clothes were on, but she was certain that she fell asleep during their cultivation.

"How was it?" Su Yang, who was casually sitting on the floor, asked her.

"Huh?" Li Dai stared at him with a puzzled face.

"Your first experience."

"It was amazing… but…" she looked at her clean clothes and noticed that the bed was not wet. "I told you that it was indistinguishable from reality, right? Your Pure Yin Essence is still intact. What you experienced was just by my technique."

"T-that was all a dream?!" she exclaimed, looking bewildered.

"U-unbelievable… I thought you tricked me…" she told him the truth.

Su Yang chuckled, "I don't blame you."

"Anyway, are you satisfied?"

Li Dai nodded, but she suddenly appeared hesitant again.

"What's wrong?"

After a moment of silence, she spoke, "Umm… I want to experience it again—for real this time. Do you mind?"

"Are you sure?"

"Yes, I am certain this time. We still have time, right?"

"We have plenty."

Li Dai took the initiative to remove her clothes this time. Sometime later, she experienced losing her virginity for a second time, but she didn't scream out loud this time.

Meanwhile, Xu Xuan was smiling to herself the entire time.

'A World of Pleasure… Unless he passed it down before leaving this world, it's definitely him…' She was fully convinced that he was Su Yang and tried her best not to shed tears but failed to do so.

'Ahh… Su Yang… what in heaven's name is going on? Why are you still alive? And what are you doing back at the Boundless Yin Yang Sect playing disciple…?' Xu Xuan sighed inwardly.

A week later, Su Yang said goodbye to Li Dai and prepared to return to the Boundless Yin Yang Sect.

However, right as he stepped outside the hotel, a mythical power invisible to the eyes surrounded him, causing him to vanish like a ghost.

chapters.title: Chapter 1082 Kitten
chapters.body:
Chapter 1082 Kitten

Chapter 1082 Kitten

After being teleported, Su Yang found himself in an unfamiliar place.

He was surrounded by trees, seemingly deep in a forest. Nearby, he could hear the gentle sound of flowing water. The atmosphere was serene, with fresh, clean air that made him feel instantly relaxed.

Unfortunately, he couldn't afford to relax, so he remained vigilant as he quickly analyzed his surroundings. Xiao Rong emerged from his Dantian, ready to protect him.

However, even with All-Seeing Celestial Eyes, no matter how much he tried, he couldn't sense anyone around him.

"Can you sense anything?" he asked Xiao Rong, who also shook her head.

'If even Xiao Rong can't sense them, we should be alone here…'

Just as he thought they were alone, a female voice resounded, "Do you know where you're at?"

"..."

Su Yang was surprised to hear the voice since this meant they were dealing with an individual even Xiao Rong couldn't sense.

'It's highly likely they're using a treasure to hide from Xiao Rong's spiritual sense…' "Who are you? And why are you doing this?" Su Yang asked out loud.

"Just answer my question. Do you remember this place?" The voice responded.

Seeing how the voice had no intention of hurting them at the moment, Su Yang decided to play along.

He flew into the air and examined his surroundings more closely. 'I don't recognize this place, but it does feel familiar…' he thought to himself.

"I'll give you one hour to remember. If you fail, I'll kill the both of you."

The voice resounded a few minutes later.

However, it only took several minutes before Su Yang started to recognize the place.

'Isn't this the training grounds outside the Fleeting Sword Sect?' Su Yang eventually remembered.

The first sect he ever joined was the Fleeting Sword Sect, and they had an outdoor training area several miles away from the sect. This location greatly resembled that area. It took a while for him to remember since it had been countless years since he visited.

"I recognize this place," he said out loud once he was confident in his answer. "It's the Fleeting Sword Sect's outdoor training ground."

"..."

After a moment of silence, the voice returned, "Are you certain that's your answer? I'll kill you if you're wrong."

"Yes, I am willing to bet my life on this answer."

"You're correct. This is indeed the Fleeting Sword Sect's training ground. Now, onto the second question."

"What did you do there? Everything you did."

Su Yang raised an eyebrow at this question.

"What? Don't tell me you've never been there before, even though you recognize this place?" As if the voice could read his mind, they said.

"You don't have to pretend anymore, Xiao Yang… or should I call you Su Yang?"

"..."

Su Yang didn't expect his identity to be exposed in such a manner, but he wasn't panicking, either.

'Since they went out of their way to bring me to this secluded area, I doubt they have any intention of exposing me, but I cannot understand the purpose of this. Is this one of them playing a trick on me?' Su Yang wondered if it was one of his family members messing with him, as they were the only ones who were aware of his return.

In a composed manner, Su Yang closed his eyes and began speaking as he recalled his past at the Fleeting Sword Sect.

"The training ground had one purpose—to let the Fleeting Sword Sect disciples experience the outside world as a cultivator. The sect captures spiritual beasts and tosses them into the training ground for the disciples to hunt."

"I visited that place often when I was an Outer Court disciple, spending weeks at a time hunting spiritual beasts. I would occasionally find treasures there. Of course, these treasures were planted by the sect to encourage its disciples to go there."

"That's all I did there."

"Are you sure that's all you did there?" The voice asked.

"Of course. What else would I do there besides hunting spiritual beasts? I cannot think of anything else."

"I will give you one last chance, Su Yang. When I say everything, I mean it literally."

Seeing how stubborn this voice was being, Su Yang returned to his memories to see if he'd missed anything.

'Since this person is adamant I left something behind, it must be pretty significant, and it's directly related to this person… but I really don't remember doing anything too significant there besides hunting spiritual beasts…'

As he pondered, Su Yang subconsciously looked at Xiao Rong, who was still alert and on the lookout for any potential danger.

'Huh? Wait a second…'

Looking at Xiao Rong gave his memories a quick jolt, allowing him to recall something out of the ordinary.

"I remember now!" he showed a face of realization.

"During one of my usual routines at the training ground, I encountered something that did not belong there—a kitten. This kitten was hurt at that time, so I gave it some medicine and even brought it back to my living quarters, where I let it rest until it fully recovered."

"However, even after it fully recovered, it would follow me around for a few more years. Then, one day, without any notice, the kitten left."

"That's everything that I did at the training ground, and my answer is final."

"..."

The voice did not return.

Suddenly, Su Yang noticed a small figure appearing from the corner of his eyes.

He immediately shifted his head to look at this figure.

The figure belonged to a cat—a white cat, and it looked really familiar.

"Xiao Rong?" Su Yang raised his eyebrows.

However, Xiao Rong was right beside him, so this cat couldn't be her. Yet, this cat looked exactly like Xiao Rong in her beast form when she had her powers sealed.

"This is my first time appearing before you in this form…" The cat spoke in a calm yet trembling voice.

"Huh? That voice…" Without her voice disguised any longer, Su Yang instantly recognized it.

"Xu Xuan? Is that you?" he muttered with wide eyes filled with shock.

chapters.title: Chapter 1083 Xiao Rong’S Origin
chapters.body:
Chapter 1083 Xiao Rong’S Origin

Chapter 1083 Xiao Rong's Origin

After hearing Su Yang call her name, Xu Xuan transformed back to her human form, becoming the ethereal beauty of the Autumn Phantom Manor.

Upon confirming her identity, Su Yang released a sigh of relief and said, "This isn't good for my heart, Xu Xuan."

"And whatever you're doing is good for the heart?" she sneered.

"I have my reasons for doing so… I'll explain it to you in a bit, but first… you were that kitten I found at the Fleeting Sword Sect? Why didn't you tell me before?"

"I didn't feel like it." Xu Xuan shrugged.

"Was our second meeting a coincidence, or did you make it seem like one?" Su Yang continued inquiring with a gentle smile on his face.

The next time he met Xu Xuan, she was already in her human form, and she never mentioned their past until today.

"Who knows." Xu Xuan shrugged.

"Anyway, you better have a good explanation for why you're still alive and pretending to be a disciple of the Boundless Yin Yang Sect."

She pointed at him with an angry expression. "I am not pretending to be a disciple, though. I am a genuine disciple who joined with the Yin Yang Badge of Acceptance. As for why I am still alive, it's because I reincarnated after my death." "You reincarnated…? And how long has it been since your return?"

"About two decades ago, I guess. However, I didn't reincarnate within the Four Divine Heavens but somewhere else—somewhere far away that I still have no idea its exact location."

"I'll explain the whole story to you, but can we do it somewhere more suitable?"

In response to his request, Xu Xuan snapped her fingers, and the entire world around them transformed. In the blink of an eye, Su Yang found himself standing before a humble house on a lonely, desolate star, the vast emptiness of the cosmos stretching out in all directions.

"Where are we?" he asked out of curiosity.

He thought she had brought him inside her spatial device, but that no longer seemed to be the case.

"Somewhere far from the Four Divine Heavens, where no one can intrude or spy on us. Here, you can relax and remove your disguise…unless you're telling me that's your new appearance after reincarnation?" Xu Xuan said, her voice tinged with curiosity.

"No, this is just a disguise." Su Yang removed his disguise, revealing to her his much superior, handsome face.

"..." Xu Xuan appeared to be astonished by his appearance.

"Y-you… you look just like when you found me at the Fleeting Sword Sect—young and innocent."

"I'll take that as a compliment." Su Yang smiled.

Once they were seated, Su Yang began recalling his experience after his reincarnation.

Meanwhile, Xiao Rong, who was sitting on Su Yang's lap in her beast form, stared at Xu Xuan's face without blinking. For some reason, even though she didn't recognize Xu Xuan, she sensed a nostalgic feeling coming from Xu Xuan.

Xu Xuan noticed Xiao Rong's intense glares and would occasionally give her a brief glance, even smiling at her.

Sometime later, after listening to Su Yang's whole story, Xu Xuan nodded, "I understand your situation now, but I still have a lot of questions. Who was that old man who 'killed' then reincarnated you? What happened to your original body?"

"I don't know anything about that old man, but I visited you for two reasons. First, I wanted to see if you knew anything about my original body since your ability to track things is second to none. Secondly, I wanted to see if you knew anything about Xiao Rong's origin as a fellow Phantom Cat. You heard from the kittens that she's lost her memories, right?"

Xu Xuan pondered for a moment before responding, "I know your original body was stolen during the funeral, and I already tried looking for it, but something else came up midway, so I had to put that on hold until I sorted out my own problem."

"Even someone as exalted as you have problems? What happened?" Su Yang asked with a slightly surprised face.

"A family member of mine suddenly went missing, so I went to look for her," she said.

"The little kittens you have at the Autumn Phantom Manor? One of them is missing?" Su Yang asked.

"No, they're all there. And although they're also family, the family I am talking about is blood-related."

Su Yang was surprised to hear this since he always thought she had no family members.

"Anyway, I don't need to find her anymore because I have already found her, so I'll start looking for your original body seriously now."

"I see… thank you." Su Yang didn't put too much thought into Xu Xuan's words since it was already resolved.

However, Xu Xuan was not finished speaking and continued, "As for Xiao Rong, I know her origin. In fact, I know her quite well."

"Really? You're not messing with me?" Su Yang had hoped for this outcome, but he wasn't too hopeful.

She nodded and said, "Well, she's my sister, after all."

Su Yang immediately raised his eyebrows at her words.

"What…? Xiao Rong is your sister? How—"

Before he could even finish his sentence, Xu Xuan confirmed, "That's right, the Phantom Cat on your lap is my sister—my twin sister, to be exact."

"..." Su Yang wore a look of disbelief, rendered speechless. He had always known that Xiao Rong had an extraordinary background, but he had never expected this outcome.

Even Xiao Rong was quite shocked to hear this news.

"You're my… sister?" Xiao Rong stared at her with wide eyes.

Xu Xuan nodded and explained, "Yes. Normally, only one Phantom Cat may exist at a time. However, by some miracle, the universe birthed the two of us together, making us twins. If you don't believe me, I can share with you our memories together."

"Heavens… what kind of coincidence is this? To think I would meet your missing sister and form a Blood Contract with her after my reincarnation, even bringing her back to you…" Su Yang looked at Xiao Rong, who appeared to be in deep thought.

chapters.title: Chapter 1084 Xu Xuan’S Memories
chapters.body:
Chapter 1084 Xu Xuan’S Memories

Chapter 1084 Xu Xuan's Memories

"Coincidence? I think this is fate at work." Xu Xuan responded to Su Yang's comment.

She turned to look at Xiao Rong and continued, "So, what do you think? Want to see my memories of our time together?"

Instead of giving an immediate answer, Xiao Rong turned to look at Su Yang, almost as if she was asking for permission.

Su Yang showed a gentle smile and said, "This is not something for me to decide. You have the ultimate decision here." Xiao Rong nodded and shifted to look at Xu Xuan.

"I want it," she calmly said.

"Okay. Transform into your beast form." Xu Xuan said as she transformed into a small cat, who looked identical to Xiao Rong in her beast form.

Sure enough, once Xiao Rong transformed and stood before Xu Xuan, it looked like she was in front of a mirror.

The two of them looked exactly the same. Even when Su Yang used spiritual sense to examine them in closer detail, he could not see any physical difference between them.

However, despite their uncanny identical appearance, their aura and demeanor were very easy to differentiate. Xu Xuan had a dignified demeanor that rivaled an empress, while Xiao Rong appeared more innocent and calm.

"I'll share with you my memories now. Don't resist, and just let them flow inside your head." Xu Xuan said as she pressed her forehead against Xiao Rong's forehead.

They closed their eyes shortly after when Xiao Rong began receiving Xu Xuan's memories from the moment of their birth.

The two of them were born at the exact same time, seemingly emerging from nothingness, as if birthed by the universe itself.

After their birth, they remained inseparable, always staying within several meters of each other.

They did everything together, from traveling the world to playing pranks on humans. They even shared every piece of food they found.

The two of them loved pranking humans, but Xu Xuan often took pranking to the extreme, causing enough trouble to be actively pursued by others.

However, because of their natural speed, Xu Xuan was confident that nobody could catch her, let alone punish her. Her pranks only worsened as time passed, and she eventually started stealing treasures from powerhouses around the Four Divine Heavens.

Xu Xuan never anticipated the day she would pay for her crimes. Then, one day, due to her reckless behavior and arrogance, Xu Xuan was caught in a trap and almost lost her life.

However, she managed to slip away at the last moment.

By the time she escaped, Xu Xuan was so weak that even a wild animal could kill her. That was when she encountered a peculiar human who nurtured her back to health and kept her safe during her recovery.

After that incident, Xu Xuan stopped being reckless and had a change of character, becoming more serious and dignified. She learned to transform into a human and blended herself alongside other humans.

Meanwhile, Xiao Rong refused to change and continued being a troublemaker, albeit not as bad as Xu Xuan.

Their disparities began to widen, causing a gradual estrangement. In the end, the two of them went their separate ways. Xu Xuan focused on her business in human society and lived as a human, while Xiao Rong did her own things.

However, while they grew distant and barely communicated, Xu Xuan kept an eye on Xiao Rong just in case anything happened to her. One day, Su Yang was pronounced dead. This news greatly shocked Xu Xuan, who became so overwhelmed with grief that she forgot about Xiao Rong.

By the time she remembered Xiao Rong and tried to find her, Xiao Rong had seemingly disappeared into thin air.

Xu Xuan used every resource at her disposal as the master of the Autmum Phantom Manor to find Xiao Rong, but to no avail. Despite this, Xu Xuan did not give up and continued looking for Xiao Rong.

"You have no idea how relieved I felt when I realized you were fine. I don't think I would've been able to bear the loss of another loved one so close to me…" Xu Xuan spoke as she removed her forehead from Xiao Rong's head.

"Sister…" Xiao Rong muttered in a dazed voice.

"So? Do you remember what happened to you?" Xu Xuan asked a moment later.

Xiao Rong shook her head.

"No, I don't."

"Is that so… Well, it doesn't matter as long as you're fine." Xu Xuan said.

"Xiao Rong, did you have another name… before I named you?" Su Yang suddenly asked, as he intended to call Xiao Rong her original name now that she had regained some of her memories.

But to his surprise, Xiao Rong shook her head and said, "No. I had no use for a name, and we only ever called each other Sister."

"She's telling the truth," Xu Xuan confirmed.

"I guess I can continue calling you Xiao Rong." Su Yang smiled.

Xiao Rong shook her head and said, "Even if I had a name before meeting you, I would still prefer being called by the name you gave me."

Although it only took a brief moment for Xu Xuan to transfer her memories, Xiao Rong had experienced thousands of years in this short moment, causing her to mature in the blink of an eye.

However, even with some of her memories recovered, Xiao Rong still possessed an innocent and playful aura, almost as if that was her true nature.

"But to think you'd form a Blood Contract with a human… that truly surprised me…" Xu Xuan muttered a moment later.

"If the person contracted wasn't Su Yang, I would've forcibly broken the contract." "Huh? You can do that without harming her? I thought Blood Contracts are eternal." Su Yang inquired with a surprised face.

"Nothing in this world is truly eternal. Although extremely rare, there are treasures out there that can end any contracts, including Blood Contracts," she said.

"I've learned something new again." Su Yang smiled.

chapters.title: Chapter 1085 Primordial Phoenix Heart
chapters.body:
Chapter 1085 Primordial Phoenix Heart

Chapter 1085 Primordial Phoenix Heart

"If you ever feel like ending the contract, you know where to go." Xu Xuan said with her gaze on Xiao Rong, who immediately shook her head and responded, "I'd rather die than end the contract."

Xu Xuan shrugged with a slight smile on her face.

"Anyway, is that all you wanted to speak with me about?" she turned to look at Su Yang, almost as if she knew he wanted something else from her.

Su Yang smiled and said, "I would actually like to purchase some treasures from you."

"You?" Xu Xuan suddenly chuckled, "Su Yang, even if you had everything you did in the past, you still wouldn't be able to afford whatever I have to offer."

"What kind of nonsense is that? I may not have been the wealthiest out there, but I definitely had enough to purchase from the Autumn Phantom Manor," he quickly rebuked.

"Is that so? Then what do you want to purchase from me?"

"What do you have in stock that will boost Yang Qi?"

Hearing his inquiry, Xu Xuan immediately pulled out a piece of blank scroll from her storage ring and handed it to him.

The moment Su Yang touched the blank scroll, words began to materialize on it, forming a list of items that matched his desired specifications, almost as if the scroll had the ability to read his mind.

"There's less than I anticipated here," Su Yang mumbled after glancing at the list.

"Hmph." Xu Xuan merely snorted at his words.

Unbeknownst to Su Yang, Xu Xuan would deliberately acquire treasures that benefit Yang Qi just for her, but after his death, she no longer had a reason to do so, hence the lack of stock at this moment.

After taking a moment to read through the list of nine items, Su Yang read two of them out loud, "The Primordial Phoenix Heart and the Incandescent Dragon's Essence."

Xu Xuan's eyes widened with shock upon hearing Su Yang mention those names. Not only were these the two most valuable treasures in her possession, but they were also compatible with each other, capable of amplifying each other's effects significantly, thus increasing the risks for the consumer.

"Don't tell me you're going to consume them in your current state? That's suicide!" Xu Xuan exclaimed with a worried look on her face.

Su Yang smiled and said, "Don't worry, even I am not that reckless. I am just preparing for the future."

Xu Xuan looked a little more relieved after hearing that he wouldn't be consuming them any time soon. However, she still frowned and said, "And how are you going to pay for them?"

"With my body?" Su Yang responded in a joking tone.

"..."

Seeing the annoyed look on Xu Xuan's face, Su Yang quickly said, "You're still not good with jokes, huh?"

"Not when it comes to my business, no."

Su Yang pondered for a moment before giving his real offer, "You remember that thing you've always pestered me about selling to you? Would you accept that?"

Xu Xuan wore a surprised expression on her face, and she asked, "You're actually willing to part with that thing? You'd rather die than part with that thing before. What changed?"

"Many things…" he responded with a slight smile.

Xu Xuan pondered seriously for a few moments before responding to his offer. "Even if it's that thing, it would only cover the cost of the Primordial Phoenix Heart. However, I'll give you a special discount for helping me reunite with my sister."

"In addition to that thing, you'll also give me your Family Seal."

"What…?" Su Yang's eyes widened with shock after hearing such an unexpected offer.

"I think I misheard you. Can you repeat that again?" he said, his face filled with disbelief.

Xu Xuan suddenly approached him and grabbed his ear, pulling it toward her lips before she repeated in a passionate voice, "Give. Me. Your. Family. Seal!" frёewebηovel.cѳm

Su Yang's entire being trembled at her voice, which possessed a charm potent enough to captivate even gods. When Xu Xuan finally released his ear, and he could see her face again, he noticed it was considerably redder than just moments before.

"You're serious?" Su Yang still couldn't believe Xu Xuan was asking for his Family Seal.

Although they had their intimate moments before, it was never serious enough—at least, that's how Xu Xuan made it feel.

There was always a thin layer of barrier between them, one that prevented their relationship from advancing past casual dual cultivation partners.

"That wasn't the reaction I was expecting. Don't tell me you don't have any feelings for me?" Xu Xuan wore a disappointed look on her face.

"That's not it. From our interactions, you never struck me as someone drawn to the idea of having a family."

"Seriously? You couldn't tell from those little ones I'd adopted that I am the family type?"

Su Yang chuckled, "They appeared more like your minions than family…"

Xu Xuan narrowed her eyes at him and mumbled, "So you don't want to…?"

"It's not that I don't want to, but the idea of exchanging my Family Seal for—"

"Jeez, that was just a joke." Xu Xuan suddenly interrupted. "That thing I wanted is already more than enough to pay for my two treasures."

Su Yang's eyes widened with surprise.

"What? You think you're the only one who's changed after two thousand years?"

Before Su Yang could respond, she continued, "I…I have loved you ever since the day you saved me. If it weren't for you, I wouldn't be here today. I didn't say anything back then because I was content with what I already had, and I was waiting for you to recognize me, but alas, not only did you not recognize me after so long, but you even died."

When Su Yang saw tears appearing at the edge of Xu Xuan's eyes, he felt a squeezing sensation in his heart.

"Sorry…"

"It's fine. And to be fair to you, I never really gave you any hints, so I am also at fault." Xu Xuan shook her head.

chapters.title: Chapter 1086 Responding To Xu Xuan’S Feelings
chapters.body:
Chapter 1086 Responding To Xu Xuan’S Feelings

Chapter 1086 Responding to Xu Xuan's Feelings

"So… what is your answer, Su Yang?" Xu Xuan glared at him with a serious expression.

Su Yang's face also became serious, and after a moment of silence, he gave her a response.

He suddenly held her chin with his hand and leaned forward, giving her a passionate kiss on the lips.

A few moments later, Su Yang leaned back and smiled, "What do you think of my answer?" Xu Xuan licked her lips before grabbing his head and pulling him back for more.

The two of them spent the next several minutes sharing saliva. In the midst of their kissing, Xu Xuan began undressing, revealing her bountiful and mouthwatering figure.

Xu Xuan's physique was the complete opposite of Xiao Rong, who had a petite frame and small breasts.

Xu Xuan had long, slender legs, large breasts, snow-white skin, and an unbelievable waist. Her body was so perfect that even the Heavens would have difficulty crafting it.

"You want to do it right now?" Su Yang asked, seeming surprised by it.

"If not now, when?"

Su Yang's gaze shifted from her to Xiao Rong, who was silently staring at them from only several feet away.

Xu Xuan realized what he was worried about and chuckled, "Since when were you the type to mind being watched? You'd cultivate on the public street if you had the opportunity."

"I was actually thinking you would mind," he said.

Xu Xuan turned to look at Xiao Rong and smiled provocatively, "No, I want her to watch me."

Unbeknownst to Su Yang, a deep-seated rivalry simmered between Xu Xuan and Xiao Rong, which began after they went their separate ways.

Xiao Rong frowned, yet she refrained from intervening. This wasn't her first time observing Su Yang in cultivation with another, but the fact that his partner this time was her twin sister stirred within her a peculiar sensation she had never before experienced.

Seeing that Xu Xuan had no issue with Xiao Rong being there, Su Yang retrieved a mattress and placed it beside them.

Xu Xuan chuckled upon seeing this and said, "This reminds me of the first time we cultivated together. At that time, you also pulled out a mattress from out of nowhere."

"I remember. We did it in a location similar to this."

"The Overgrown Jade Forest."

They continued kissing a moment later.

Once they were both naked, Su Yang rubbed his stiff rod between the slippery slit between Xu Xuan's legs.

"Your body may be younger, but that sword of yours is just like I remember." Xu Xuan smiled at this detail. "Is this what it would've been like if we had cultivated during our first encounter?"

"If I hadn't dedicated all of my love to a single woman, then perhaps…" Su Yang said.

"Oh, right. You didn't start your deviant path until much later."

"Deviant? I'll show you deviant." Su Yang smiled as he suddenly shoved his entire dragon into Xu Xuan's cave without warning.

"Ahh~!" Xu Xuan released a loud moan, her expression immediately turning vulgar from the pleasure.

'I thought I would never be able to feel this sensation again after your death. Thank you for coming back, Su Yang…' Xu Xuan cried inwardly as her breasts bounced up and down from the impact of Su Yang knocking on the end of her cave.

After pounding Xu Xuan's cave for several hours straight, Su Yang released his Yang Qi into her body, but he didn't imprint his Family Seal on her yet.

After unplugging his rod from her cave, Su Yang flipped her body around and plunged his rod into her rear end.

"Ahh?!" Xu Xuan released a surprised moan.

"W-what is this?! You've never touched my butt before!" Xu Xuan exclaimed.

"I figured you would like it since you're Xiao Rong's twin sister." Su Yang chuckled. "Judging by your expression, I guess it's safe to assume you love it?"

"Y-you deviant!" she cursed at him.

However, she didn't tell him to stop, nor did she even attempt to stop. As a matter of fact, she was even rocking her body back and forth, matching Su Yang's movement and rhythm.

"..."

Xiao Rong stared at them with an envious gaze, her petite body burning with passionate urges.

Her body was also becoming more fidgety as time passed.

Time passed in the blink of an eye, and before they realized it, they had been cultivating for an entire week straight.

Unfortunately, Su Yang had to end their cultivation soon, as he had to enter the Fiery Yang Cavern soon.

After releasing his Yang Qi into her little sister one last time, Su Yang imprinted his Family Seal onto Xu Xuan's body.

"Hm? You're done already?" Xu Xuan asked after seeing the Family Seal.

"Regrettably. I have to return to the Boundless Yin Yang Sect soon," he sighed.

"Are you sure it's not because you're out of energy and you're too ashamed to admit it?" Xu Xuan said with a teasing voice.

"Even if that's the case, it'd be due to my lack of cultivation."

"Anyway, let me tell you the family rules before I activate the seal."

"Unless you've changed the rules, I already know it, and I accept. You're the only one I have ever and would ever allow to touch my body," she said.

Su Yang nodded and activated the Family Seal with his blood the next moment.

The instant Su Yang activated Xu Xuan's Family Seal, Luo Ziyi, and the others with Su Yang's active Family Seal sensed a new member.

"Welcome to the family, Xu Xuan." Su Yang said to her with a warm smile.

"You have no idea how long I've waited for this moment…" she muttered with somewhat teary eyes.
