"So, are you willing to swear on your soul that you'll quit being a dual cultivator if I become the Yang Qi King?" Su Yang repeated, pressuring the Inner Court disciple again.

The Inner Court disciple clenched his fists and wore an enraged expression on his face.

"What? You can't do it? Don't make such bold statements if you have no plan to follow through. You'll only be embarrassing yourself." Su Yang shook his head.

"Don't look down on me!" The Inner Court disciple suddenly exploded.

He glanced at the jade tablet and smiled after seeing a particular name.

"You want me to swear an oath? I'll do it because I am confident you won't win!" The Inner Court disciple swore upon his soul that he would quit being a dual cultivator if Su Yang won the Yang Qi King. His actions surprised and earned the admiration of the other disciples. Even if they were confident Su Yang wouldn't win, they still didn't dare to swear an oath so casually.

"There! Are you happy?!" The Inner Court disciple looked at Su Yang with a smug face.

Su Yang smiled, "Why would I be happy? I never cared for it in the first place."

"You bastard!"

Just as the Inner Court disciple raised his hand, a powerful presence appeared on the island, attracting everyone's attention.

The disciples immediately bowed to this individual after recognizing his identity.

"We greet the Vice Sect Leader!"

This man was the Vice Sect Leader, Chen Yi. Su Yang narrowed his gaze at Chen Yi and smiled inwardly, 'So you're still here?'

Chen Yi sensed a weird gaze on him, causing him to instinctively tremble.

'What the hell was that?' Chen Yi frowned, feeling a little nostalgic for some reason.

Meanwhile, the disciples were wondering why the Vice Sect Leader would show up at this moment since he'd never shown up for the Yang Qi King before.

Chen Yi spoke a moment later, "You're all probably wondering why I am here. The results of this year's Yang Qi King were very unexpected, so I came here to assure you that the results are accurate and no mistakes have been made. We've also made sure there was no foul play."

The disciples were baffled by such words. What could have happened to the Yang Qi King for the Vice Sect Leader to personally come out to assure them that it was accurate?

The Inner Court disciple who swore an oath suddenly had an ominous feeling in his guts.

Chen Yi pointed at the jade tablet and commanded, "Reveal!"

The names on the jade tablet began swapping positions with each other, and those closer to first rank were at the top.

A few moments later, the names stopped moving. When the disciples saw the name at the very top, their eyes widened with shock and disbelief.

"Yang Qi King — Outer Court Disciple Xiao Yang!"

Su Yang's name stood above over six hundred names, most of them being Core Disciple and Inner Court disciples. The name right below his was a Core Disciple named Du Qing, a renowned Core Disciple who many believed would be the Yang Qi King.

"X-Xiao Yang?! How is that possible?!" The Inner Court disciple who swore an oath shouted out loud, shattering the silence. "There's no way! He must have cheated somehow!" Chen Yi glared at this disciple and spoke in a cold voice, "I believe I already told you that the results are accurate and no foul play has taken place. Are you challenging the sect's decision?"

The Inner Court disciple instantly fell silent, his complexion as pale as sheets. Since Su Yang became the Yang Qi King, he must fulfill his oath and quit being a dual cultivator, or he would risk incurring heaven's tribulation.

"See? I told you I'd win and become the Yang Qi King." Su Yang's voice suddenly resounded, causing heads to shift in his direction.

With his arm around Lin Xinyi's waist, Su Yang continued speaking to her, "I'll become an Inner Court disciple next week and a Core Disciple soon after that. Do you believe me, my darling?"

Lin Xinyi nodded with a rosy face.

"Although it's not much of an achievement, let's celebrate tonight. You're on the verge of another breakthrough, after all."

Su Yang's words left everyone speechless. The men felt like they were slapped in the face by his accomplishment, and the women stared at Lin Xinyi, their eyes green with envy.

chapters.title: Chapter 1105 Du Qing
chapters.body:
Chapter 1105 Du Qing

Chapter 1105 Du Qing

After hearing Su Yang's words, the disciples realized what caused Lin Xinyi's cultivation to skyrocket.

'It was his Yang Qi!'

'Are you telling me that Lin Xinyi went up seven levels in less than a month after cultivating with him?!'

'Is this the real reason why Disciple Xiao was given special admission into the sect? Because of his Yang Qi?'

Many of the female disciples there were kicking themselves after realizing the opportunity they missed. Even if they wanted to be Su Yang's partner now, they'd never beat a beauty like Lin Xinyi.

However, those female disciples who had cultivated with Su Yang and tasted his Yang Qi were bewildered. Since they had experienced his Yang Qi, they knew he only had slightly above-average Yang Qi not long ago. Yet, he'd somehow managed to refine his Yang Qi to the level of becoming the Yang Qi King. In their eyes, this achievement was more impressive than Lin Xinyi's cultivation speed.

Luo Li was also there with the crowd, and she was staring at Su Yang with flickering eyes.

According to Elder Yao, the sect summoned Su Yang shortly after he submitted his Yang Qi because they suspected the Yang Qi he submitted didn't belong to him.

Then, they had him resubmit his Yang Qi under the supervision of several female Sect Elders because he refused the presence of men when he released his Yang Qi.

In the end, Su Yang produced the same quality of Yang Qi, leaving no room for doubt, and the sect had to accept Su Yang's submission, regardless of the chaos it might cause.

"It's a pity, ain't it?" Su Yang suddenly spoke out loud, his gaze directed at the Inner Court disciple who swore an oath.

"Looks like you'll have to leave this sect today," Su Yang continued.

The Inner Court disciple trembled, his face fuming with anger and embarrassment. Eventually, he coughed up a mouthful of blood and collapsed on the ground.

Su Yang looked at his unconscious body and shook his head.

"This is what happens when you speak without thinking. Oh well. Life as an ordinary cultivator isn't too bad, either. At least he can still embrace women."

As long as one doesn't refine Yang Qi or Yin Qi, they wouldn't be considered a dual cultivator. Therefore, giving up dual cultivation didn't mean giving up sex.

Su Yang no longer paid attention to the Inner Court disciple. Whether the disciple followed through with the oath or not was not his issue, either. "Disciple Xiao Yang, visit the distribution hall to receive your reward later," said Chen Yi before flying away.

Once it was just the disciples, the female disciples rushed over to Su Yang, surrounding him like a pack of hungry kittens.

"Disciple Xiao! Let's cultivate!"

"Wanna be partners, Disciple Xiao? I'll dump mine for you!"

"Brother Xiao, you're so handsome!"

"I won't ask you to give up your current partner. Can you take me as your second partner?"

All of these female disciples already had partners, but they didn't care. Su Yang's ordinary appearance also meant nothing if he could produce such high-quality Yang Qi.

"Sorry, but I am not looking for any new partners right now." Su Yang calmly rejected their advances.

However, the female disciples were unrelenting and continued to pressure him.

"Get out of my way!" A loud and haughty voice suddenly boomed, startling everyone.

After realizing who had just spoken, the female disciples around Su Yang backed away and made a path for that individual.

A handsome young man walked the path and approached Su Yang.

Su Yang didn't recognize the disciple's face, but he immediately recognized the robes the disciple wore as those belonging to the Core Disciples.

"I am Du Qing." The Core Disciple stopped in front of Su Yang and introduced himself.

"…"

Su Yang didn't immediately respond. He turned to look at the jade tablet and smiled, "Oh, you're the guy right below me in the ranking. How can I help you?"

Instead of getting angry, Du Qing laughed with a handsome smile, "You're exactly as the rumors portray."

After a slight pause, he continued, "A disrespectful little cunt."

The smile on Du Qing's face disappeared, replaced with a look of disdain.

"I don't know how you managed to become the Yang Qi King, but don't get ahead of yourself."

"You don't know how? I thought the Yang Qi King was a very straightforward competition. If you can't even comprehend how I won, allow me to explain. I won because my Yang Qi is superior."

Although Su Yang didn't directly say it, his words implied Du Qing was stupid for being unable to comprehend the competition.

"Hmph. I'll give you some leeway since you're still a pitiful Outer Court disciple, but the moment you become an Inner Court disciple, I will give you a personal visit."

Su Yang smiled and said, "There's no need to wait. I am going to become an Inner Court disciple next week, so you might as well say what you want to say now. I might not have the time to entertain you later, after all."

Du Qing's eyebrows trembled at Su Yang's audacity. He couldn't believe an Outer Court disciple like Su Yang existed.

However, he didn't fall for Su Yang's provocation and said, "I would love to, but my good friend, Junior apprentice-brother Yun, has already made arrangements with you. However, if you somehow manage to survive in two months, I'll come give you another visit."

Without letting Su Yang retort, Du Qing turned around while flicking his sleeves and flew away.

"I'll see you in two months, then." Su Yang muttered with a cold smile on his face.

He turned to look at Lin Xinyi and said, "Let's return, too."

She nodded, and the two of them left the scene.

News of Su Yang becoming the first Outer Court disciple to become the Yang Qi King quickly spread throughout the sect like wildfire, shocking everyone who heard it.

chapters.title: Chapter 1106 Taking The Inner Court Disciple Assessment
chapters.body:
Chapter 1106 Taking The Inner Court Disciple Assessment

Chapter 1106 Taking the Inner Court Disciple Assessment

"Did you hear? An Outer Court disciple won this year's Yang Qi King."

"I heard! I heard! It's the same disciple who doesn't put Core Disciples into his eyes, right?"

"Yeah. I can't fathom how he managed to win. And the sect assured that he didn't cheat. Even the Vice Sect Leader came out and said so himself."

The entire sect, from the Outer Court to Center Court, was talking about the Yang Qi King results.

After learning that Su Yang had won the competition, Chun Hua decided to give him a visit.

However, when she arrived at the Outcast Peak, it was filled to the brim with female Outer Court disciples.

The Outcast Peak had never experienced such a crowd, and they were all standing outside Su Yang's living quarters.

"Wow, he's gotten really popular. I guess it's not that surprising since he's the Yang Qi King." Chun Hua chuckled to herself at the sight.

"Excuse me! Coming through!" Chun Hua had to put in good effort to push through the crowd.

"Hey! Who's pushing?!"

"Can't you see there's a line?!"

However, once the Outer Court disciples realized she was an Inner Court disciple, they stopped shouting and even made way for her.

There were several Inner Court disciples there besides Chun Hua, and they were all gathered at the front, closest to Su Yang's living quarters, for a reason.

Once she reached the front, her fellow disciples looked at her and smiled, "Junior sister Chun, you're also here to cultivate with Disciple Xiao?"

"No, I am just here to congratulate him."

"Isn't that basically the same thing?" They chuckled.

A few moments later, the door to Su Yang's building opened. The disciples expected Mei Ying or Mei Xing to come out like usual, but the one who came out was unexpectedly Su Yang.

Su Yang and Chun Hua exchanged glances without greeting each other to hide the fact they knew each other.

"Junior apprentice-brother Xiao. I am Chun Hua, and I came here to offer you my respects. No Outer Court disciple has ever become the Yang Qi King."

Su Yang's appearance surprised the disciples there for a brief second, allowing Chun Hua to speak without any interference.

"Thank you, Senior apprentice-sister Chun." Su Yang acknowledged her with a handsome smile and a slight bow.

"You seem to be heading somewhere. Are you going to take the Inner Court disciple assessment now?" Chun Hua asked.

"Yes, I am. I made an appointment before the Yang Qi King concluded." "In other words, you knew you'd become the Yang Qi King?" Chun Hua smiled.

"Isn't that natural?" Su Yang smiled back.

He looked at the dumbfounded disciples and continued, "Therefore, I won't have the time to accompany you. Sorry."

"It's okay. We understand that your promotion is more important."

"We should be the ones apologizing for bothering you, Senior apprentice-brother Xiao."

"Yeah. Sorry, Senior apprentice-brother."

The disciples there started addressing Su Yang as their senior despite being in the sect for much longer than him.

Not only was he about to become an Inner Court disciple, but he was also the Yang Qi King, a title even Inner Court disciples must respect.

"Can I come with you? I want to watch the moment you become an Inner Court disciple." Chun Hua suddenly requested.

"I don't mind." Su Yang nodded.

"Can I also come?!" Another disciple asked.

"Me too!"

Su Yang then said, "Anyone who wants to come, I have no reason to stop you."

"I'll come!"

"I can't wait to see Senior apprentice-brother Xiao in his Inner Court uniform!"

"Where's your partner? She's not coming?" One of the disciples suddenly asked.

"She fell asleep from exhaustion and probably won't wake up anytime soon," he calmly responded.

The disciples there showed envious expressions on her faces after hearing this.

Su Yang left the Outcast Peak shortly after and went to take the assessment. He was followed by a hundred Outer Court disciples and a dozen Inner Court disciples. His group attracted the attention of those nearby. They wondered where Su Yang was taking such a large group of female disciples and decided to follow him to find out.

By the time Su Yang reached his destination, the group following him had grown to almost 300 disciples, three times the original amount.

The Boundless Yin Yang Sect had an area specifically for the Inner Court assessment, and it was an entire floating island that resembled the wilderness.

Su Yang landed before the only building on that island and entered it.

There was a beautiful woman sitting behind a desk inside, who appeared to be sleeping at first but opened her eyes once Su Yang entered the building.

"Disciple Xiao Yang, correct?" she inquired in a nonchalant tone, almost as if she wasn't interested at all.

"Indeed, you are correct."

"The Inner Court disciple assessment will be split into three parts. First, you must find an object we've hidden somewhere on this island within seven days." The Sect Elder retrieved a golden bead that emitted a faint glow and showed it to him.

"There will be spiritual beasts between the Sovereign Spirit Realm and the Divine Spirit Realm roaming on the island. For the second part of the assessment, you'll need to hunt either one Divine Spirit Realm spiritual beast or ten Sovereign Spirit Realm spiritual beasts. This must also be done within seven days."

"You don't need to know the final part for now. I will tell you once you pass the first two. If you fail this assessment, you will not be able to take it again for another four years. Do you have any questions?"

"No, I do not." Su Yang answered.

This wasn't his first time taking the assessment, after all.

"Then your time will begin once you step outside this building," said the Sect Elder.

Without waiting around, Su Yang immediately left the building and flew straight into the wilderness.

The island wasn't very big and could be explored within three days. However, the spiritual beasts there made traversing it much more difficult and dangerous.

Of course, this assessment was akin to a joke to someone like Su Yang. Not only was his cultivation overqualified, but he also knew the locations of all the hiding spots for the golden bead. He could easily complete this assessment in a few hours, much less seven days.

chapters.title: Chapter 1107 Taking The Inner Court Disciple Assessment(2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 1107 Taking The Inner Court Disciple Assessment(2)

Chapter 1107 Taking the Inner Court Disciple Assessment(2)

Once Su Yang entered the island, Chun Hua and the other disciples remained outside to watch as spectators. Since they weren't participating in the assessment, none of them could step foot inside the island. Moreover, there was a massive formation around the island that blocked all kinds of communications, so nobody could contact Su Yang while he was taking the assessment and vice-versa. This was done to prevent cheating.

"Good luck, Senior apprentice-brother Xiao!"

"You can do it!"

The female disciples cheered for him even though they knew their voices wouldn't ever reach him.

"How long do you think it'll take him to pass these two trials—if he even passes?" The male disciples who followed them began muttering to each other.

"I heard he recently entered the Divine Spirit Realm. He probably won't have much trouble defeating the spiritual beasts, but if he's unlucky, he might not find the golden bead. A lot of disciples failed in the same manner, after all."

"I hope he doesn't find the golden bead and fails the assessment. It'd be incredibly entertaining to see how he'll talk his way out of the shame."

However, Su Yang managed to find the golden bead not even fifteen minutes later, to the dismay of these male disciples.

"That lucky fucker! He found the bead so quickly!"

"Is it just me, or did it look like he went directly to its location? It must've been a coincidence, right?"

"The beads are placed randomly, so there's no way for him to know its location beforehand!"

Unbeknownst to these disciples, while the bead would indeed be placed in a random location, the locations themselves were not chosen randomly. Each spot was carefully selected, and there were exactly 690 different possible locations.

Moreover, the golden bead emitted a faint and subtle aura that Su Yang could detect even with his eyes closed.

After acquiring the golden bead, Su Yang immediately went to find a Divine Spirit Realm spiritual beast to hunt.

He encountered one about ten minutes later. Without even stopping to prepare for battle, Su Yang flew straight at the spiritual beast.

Sha!

The spiritual beast died from a single sword swing. After killing the spiritual beast, Su Yang decapitated it and stowed away its head for proof later.

In less than half an hour, Su Yang had completed the first two trials, leaving the onlookers speechless.

"How long did that take him?! This must be a record!"

"My heavens! Half an hour! No, it's not even half an hour!"

"What kind of dogshit luck does he have?!"

"Calm down… he still has one more trial to pass before he can become an Inner Court disciple officially," one of the male disciples said.

"Who the hell even invited you guys? You're ruining the mood!" The female disciples started cursing at them.

"There's no rule in the sect stating we must be invited to watch someone participate in the Inner Court disciple assessment." They rebuked.

"That's right! If you don't like it, you can leave!"

"What did you say?!"

Chun Hua shook her head at the Outer Court disciples' bickering.

Meanwhile, Su Yang returned to the building with the sect elder.

"What? Are you giving up already? It hasn't even been half an hour since you started." The Sect Elder spoke in a mocking tone. She truly believed that Su Yang wanted to give up since there was no way he'd completed the two trials in half an hour.

However, Su Yang retrieved the decapitated head of the Divine Spirit Realm he hunted, as well as the golden bead, and placed them before the Sect Elder.

"..."

The Sect Elder nearly fell off her chair after seeing the two objects.

"I-impossible! You collected the golden bead and killed a Divine Spirit Realm spiritual beast in less than half an hour?!" she exclaimed in disbelief.

Even a Sect Elder would not be able to achieve such a ridiculously fast time, much less an Outer Court disciple.

"What can I say besides that I got really lucky." Su Yang casually shrugged.

"W-wait a moment! I need to verify with the others first!" The Sect Elder quickly retrieved a communication jade slip and began talking into it.

Su Yang wasn't alone on the island during the trial. There were several Sect Elders spectating and verifying his every movement from the shadows. Naturally, Su Yang was aware of their presence, but he acted like he didn't.

A few minutes later, after receiving confirmation from all of the verifiers that Su Yang had really completed the two tasks without cheating, the Sect Elder turned to look at Su Yang with a somewhat displeased expression.

"The third trial should be testing the quality of my Yang Qi to see if I qualify. I am already the Yang Qi King, so does that mean I automatically pass the third trial?" Su Yang suddenly inquired,

The Sect Elder frowned and sneered, "Where did you learn such outdated information? That might have been the case several thousand years ago, but things are different now."

"Seriously?" Su Yang's eyes widened with surprise.

"For the third trial, you'll need to cultivate with a Pleasure Evaluation Doll and acquire a passable grade."

"..."

Su Yang was speechless. Pleasure Evaluation Dolls are used to test a dual cultivator's techniques on a technical level. They're essentially sex dolls with the function to perfectly analyze someone's level of skills and grade their ability to satisfy their partners.

However, the Pleasure Evaluation Dolls used to be reserved for the Core Disciple assessment, so it baffled Su Yang to see it being used for the Inner Court assessment.

'I guess the Boundless Yin Yang Sect had to step it up to not fall behind their competition…' Su Yang sighed inwardly.

Dual cultivation sects began gaining popularity as Su Yang's influence grew. The Boundless Yin Yang Sect, once unrivaled, now faced significant competition from numerous powerful dual cultivation sects that had emerged around the Four Divine Heavens over time. As a result, the Boundless Yin Yang Sect had to increase their standards.

chapters.title: Chapter 1108 Pleasure Evaluation Doll
chapters.body:
Chapter 1108 Pleasure Evaluation Doll

Chapter 1108 Pleasure Evaluation Doll

"You can enter that room whenever you are ready." The Sect Elder pointed at the door behind her.

Su Yang asked, "What grade do I need to achieve to pass the assessment? Level two satisfactory-fulfillment?"

The Sect Elder instantly sneered, "Level two satisfactory-fulfillment? Only a handful of Core Disciples are able to reach that level, and you think we'd have such a ridiculous requirement for the Inner Court disciple assessment?"

The Pleasure Evaluation Doll had seven tiers of grades: no-fulfillment, low-fulfillment, average-fulfillment, satisfactory-fulfillment, great-fulfillment, utmost-fulfillment, and lastly, beyond-fulfillment.

There were also three levels of difficulty, from level one to three. Level one was meant for young dual cultivators such as the disciples. Level two was meant for those with more experience, like the sect elders. As for level three, only highly experienced dual cultivators like the Boundless Yin Yang Sect's Sect Leader could reach that level.

In his past days as a disciple, the requirement to become a Core Disciple was only level one utmost-fulfillment.

"Level one great-fulfillment. You'll need to attain that grade to pass the assessment."

'I guess their standard didn't improve that much.' Su Yang thought to himself.

"I understand. Then I will be right back."

Su Yang entered the room a few moments later. Inside, a Pleasure Evaluation Doll was lying on a king-sized bed. It was a faceless and featureless doll that only resembled a female's figure.

Su Yang calmly approached the doll and caressed its face. The next moment, it began to transform, turning into a beautiful woman who could easily be mistaken as a real human. Moreover, the doll bore an uncanny resemblance to the Sect Elder outside. Naturally, this was intentional.

The Pleasure Evaluation Doll has the function to alter its face and features according to the user's desire. However, this required the user to have an accurate understanding of the individual they wish to create.

If one tries to create a doll with insufficient information, the Pleasure Evaluation Doll will come out looking weird and incomplete. This is why most people who use the Pleasure Evaluation Doll use the appearance of their own partners.

However, despite their short encounter and few words, Su Yang had a complete understanding of the Sect Elder, from her personality to the size of her features. He even knew how the Sect Elder would act if they were to cultivate together. This was one of many abilities he'd gained from cultivating with countless women from all walks of life.

The Pleasure Evaluation Doll gave Su Yang a seducing look, but Su Yang remained calm, almost nonchalant.

"Hmph. They really think I am stupid, huh?" Su Yang noticed the Pleasure Evaluation Doll had been set to level two instead of level one. The chances of this being a mistake were slim to none, meaning someone had purposefully tried to sabotage him.

Unfortunately for the culprit, they were up against Su Yang, who could acquire a beyond-fulfillment grade even from level three with ease.

He removed his clothes and approached the bed. The Pleasure Evaluation Doll's eyes widened slightly after seeing Su Yang's perfect rod.

Ding!

"Average-fulfillment."

A generic feminine voice resounded.

Just the sight of Su Yang's majestic sword was enough to acquire the grade average-fulfillment. If the Sect Elder saw this, she would've questioned the existence of heaven.

Su Yang ignored the grading and proceeded to caress the doll's body. The doll not only examined the strength of his touch, but also where he was touching and its movements as a whole. From its speed to how natural it felt—the Pleasure Evaluation Doll examined and analyzed everything.

Another flaw of the doll was its inability to moan.

After spending several minutes caressing the doll, Su Yang inserted his sword into it and began thrusting. However, he made sure not to go overboard and only satisfied the doll enough to pass.

Just like previously, the doll evaluated all of Su Yang's movements, from the strength of his thrusts to how deep he went to its angle.

Ten minutes later, the Sect Elder noticed the door opening with Su Yang calmly walking out a moment later.

"I have finished," he said.

"Ten minutes? Who nonsense…" The Sect Elder approached the room with a slight frown on her face.

"T-this is?! What the hell is this?!"

The Sect Elder screamed so hard her heart nearly jumped out of her throat.

Inside the room, she could see herself lying on the bed, looking like a broken doll. Moreover, there was Yang Qi all over her body, looking like someone spilled several gallons of milk on her.

Furthermore, it was muttering the words 'great-fulfillment' non-stop.

Once the Sect Elder comprehended the situation, she turned to look at Su Yang with an angry frown.

"What is the meaning of this, Disciple Xiao?! How dare you use my appearance for the assessment?! Are you mocking me?!" she shouted while stabbing his chest with her sharp finger.

"Why would I mock you? I thought the Sect Elder was very beautiful and would help me pass the assessment, so I subconsciously imagined you when giving the doll an image. Also, you didn't say anything about not using your appearance."

Read new chapters at empire

"..."

The Sect Elder was left speechless by Su Yang's reasoning, even feeling a little flattered—not that she'd ever admit it.

"W-whatever! I will forgive you this time, but there will not be a next. Anyway, you'll know if you passed the assessment by tomorrow once we examine the doll."

"Thank you, Elder." Su Yang gave her a slight bow before leaving the building.

Meanwhile, the Sect Elder went to take a closer look at the doll.

"T-this! The difficulty was not set at level one but level two instead?! And he still got great-fulfillment?! Impossible!" she exclaimed in a shocked voice after realizing this.

Not daring to touch the doll, the Sect Elder quickly notified other Sect Elders to examine the doll to make sure no foul play was committed during the assessment. After all, the results were simply too hard to believe.

chapters.title: Chapter 1109 Unless I’M Screwing Their Partners...
chapters.body:
Chapter 1109 Unless I’M Screwing Their Partners...

Chapter 1109 Unless I’m Screwing Their Partners...

A dozen sect elders appeared in the room where Su Yang cultivated with the Pleasure Evaluation Doll shortly after the sect elder in charge notified them, even calling it an emergency.

"Heavens… what happened here?"

"Elder Leng, why does the Pleasure Evaluation Doll have your appearance?"

The first thing they noticed was the Pleasure Evaluation Doll's appearance.

"Don't ask me! That audacious Disciple Xiao used my appearance without my permission!" Elder Leng gritted her teeth in anger just at the mention of the doll's appearance.

"And I called all of you here to examine the authenticity of the assessment! Stop thinking about the useless stuff!"

The sect elders looked at each other with slight smiles, but they didn't continue the topic and started examining the Pleasure Evaluation Doll.

"W-what the? Am I seeing this right? Level two great-fulfillment?" The sect elders were greatly shocked by the result of Su Yang's assessment.

"There's no way a mere Outer Court disciple could achieve this level of dual cultivation skills! If it's real, he already stands at the top with other top Core Disciples, much less Inner Court disciples!"

"I share the same sentiment as Elder Guang."

None of the sect elders there believed for a second that Su Yang actually had the skills to achieve level two great-fulfillment.

"By the way, why is the Pleasure Evaluation Doll set to level two? This should've been an assessment for the Inner Court, no?" One of the sect elders suddenly questioned this oddity.

"I don't know. It could've been a mistake by the one who arranged the Pleasure Evaluation Doll."

"Who'd be that clumsy to make such a ridiculous mistake?"

"Then do you think someone tried to sabotage Disciple Xiao's assessment?"

"He's been a hot topic lately, and he's offended many Core Disciples with his recent statements. I wouldn't be surprised if someone tried to mess with him."

"Disciple Xiao claimed he'd become a Core Disciple in less than three months, right? If he failed this assessment, it'd make his ambitions impossible, so there is definitely a motive."

"Regardless of the motive, this is unacceptable. The audacity to mess with the sect's assessment! We need to find the culprit and deal with them accordingly!" Elder Chu, who was among the sect elders there, bellowed angrily. Her anger was not only fueled by her desire to protect Su Yang, but because someone had tried to sabotage another disciple's assessment, a crime punishable with expulsion.

The other sect elders there nodded in agreement. Regardless of their feelings for Su Yang and his recent drama, this incident was not something they could overlook, as it could set a bad precedent.

"Elder Leng, who was in charge of setting up this place?" Elder Chu questioned her, even suspecting her to be the culprit.

"I honestly don't know," she shook her head. "The place had already been prepared by the time I was summoned. I also didn't bother checking the doll since the thought of someone sabotaging the assessment never even crossed my mind."

Elder Leng's voice and expression appeared genuine, and Elder Chu lowered her suspicion, but she was not completely convinced just yet.

"What about the assessment's result?" Elder Leng asked a moment later. "If none of you believe Disciple Xiao could've achieved this result, what do you suggest we do? It's not like we can ignore his attempt to cheat the assessment because someone tried to sabotage him."

"If we're doubtful of his abilities, we can simply make him retake the assessment, and he'll have to do it with us watching, just like when he had to resubmit his Yang Qi King submission because everyone thought he was cheating." Elder Chu suggested.

"That's a good idea."

None of the sect elders refuted her logical and reasonable suggestion.

"Then it's decided. Summon Disciple Xiao for a re-assessment for the Pleasure Evaluation Doll." Your journey continues on empire

Meanwhile, after leaving the assessment area, Su Yang returned to the disciples waiting for him and said, "The assessment went pretty well."

"Only pretty well?! You breezed through the whole thing in less than an hour! This is a record that might never be broken again!"

The disciples were left speechless by his nonchalant demeanor, which was unbefitting of his accomplishment.

"So, are you an Inner Court disciple now?" Chun Hua asked him.

"No, the sect elder told me to wait a day for the results." Su Yang shook his head.

"A day? Why?" Chun Hua frowned.

The results are typically announced immediately after the assessment ends, as there was no reason to delay it.

"I think something was wrong with the Pleasure Evaluation Doll, and they need some time to examine it." Su Yang shrugged, pretending like he knew nothing.

"Well, it doesn't really matter since I definitely passed," he continued in a confident tone.

After chatting for a bit with the female disciples, Su Yang ignored the other disciples who weren't part of the original group and swiftly returned to his home.

Lin Xinyi was still asleep by the time he returned. However, Su Yang wouldn't remain home for long because Elder Chu showed up at his place to reveal the situation to him.

"Due to the sect elders' doubt, you'll have to repeat what you did for the Yang Qi King," she said.

"I see. Not surprised." Su Yang shrugged. He had, in fact, expected this outcome.

"What about you, Elder Chu? Do you also believe I had cheated?" Su Yang asked with a smile.

She narrowed her eyes at him. After a moment of silence, she sighed and said, "To be completely honest. Your skills may be good, but it's definitely nowhere near being able to achieve level two great-fulfillment."

"Is that so? Thanks for the honesty." Su Yang didn't appear disappointed or angry.

"So, when's the re-assessment?"

"Tomorrow."

"The witnesses will all be female sect elders, correct? Unless I'm screwing their partners, I don't need any male audiences."

Elder Chu's eyes and mouth widened with disbelief after hearing Su Yang's last few words, as it was completely unexpected and ridiculous.

"There's no need to look at me like that. It's a joke." Su Yang chuckled after seeing her reaction. "If I'm going to be cultivating, assessment or not, I'd prefer it if there were only females around me. That's all."

"How can you still joke in this situation?"

"Should I be worried instead? It's not like I cheated."

"..."

chapters.title: Chapter 1110 Complaining To The Sect Leader
chapters.body:
Chapter 1110 Complaining To The Sect Leader

Chapter 1110 Complaining to the Sect Leader

"Whatever. I don't care if you're joking or not. Just go to the same place you did your assessment today tomorrow at noon." Elder Chu said to him before leaving.

"I'll see you tomorrow, Elder Chu!" Su Yang waved goodbye to her as she left.

The playful expression on Su Yang's face disappeared the next moment.

"Hah… What am I doing?" he muttered in a low voice.

As Su Yang spent time in the Boundless Yin Yang Sect, memories of his days as a disciple in his previous life would surface, causing him to subconsciously slip back into his old habits—cheeky and a bit of a troublemaker, just as he had been in the past.

"Well, I guess a little fun here and there won't hurt."

He went home a moment later with a calm smile on his face.

The following day, Su Yang returned to the place he took the assessment yesterday. When he arrived, there were already a dozen sect elders waiting for him.

Over half of them were familiar faces since he met them during the Yang Qi King when he had to resubmit his Yang Qi.

"Are we going to do this every time I accomplish something slightly out of your expectations?" Su Yang asked them with a slight smile.

"…"

None of them could respond.

"In that case, we'll probably get to know each other very well by the time I become a Core Disciple," Su Yang continued.

"Enough yapping. Get inside the room already." Elder Leng ordered him.

Su Yang calmly entered the room with the sect elders. Once inside, the sect elders gathered by the wall, surrounding a bed that had a Pleasure Evaluation Doll prepared.

Su Yang didn't mind their presence and calmly walked to the bed.

"I will warn you right now. If you dare use my appearance again, I will kill you." Elder Leng said with a serious frown on her face.

"Is that so?" Su Yang casually responded before he gazed at the sect elders by the wall, as if scanning them one by one.

The sect elders trembled and quickly realized what he was trying to do.

"Don't you dare! You're not allowed to use any of our appearances!" They hastily shouted at him.

Su Yang looked at Elder Chu, who spoke with a bittersweet smile, "Don't you have a partner? Why aren't you using her appearance?"

"It doesn't feel right," shrugged.

"But you're fine with us…?" Elder Chu shook her head, unsure if she should laugh or cry.

"Forget it. I have another appearance in mind." Su Yang said as he caressed the doll's face.

As the doll began changing its appearance, the sect elders' eyes grew wider and wider, and jaws dropped to the ground.

"Y-yo-you! What do you think you are doing, using the Sect Leader's appearance?!" Elder Chu exclaimed in a terrified voice.

Indeed, Su Yang had decided to use the Boundless Yin Yang Sect's Sect Leader's appearance for this re-assessment.

"The audacity!"

"Blasphemy!"

The sect elders began angrily shouting at him.

However, while they were angry outside, they secretly admired how accurately Su Yang replicated the Sect Leader's appearance. It was almost as if he'd cultivated with her before.

'This guy has only met the Sect Leader once, and he can already replicate her appearance so perfectly… Does that mean our clothes mean nothing to him and that we're essentially always naked around him?' Elder Chu's body trembled at this thought.

The other sect elders also realized this, albeit a little later, and they subconsciously covered their breasts and little sister with their hands.

Seeing their actions, Su Yang showed a slight smile.

Experience tales at empire

He then said, "You guys are the ones branding me as a cheater, and this is the second time I have been wronged. So what if I use the Sect Leader's appearance? She's a beautiful woman and will help me achieve the results I want. If you refuse to give me this tiny leeway, I will complain directly to the Sect Leader."

"T-that's…" Elder Chu was speechless.

She turned to look at the other sect elders and began conversing with them through voice transmissions.

"He's not wrong. We're the ones putting him in a tough spot."

"So what?! If we allow him to use the Sect Leader's appearance and she finds out, we're all dead meat!"

"I don't think the Sect Leader would mind."

"What nonsense is that? Of course, she'd mind her appearance being used by an Outer Court disciple!"

"But if he complains to the Sect Leader, the whole sect will be flipped upside-down because she will find out about the sabotage."

"That's why we need to deal with it before she returns."

"No, we can't risk it. Let's just let him use the Sect Leader's appearance. She won't find out unless we snitch on ourselves.

After many minutes of back and forth, the sect elders eventually came to a decision.

"Okay, we'll let you use the Sect Leader's appearance, but you are not to utter a single word of this assessment after leaving this room." Elder Chu said.

"If we find out that you've opened your fat mouth, we'll all go after you, understand?"

"You'll go after me? That doesn't sound too bad, but I'll have to give up on that for now. Don't worry, I won't utter a word of what happened today to anyone."

"Then whenever you're ready."

Su Yang immediately began removing his clothes, revealing his majestic sword that was already standing upright.

The sect elders swallowed nervously after seeing Su Yang's supreme rod. They found themselves being mesmerized by it no matter how many times they have already seen a man's lower sword.

"Then I'll begin now."

Su Yang began caressing the doll all over her body, causing it to tremble in response.

This time, the Pleasure Evaluation Doll had been purposefully set to level two. This assessment was no longer about testing Su Yang's qualifications as an Inner Court disciple but to confirm his true dual cultivation abilities.

chapters.title: Chapter 1111 Promotion To Inner Court Disciple
chapters.body:
Chapter 1111 Promotion To Inner Court Disciple

Chapter 1111 Promotion to Inner Court Disciple

Not even a few minutes into Su Yang's re-assessment, the sect elders were baffled and mesmerized by Su Yang's incredible dual cultivation techniques.

'What flawless execution of dual cultivation techniques! The way he seamlessly changes positions and techniques feels so natural!' Elder Chu cried inwardly after seeing Su Yang's techniques.

When she tried to compare his current skills to the time when she first cultivated with him, the vast difference left her completely bewildered.

'How can someone improve their dual cultivation techniques this fast?! Even someone born to be a dual cultivator would not have such ridiculous progress!'

The other sect elders were not aware since they had never experienced Su Yang's technique from just several months ago. If they knew how much Su Yang had grown in such a short amount of time, they would all begin to doubt their own logic and understanding of this world.

It didn't take long for the sect elders in the room to begin fidgeting their bodies. If Su Yang looked at their faces, he'd be able to see them glaring at him with passionate gazes, and there was no doubt they'd be willing to spread their legs for him without any hesitation if he asked.

Yet, Su Yang focused on the Pleasure Evaluation Doll before him, completely ignoring the sect elders, acting as if they weren't even there.

'Fuck! Why is he so damn good?!' Elder Leng gritted her teeth and clenched her fists in an attempt to forget a certain image inside her head—the image of herself being covered in Su Yang's Yang Qi.

'Is this what he did to that doll—to me back then?!' Elder Leng subconsciously began imagining herself in the Pleasure Evaluation Doll's position right now.

The session didn't last long, and Su Yang only displayed his techniques for a short ten minutes. However, in that short time, he'd managed to make every single sect elder in the room burning with the desire to cultivate with him.

As for the Pleasure Evaluation Doll, it gave him a great-fulfillment grade.

"So, how'd I do?" Su Yang asked without looking at the sect elders as he calmly wore his robes.

"W-we need some time to examine the doll and discuss with each other…" Elder Chu said. "We will contact you later today…"

"Alright. Then I'll be taking my leave now."

Nobody stopped Su Yang as he left the building. The sect elders feared that if he stayed any longer, they'd be unable to control their desires and assault him.

Once Su Yang left, the sect elders looked at each other with an awkward atmosphere in the room.

"So… what now?" One of them asked.

"There's no way we can deny his abilities after witnessing it first-hand—no matter how hard it is to believe." Elder Chu said.

The sect elders looked at each other again, wondering if anyone was going to reject Su Yang's abilities. When nobody responded, Elder Chu continued speaking.

"If there are no objections, I will officially announce that Disciple Xiao Yang has passed the assessment and will be promoted to Inner Court disciple as of this moment."

"What should we do about the one who tried to sabotage his assessment?"

"There's nothing we can do for now since we have no evidence or hints of the culprit." Elder Chu shook her head.

The following day, Elder Chu went to Su Yang's living quarters and handed him a small storage bag containing everything he needed as an Inner Court disciple.

"Congratulations on becoming an Inner Court disciple, Disciple Xiao. I could've never imagined you'd be promoted so quickly after joining the sect. I knew you were special when I first laid my eyes on you." Elder Chu congratulated him.

"Thank you, Elder Chu. If you hadn't given me a chance, I wouldn't be here at all." Su Yang accepted the bag.

"If you want to thank me, there is a way. Now that you're an Inner Court disciple, you are allowed to cultivate with sect elders. Do you get what I am trying to say?" she spoke with a slight smile on her face.

Su Yang smiled back and said, "In that case, how about we celebrate my promotion with a cultivation session?"

"You sure know how to celebrate." Elder Chu chuckled as she followed Su Yang into his home.

Lin Xinyi was asleep inside her own room, as she had cultivated all night, so they used Su Yang's room to cultivate.

"Do to me what you did to the doll yesterday," said Elder Chu as she removed her clothes and walked to the bed.

Instead of removing his clothes, Su Yang changed to his new uniform.

He then approached the bed with his majestic dragon poking out of the gap between his legs.

"Let me help you first…" Elder Chu grabbed his rod when he approached the bed and pulled it toward her mouth.

She opened her mouth and swallowed as much as she could handle. Once comfortable, Elder Chu began rocking her head back and forth, filling the room with wet and slurping noises.

A few minutes later, Su Yang changed Elder Chu's position so he could savor her wet little sister without disturbing her actions, and they pleasured each other with their mouths.

Once Elder Chu was soaking wet and her body was tingly from pleasure, Su Yang unplugged his rod from her mouth and shoved it into her other, much tighter mouth.

"Ahhh~!" Elder Chu climaxed the moment Su Yang inserted his rod into her tight cave. She had been waiting for this moment since she watched his assessment yesterday, and this moment of fulfillment was enough to make her reach her climax.

However, Su Yang didn't stop to let her finish and began ramming his stiff rod against her cave, causing it to gush with Yin Qi.

"Ahn~!" Elder Chu's expression became wild from pleasure, and she even started moving her hips on her own.

'Not only did his dual cultivation techniques improve, but even his sword has become larger than before!' she cried inwardly as she noticed this detail once it was actually inside her body.

chapters.title: Chapter 1112 Lover’S Bridge
chapters.body:
Chapter 1112 Lover’S Bridge

Chapter 1112 Lover’s Bridge

Su Yang and Elder Chu cultivated with each other nonstop for half a day, with Elder Chu climaxing every few minutes.

By the time they were done, Elder Chu resembled the Pleasure Evaluation Doll but with more satisfaction on her face, and her body was twitching nonstop.

"What are your plans now that you are an Inner Court disciple? Do you really intend on becoming a Core Disciple within two months?" Elder Chu asked him as she used her slender finger to wipe Su Yang's Yang Qi on her body before putting it inside her mouth to savor it.

"Of course. Do you have any tips?" Su Yang responded with a smile.

"You're asking me for tips at this point?" She looked at him with wide eyes.

"It's never too late to ask for help."

Elder Chu fell silent to ponder.

"There is only one way to become a Core Disciple—by passing the assessment. However, unlike the Inner Court Disciple assessment, you cannot take the Core Disciple assessment as you please. You have to be chosen for the assessment."

"Is that so? How does the sect choose who to assess?" Su Yang asked despite already knowing the answer.

"There are two methods. One, you earn enough contributions through sect missions and get a good ranking in competitions. The second method is to get at least six sect elders or the Sect Leader herself to endorse you."

"So I need at least five more sect elders, huh?" Su Yang looked at Elder Chu with a suggestive gaze.

Elder Chu gently smacked his buttocks and said, "You think you can earn my endorsement so easily? You'll need to please me for at least a few more months!"

"You know I don't have that much time. If you don't endorse me and I fail to become a Core Disciple before the time limit, I'll have to leave this sect. Are you okay with that?"

"And whose fault do you think it is that you're in this situation?" Elder Chu sneered.

Su Yang shook his head with a bittersweet smile. However, he never intended to get the sect elders' endorsement. After all, he had the Sect Leader. Moreover, there were other ways to become a Core Disciple.

"Then I won't bother you any longer, Elder Chu. You can leave whenever you are ready. I'll clean up when I come back."

Su Yang began putting on his clothes.

"Where are you going?" she inquired with an interested face.

"I only have so much time to become a Core Disciple, you know? And I have already wasted half a day here to cultivate with you."

"You dare call our cultivation a waste of time? Are you asking for a beating?" She frowned.

He shrugged and said, "Anything that doesn't help me get closer to my promotion as a Core Disciple is a waste of time. After all, my life depends on it."

Elder Chu couldn't argue with his logic.

"Fine, I will endorse you. I was just teasing you just now."

Su Yang nodded with a smile, "Thank you, Elder Chu. I knew I could count on you."

He didn't bother mentioning that he didn't need it.

'But it's still good to have a backup plan just in case the others don't work out.' Su Yang thought to himself.

"By the way, do you intend on moving out of this place? You can move to the Inner Court now, you know." Elder Chu asked him as she cleaned herself in the bathroom.

"No, I have no such plans. I like the quiet atmosphere around here, and there aren't many disciples wandering around."

"You sure? This place has a bad reputation."

"That kind of thing doesn't bother me in the slightest." Su Yang responded as he cleaned the bedroom.

"If you insist."

"By the way, is the Sect Leader available? I'd like to speak with her," he suddenly asked.

"No, she went somewhere a while ago."

"Oh? Where to?"

"No clue."

"Then do you know when she'll be back?"

"Also no clue."

"When did she leave?"

"Sometime after she examined your Yang—" Elder Chu abruptly halted her sentence, as she'd accidentally spewed a secret that wasn't meant to be revealed.

"Oh? During the Yang Qi King, or before that—like when I shared some of my friend's Yang Qi."

"…" Elder Chu began sweating, afraid that it might offend him.

"Relax, I figured you'd do something like that, anyway."

Elder Chu sighed, "Yes, the Sect Leader examined your… your friend's Yang Qi, and she left shortly afterward."

"I see. Thank you for letting me know." Su Yang said with a profound smile on his face.

Sometime later, Su Yang left his living quarters and made his way to a certain location within the Inner Court.

However, as he approached his destination, he noticed a silhouette standing outside.

"What a coincidence, fellow disciple." Su Yang approached the female disciple.

"Fancy new uniform, Disciple Xiao." Chun Hua greeted him with a beautiful smile.

"Thank you. I received it yesterday."

"I see. And what brought you here to the Lover's Bridge?" Chun Hua asked him.

"So that's what this place is called. I was just looking around the Inner Court when I stumbled upon this place."

"This place used to be very significant and popular with disciples, but it is now just a random peak amongst the hundreds of available peaks in the Boundless Yin Yang Sect."

"What is so significant about this place?" Su Yang inquired.

"There's a legend that promises eternal love to those who truly love each other if they make their vow on that bridge," Chun said, her gaze fixed on the well-maintained bridge in the distance.

"Oh? Since you are here, does that mean you made a vow with someone here?" Su Yang inquired.

"…"

After a moment of silence, she nodded and spoke in a low voice, "Yes, I made a vow with someone when I first joined this sect, and he broke my heart shortly later."

"Where is this guy now? Is he still in the sect?"

"Who knows? He left this sect a long time ago, probably dead. I couldn't care less about him now." Chun Hua shrugged with a bittersweet smile on her face.

chapters.title: Chapter 1113 Lover’S Bridge(2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 1113 Lover’S Bridge(2)

Chapter 1113 Lover’s Bridge(2)

"Since you are here, reminiscing about him, you probably still miss this guy." Su Yang said a moment later.

"No, I don't miss him one bit, nor am I here to reminisce about him." Chun Hua shook her head. "I am here because I made another promise here with someone else."

"Really? I wouldn't want to return to this place after the first incident if I were in your shoes." Su Yang chuckled.

"That's what I thought at first, too, but this guy… He's a troublemaker, but he's dependable. I hated his guts at first, but I grew to love him even more than my first partner."

"I assume he's still in this sect?"

Chun Hua pondered for a moment before nodding with a bright smile that showed off her beautiful white teeth, "Something like that!"

"Anyway, enough about me. What about you? How are you going to become a Core Disciple? It's not as simple as passing an assessment, you know that, right?"

Su Yang nodded and said, "Yes, I know. I am going to beg the Sect Leader to let me take the assessment."

"W-what?" Chun Hua's eyes widened, her mouth agape with disbelief.

"I didn't know you were that friendly with the Sect Leader…"

"I'm not, but I will get to know her once we meet."

"That's ridiculous. Do you think the Sect Leader is an easy woman or something?" Chun Hua asked with a frown on her face.

"Of course not, but I do think she wouldn't want to let go of a talented disciple like me."

"What a narcissistic thing to say…" Chun Hua shook her head.

"But I am not wrong, am I?"

"Okay, I admit you have potential, but you still shouldn't be so arrogant. Anything could happen. For example, the God of Pleasure's sudden death."

"What a specific example." Su Yang smiled.

"We are in the Boundless Yin Yang Sect, where he became a real man, after all."

"Now, that is a bold claim. Where did you hear such information?"

"Does it matter where? It's probably true, anyway."

Su Yang merely shook his head inwardly.

"But I heard the Sect Leader is currently away from the sect, and her return date is unknown. What are you going to do about that?"

"There is a simple resolution."

"Oh?" Chun Hua perked her ears with interest.

"I just need to cause enough trouble at the sect... to the point where the Sect Leader has no choice but to return."

Chun Hua nearly fell on her buttocks after hearing such an outrageous plan.

"What if you get expelled for causing too much trouble?"

"I will be expelled if she doesn't return, so I'll take the chance."

"What will you do if you have to leave the sect?"

"If I am not dead by then? I guess I'll go to another dual cultivation sect. After all, the Boundless Yin Yang Sect is no longer the only sect that practices dual cultivation."

"Unbelievable…" Chun Hua looked baffled, even shocked that Su Yang would even say such a thing.

While there are numerous dual cultivation sects, some even more popular than the Boundless Yin Yang Sect, they are incredibly competitive and often at odds with one another. Therefore, what Su Yang said was frowned upon.

Chun Hua hastily looked around to ensure they were alone before lecturing him, "Don't you dare say that again! Forget about sect elders; you could get into a lot of trouble if another disciple heard it. The disciples take loyalty very seriously nowadays with all of the fighting between our sects. It's a sensitive topic."

"Is it? I didn't know that." Su Yang said with a genuinely surprised look on his face.

Although new dual cultivation sects started popping up while Su Yang was still traveling the Four Divine Heavens, they didn't really start becoming popular until after he was imprisoned by the Heavenly Emperor.

"In that case, when I become a Core Disciple, I will represent the Boundless Yin Yang Sect and usher it into another golden age—one similar to the God of Pleasure's era."

Chun Hua trembled slightly at his words.

"What a bold claim. Unfortunately, your words are only big and empty."

"Then why don't you give me an opportunity to prove myself?" Su Yang looked at Chun Hua with a calm smile.

"Why are you asking me like I am the Sect Leader?" Chun Hua raised an eyebrow.

"Even if you're not the Sect Leader, I'm sure you have access to her."

"W-what an outrageous assumption."

Su Yang chuckled and said, "I have suspected your identity since you led me to the Fiery Yang Cave."

"I really have no idea what you're talking about."

"Is that so? Then so be it. I'm a little tired after the Inner Court disciple assessment, so I will take a break for several days. Once that break ends, I will start going out of my way to—"

"Why?" Chun Hua suddenly interrupted.

"What do you mean?" Su Yang asked with a genuinely puzzled face.

"Am I really not trustworthy in your eyes?"

Chun Hua had a pained expression for some reason.

"When have I ever said that?"

"You're treating me like a stranger despite everything we've been through."

"You make it sound like we've been to hell and back together, but we've known each other for less than half a year. That said, I definitely consider you as a friend."

"Are you protecting yourself, or are you trying to protect me?"

"…"

Su Yang remained silent.

"Is that so? Forget it." Chun Hua turned around and flew away the next moment.

Su Yang stared at her disappearing figure and sighed, "Is the Sect Leader onto me? Why am I not surprised?"

He also left shortly later.

After leaving the Lover's Bridge, Su Yang went to visit Elder Yao.

"What do you want now?" Elder Yao immediately frowned at his sudden appearance.

"I came here today to thank you for what you've done for me during the Yang Qi King submission. Without your help, I probably wouldn't have been selected as the Yang Qi King, and now that I am an Inner Court disciple, I wonder if you need help with anything."

"…"

After a moment of silence, Elder Yao slammed the door in his face.

chapters.title: Chapter 1114: Exchange
chapters.body:
Chapter 1114: Exchange

Chapter 1114: Exchange

"Elder Yao? What’s wrong? Did I do something to upset you?" Su Yang spoke loudly, his voice echoing in every direction.

Hearing his loud voice, Elder Yao opened the door again, showing a deep frown on her beautiful face, "If you’re here just to mess with me, I’ll have you forcefully removed!"

"That’s nonsense. I truly wanted to celebrate my recent promotion with you. Since the Yang Qi King event is already over, you should no longer be as busy, right?"

"The Yang Qi King may be over, but there’s still the Yin Qi Fairy." Your next chapter is on empire

"Yin Qi Fairy…? I figured there would be a similar event for the female disciples." Su Yang said. "When is that occurring?"

"Next year."

"So there’s still quite some time, huh?"

"As if. The female disciples had been preparing for this event even before the Yang Qi King started, but we limited their requests since we couldn’t handle so many orders at once. Now that the Yang Qi King is over, we’re flooded with requests, and nearly every Sect Alchemist has been working their butts off to fulfill the number of pill orders."

"Is that so? Then I won’t bother you. I’ll come back once I am a Core Disciple." Su Yang said with a calm smile.

"..."

Elder Yao watched as Su Yang casually turned around and left. Once he could no longer be seen, she returned inside to continue her work.

After leaving the Inner Court, Su Yang decided to check out the Square of Devotion. The number of female disciples there had lessened compared to before, but the number of male disciples had somehow increased, and most of them were around a specific individual.

’She’s still here? What is her objective in this place?’ Su Yang wondered as he looked at Disciple Fei.

After Su Yang conquered one of the two unconquerable fairies, the other disciples were given courage and determination to chase after Disciple Fei, the other unconquerable fairy.

"Junior apprentice-sister Fei, please be my partner! I promise I’ll make you the happiest woman in the sect!"

"Fuck, who are you trying to fool with such a bold-faced lie?! How dare you treat Fairy Fei like a child!"

"Fairy Fei, what is it that you want from us? If you don’t tell us your requirements, we won’t be able to satisfy you."

Disciple Fei, who had enough of their charades, finally spoke, "If you want to be my partner, you’ll need to know the lowest level of Sword Will, at the very least. You’ll also need to be under fifty years old."

"What? Sword Will under the age of fifty? You won’t find such a mythical being even in the top sword sects, much less a dual cultivation sect!"

"That’s unfair, Fairy Fei! Nobody in this sect knows Sword Will!"

Although Su Yang had used Sword Will during his deathmatch with Shao Jianjun, no one truly believed it. Most dismissed the idea as a rumor or exaggeration, and it was quickly forgotten.

"Fairy Fei, if you’re not here to look for a partner, why did you even join the Boundless Yin Yang Sect? Are you here to mock us or something?"

"Right?! Even Fairy Lin found a partner!"

The male disciples could no longer ignore Disciple Fei’s unreasonable behavior and started calling her out.

Yet, Disciple Fei lacked any reaction, almost as if she had expected it.

Suddenly, she noticed a figure standing at the corner of her view, causing her to glance at him.

Her eyes widened slightly after seeing Su Yang.

"Excuse me," said Disciple Fei as she pushed her way out of the encirclement and approached Su Yang with large and hasty strides.

"How can I help you, Disciple Ouyang—I mean, Disciple Fei?" Su Yang said, purposefully calling her by the wrong name.

Disciple Fei’s eyebrows twitched at his blatant attempt to provoke her, but she didn’t lash out at him and spoke, "Congratulations. Thanks to you, my recent days have been hellish."

Su Yang glanced at the group of male disciples glaring at him before returning to Disciple Fei and smiling, "Thank you, but if you’re that bothered by them, why don’t you just accept a partner and get it over with? If you want, I can be your partner in name."

Su Yang made sure to speak loud enough for the others to hear.

"Disciple Xiao, you greedy bastard! You already have Fairy Lin!"

"Bastard! You got a partner not long ago! How dare you look for another one already?! I’ll definitely let Disciple Lin know about this!"

The male disciples shouted at him.

Su Yang laughed out loud and said, "Go ahead. I already told her that I would be accepting more partners in the future."

He looked Disciple Fei in the eyes and continued, "You’re looking for someone who knows Sword Will, huh? Well, I happen to know a thing or two about Sword Will."

"..."

Disciple Fei narrowed her gaze at him, remembering the rumors about him wielding Sword Will during a death match. While she didn’t believe the rumor, she hadn’t dismissed it from her mind entirely.

"Do you need me to prove it to you?" Su Yang then asked.

"Hmph." Disciple Fei sneered. "Even if you know Sword Will, I will never partner with a guy who already has a partner."

Su Yang casually shrugged, "Suit yourself."

He turned and walked away, leaving Disciple Fei and the others speechless. Typically, it was Disciple Fei who walked away from others, so it was strange for them to witness someone doing it to her instead.

Disciple Fei stared at Su Yang for a few seconds before turning around and walking away, leaving the Square of Devotion.

The following day, the Boundless Yin Yang Sect had an announcement that shocked every disciple and many sect elders.

"The Boundless Yin Yang Sect has challenged the Mystic Delight Pavilion to a Dual Cultivation Exchange, which will take place in seven days. Visit the Mission Hall by tomorrow if you are interested. There are ten slots available. Male disciples only. The winner will have any wish granted by the Sect Leader herself."

chapters.title: Chapter 1115: Exchange(2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 1115: Exchange(2)

Chapter 1115: Exchange(2)

Every single announcement board in the sect was surrounded by disciples after news of its latest announcement was spread.

"What? Our sect challenged Mystic Delight Pavilion to a Dual Cultivation Exchange? Why would we suddenly challenge them?"

"Only the Sect Leader could challenge another sect, right? We haven’t challenged or accepted a challenge in so long that I forgot about Dual Cultivation Exchanges…" Find adventures on empire

"We’ve been looked down on and mocked by the other dual cultivation sects because of that… Maybe that is why the Sect Leader did this."

"But why the Mystic Delight Pavilion of all places? They’re currently the number one dual cultivation sect in the Four Divine Heavens! There’s no way we can defeat them in our current state!"

The disciples were more puzzled than excited by the announcement. During a Dual Cultivation Exchange, disciples from each sect would engage in dual cultivation with members of the opposing sect. Essentially, it was a tournament tailored specifically for dual cultivators.

However, this tournament wouldn’t take place on a grand stage; instead, it would be held within a private venue, ensuring an intimate and secluded setting for the participants.

Typically, only the most talented and seasoned disciples would participate in a Dual Cultivation Exchange, so none of the Outer Court or Inner Court disciples even considered participating.

However, it wasn’t just the disciples who were puzzled. The sect elders were just as dumbfounded and confused when they heard the announcement, which had been made without any prior meeting or warning.

"Is this even real?" A sect elder questioned, doubting its legitimacy.

"The Sect Leader left the sect sometime ago and hasn’t returned since then, so we cannot ask her until she returns."

"Is the Vice Sect Leader aware of this?"

"Apparently, he found out at the same time as the rest of us."

"So the Sect Leader made this decision without consulting anyone? Just what in heaven’s name is she thinking?"

"Ah… I can already imagine what will happen when we lose this exchange. Our Boundless Yin Yang Sect’s reputation will fall to rock bottom, and what little prestige we once had will be gone."

"Our sect’s reputation has been falling for hundreds of years now. If it weren’t for the God of Pleasure, our sect would’ve collapsed long ago."

"If only the God of Pleasure was still here…"

Meanwhile, the Vice Sect Leader, Chen Yi, immediately contacted the Sect Leader after learning about the announcement.

"Sect Leader! What is going on?! Please tell me you didn’t challenge the Mystic Delight Pavilion to a Dual Cultivation Exchange!" Chen Yi said in a nervous tone.

"It’s true. I challenged the Mystic Delight Pavilion to a Dual Cultivation Exchange yesterday. I will return soon. We can talk about it then."

Afterward, the sect leader stopped the connection to her communication jade slip, leaving Chen Yi no room to argue.

"T-that unreasonable woman! Ever since Su Yang corrupted her, she’s never been the same! Damn it!" Chen Yi stomped the floor in anger, but there was nothing he could do, as he’d never successfully changed the sect leader’s mind.

Chen Yi called for an emergency meeting shortly after, gathering all of the sect elders in one place.

"I have spoken with the Sect Leader, confirming that our Boundless Yin Yang Sect will be participating in a Dual Cultivation Exchange with the Mystic Delight Pavilion, and the Sect Leader will be returning to the sect soon."

"Did she tell you the reason for this sudden event, Vice Sect Leader?" one of the sect elders inquired.

"No, she did not, but I’m sure she has a good reason…" Chen Yi spoke with a stiff expression on his face.

"Has the Mystic Delight Pavilion contacted us yet?" another sect elder questioned.

"No, I have received no news from them."

"This will be our first Dual Cultivation Exchange in a while. Does the sect have any plans to ensure we don’t lose too badly?" asked another sect elder, sounding not too confident about their sect’s victory.

However, no one blamed her, as they all shared the same sentiment. Despite the Boundless Yin Yang Sect’s rich history and prestige, it was, at its core, a mediocre sect, and the Sect Leader’s depression over Su Yang’s death hadn’t helped. The only reason the sect had gained such popularity in the past was because of Su Yang. Without him, they would have likely remained an average sect.

"Even though the Sect Leader said participation is optional, we will need our best disciples to participate so that we won’t embarrass ourselves." Chen Yi said.

"I agree. We need our best disciples to participate in this exchange," agreed a sect elder.

"Although the Sect Leader’s offer is already enticing enough, we should add several more rewards in case the Core Disciples refuse to participate."

Unlike Outer Court or Inner Court disciples, Core Disciples have the privilege of declining to assist a sect elder for any reason, even if the request comes from the Vice Sect Leader. The only person they cannot refuse is the Sect Leader herself.

"What kind of rewards do you have in mind?" Chen Yi asked.

"I don’t know yet, but if the disciple needs something, we can do our best to help them acquire it."

As their meeting continued, Su Yang stood before an announcement board with Lin Xinyi by his side.

"A Dual Cultivation Exchange, huh? What an obvious attempt of trying to lure me out." Su Yang mumbled with a slight smile.

"Huh? Why would the sect be trying to lure you?" Lin Xinyi turned to look at him with a puzzled face.

"Not the sect. The Sect Leader." Su Yang corrected her.

"So you’re going to participate?"

Su Yang stared at the announcement for a moment before shaking his head, "No, I won’t."

"Really? Even if you don’t win, I’m sure you’ll receive a lot of recognition for your skills," she said.

Although she didn’t mention it, Lin Xinyi was sure Su Yang would participate, as he seemed like the type of person to jump at every opportunity given to him.

chapters.title: Chapter 1116: Exchange(3)
chapters.body:
Chapter 1116: Exchange(3)

Chapter 1116: Exchange(3)

"If I joined the Dual Cultivation Exchange, I will, without a doubt, win it." Su Yang spoke with such confidence that even the heavens wouldn’t dare doubt him.

He continued, "However, I don’t like the way the Sect Leader is doing this, and I want to teach her a lesson, even if it may come at the cost of the sect’s reputation."

"I don’t understand." Lin Xinyi shook her head.

Su Yang smiled at her and said, "Don’t think too much about it. All you need to know is that unless the Sect Leader comes to my doorstep asking for help, I won’t participate."

He turned around and walked away the next moment.

Lin Xinyi stood there in a daze for a few moments before chasing after him.

The Sect Leader of the Boundless Yin Yang Sect returned to the sect a day after the announcement was made.

"Sect Leader! I need a word with you immediately!" Chen Yi approached her with several sect elders following behind him.

"What’s the rush, Vice Sect Leader?" the Sect Leader asked him with a calm expression on her face.

"How can you act so nonchalantly after what you did? Do you even realize what you’ve done?" Chen Yi questioned her with a frown.

"I do, but just in case, why don’t you tell me?"

"You challenged the Mystic Delight Pavilion to a Dual Cultivation Exchange! None of the disciples in our sect have the capability to win!" Chen Yi said.

In response, the Sect Leader glared at him and spoke, "You’ve always wanted to be the sect leader, so I allowed you to act as one for the last several hundred years. Everything today is the result of your actions and guidance. If the disciples are not up to standards, are you going to complain to their mother?"

"Vice Sect Leader, this Dual Cultivation Exchange is not only to test your abilities, but it also allows me to see the current state of our sect and how much work needs to be done."

After hearing the Sect Leader’s words and reasoning for challenging the Mystic Delight Pavilion, the sect elders, who had a lot on their minds, suddenly lost their ability to speak.

Chen Yi wore a dumbfounded expression on his face before responding with a solemn expression, "I apologize for disappointing you, Sect Leader. Does this mean you’ll be more active from now on?"

"Who knows? If the Dual Cultivation Exchange turns out to be a disaster, I might even dissolve the sect entirely."

"You can’t say such things even as a joke, Sect Leader!" Chen Yi exclaimed with a terrified face.

The sect elders vigorously nodded their heads in agreement with Chen Yi.

"Anything else for me?" the Sect Leader asked.

"Well… since this is a test for me, I should be allowed to choose which disciple participates, right?" Chen Yi said.

The Sect Leader pondered for a moment before nodding, "You can pick nine disciples. I will pick the last one."

"I understand," said Chen Yi.

Once the Sect Leader left, Chen Yi immediately went to look for the top Core Disciples in their sect to participate in the Dual Cultivation Exchange.

The following day, Chen Yi handed a list of nine Core Disciples he’d picked for the Dual Cultivation Exchange.

"Who did you pick as our 10th participant?" Chen Yi asked.

However, the Sect Leader didn’t answer him.

A moment later, she spoke, "You’ll find out on the day of the exchange."

"I-I understand…"

However, the Sect Leader was inwardly panicking when Su Yang didn’t apply for the Dual Cultivation Exchange.

’What’s going on? He should’ve jumped at this opportunity the moment he saw it, even if it’s an obvious bait.’

The Sect Leader pondered with a solemn expression on her face.

Sometime later, she summoned Elder Chu.

"Disciple Chu greets the Sect Leader."

"Will Disciple Xiao be participating in the Dual Cultivation Exchange?" she asked.

"Disciple Xiao? No, not that I am aware of."

"And how do you feel about that?"

Elder Chu pondered for a bit before responding with raised eyebrows, "Perplexed, I guess."

"Oh? Elaborate."

"Well, Disciple Xiao strikes me as the type to jump at every opportunity," Elder Chu explained. "And he has limited time to achieve Core Disciple status because of his bet with another Core Disciple. This Dual Cultivation Exchange would be the perfect chance for him, yet he hasn’t acted on it."

After a slight pause, Elder Chu continued, "But honestly, I don’t blame him for not participating in the exchange. He’s just become an Inner Court disciple, and while his dual cultivation skills are above even some Core Disciples, he still lacks behind our best disciples. The Mystic Delight Pavilion is a formidable opponent. Disciple Xiao may be arrogant, but he’s not reckless. He probably knows his limit and is also the type who only acts if he’s confident in his victory."

The Sect Leader smiled and said, "You seem to know a lot about Disciple Xiao. I know I told you to keep an eye on him, but you’re clearly doing much more than just that."

"T-that’s…"

"Don’t worry. It’s not like I am going to punish you. Since he’s an Inner Court disciple now, he has the privilege to cultivate with the sect elders. Just try not to cause trouble."

"Trouble? Why would I cause any trouble?" Elder Chu asked.

"You’ll know when you reach that point," said the Sect Leader with a mysterious smile on her face.

"Anyway, notify me immediately if Disciple Xiao requests to participate."

"Yes, Sect Leader."

However, when no news came from Elder Chu after another full day, the Sect Leader summoned Elder Chu again.

"Bring Disciple Xiao to me."

"Right away." Elder Chu didn’t dare to question her after seeing the annoyed expression on the Sect Leader’s face.

Your next chapter awaits on empire

Sometime later, Elder Chu arrived at Su Yang’s living quarters.

"Sorry, but the Manager is currently cultivating with Elder Sister Lin." Mei Xing greeted Elder Chu at the door.

chapters.title: Chapter 1117: Summoned By The Sect Leader
chapters.body:
Chapter 1117: Summoned By The Sect Leader

Chapter 1117: Summoned by the Sect Leader

"I don’t care who he’s cultivating with! The Sect Leader has summoned him! He will immediately stop whatever he’s doing and see her!" Elder Chu spoke loudly, startling Mei Xing.

"T-the Sect Leader?! I will let him know!" Mei Xing ran back into the house and banged on Su Yang’s door.

"Manager! It’s an emergency! The Sect Leader is looking for you!"

Su Yang, who was plowing Lin Xinyi from behind inside his room, calmly responded, "I’ll be there when I finish."

"B-but it’s the Sect Leader! What if she punishes you, or worse, expels you from the sect?!" Mei Xing exclaimed in a worried tone.

"She’s… ahh~"

"Right… ahhhn~!" Lin Xinyi spoke as she moaned from pleasure.

"It’s fine. I know why she’s looking for me. She can wait a few hours." Su Yang smiled.

"Even if you say that…. Ahn~!"

"Xiao Yang!"

Lin Xinyi abruptly halted their cultivation and stared at him with a serious expression. "We can continue our dual cultivation after you speak with the Sect Leader. If you make her wait, I’m afraid it might offend her, and you do not want to offend the Sect Leader!"

Su Yang sighed with a bittersweet smile, "Alright, I’ll go speak with the Sect Leader."

He got dressed and went outside to greet Elder Chu, "Sorry for the wait, Elder Chu."

"You can save the apology for the Sect Leader later," she said.

Su Yang shrugged and followed her to the Sect Leader’s living quarters.

"Stay here for a bit." Elder Chu said to him before entering the building.

"I have brought Disciple Xiao. Shall I call him inside?" she asked.

"Yes, and make sure that only he comes inside. Moreover, forbid anyone else from approaching the building until we’re done, even if it’s the Vice Sect Leader himself," said the Sect Leader.

"As you command."

Elder Chu went back outside and said to Su Yang, "I understand your character very well, Disciple Xiao, but you must not act like you usually do before the Sect Leader. She is not someone you can afford to offend because nobody in this sect can save you from her."

"Don’t worry, Elder Chu. I am not stupid enough to offend the Sect Leader. If anything, I owe her for allowing me to leave the sect as an Outer Court disciple."

Elder Chu stared at Su Yang with a suspicious face, but she nodded and said, "Alright, I’ll trust you. Go inside. The Sect Leader is waiting for you."

Su Yang didn’t say anything else and walked inside the building.

Inside, the beautiful and elegant Sect Leader was sitting at the end of the room.
