"Disciple Xiao greets the Sect Leader. Your beauty exceeds its reputation." Su Yang greeted her with respect that bordered reverence.

The Sect Leader’s eyebrows twitched at his fake behavior, and asked, "Do you know why I summoned you today?"

He shook his head, "I’m afraid I don’t have the slightest idea."

"Take a guess and entertain me."

Su Yang pondered for a moment before speaking, "Is it because of my recent accomplishments?"

"Your achievements, huh? I guess it’s somewhat related, but it’s not quite right."

"Then I have no clue."

"Disciple Xiao, I heard about your achievements during the Inner Court disciple assessment. With your skills, why won’t you participate in the Dual Cultivation Exchange? Don’t you want to become a Core Disciple as soon as possible? If you win, you can request for a direct promotion, you know?"

"I am not familiar with this Dual Cultivation Exchange, so I am not confident I will win. I only like to do something when I am comfortable with my chances," he said.

"So you’ll only do something when you’re confident? How idealistic and… cowardly. I thought you were much better than this."

Su Yang smiled at her mockery and asked, "What sort of image does the Sect Leader have of me? I haven’t been in the sect for very long, and this is even our first meeting. Yet, you already seem to have a solid impression of who I am."

"You’ll be surprised by how fast one can forge their image, especially when they’re always causing a scene," she said with a slight smile.

"Anyway, allow me to ask you something now. What do you think of the Boundless Yin Yang Sect now?"

"..."

The room became silent.

"No matter your answer, I promise I won’t be mad," she said.

"Is that so? Then allow me to be blunt." Su Yang began approaching the Sect Leader.

Once he was standing right in front of her, he spoke in a cold voice, "I think it’s pathetic how far it’s fallen."

"..."

The Sect Leader had prepared herself for a harsh response, but she didn’t expect how hard it was going to hit her.

"C-can you elaborate?" she asked in a somewhat trembling voice.

"I think you should be the one explaining, Sect Leader," Su Yang replied calmly. "How did the Boundless Yin Yang Sect, once the best dual cultivation sect, fall so far that none of its disciples are confident in winning a mere Dual Cultivation Exchange?"

"And don’t even bother blaming it on the God of Pleasure for leaving the sect," Su Yang continued. "I know he isn’t the type to leave without imparting his teachings. Yet, in my several months here, I’ve seen almost none of it. Aside from a few remnants, it’s as if the God of Pleasure never existed in the Boundless Yin Yang Sect."

"T-that’s—!"

The Sect Leader stood up and tried to interrupt, but Su Yang continued, "As for the disciples… If I have to be honest, I think they’ve gotten even worse than before. Have you done anything to improve the disciples recently, Sect Leader?"

"No… I left the sect in the Vice Sect Leader’s hands for the last several hundred years since I wasn’t in the condition to lead," she sighed.

If anyone else were to witness this scene, they’d likely question who truly held the role of sect leader.

chapters.title: Chapter 1118: The Real Reason Behind The Sect’S Decline
chapters.body:
Chapter 1118: The Real Reason Behind The Sect’S Decline

Chapter 1118: The Real Reason Behind the Sect’s Decline

"Wasn’t in the condition to lead? Then why are you still the Sect Leader? It sounds like an excuse more than anything." Su Yang shook his head.

"And whose fault do you think it is that left me drowning in grief?" the Sect Leader suddenly shouted, her fists clenched tightly, frustration and defensiveness flaring in her eyes.

"Surely, you’re not going to say it’s my fault. I am just a disciple who joined less than a year ago." Su Yang shrugged.

"Are you still going to pretend you’re just a mere disciple with skills far beyond what one typically achieves at your age?" the Sect Leader muttered, her gaze cold and piercing as she glared at Su Yang.

"..."

After a moment of silence, the Sect Leader fell to her knees and began sobbing uncontrollably, "Why…? Why don’t you trust me? Am I really that pathetic in your eyes…?"

Su Yang’s eyebrows twitched at the sound of the Sect Leader’s whimpering, sounding like an innocent girl who just experienced her first breakup.

Su Yang rubbed his eyes and sighed, "Then can you tell me one thing? What happened to the dual cultivation techniques the God of Pleasure left behind?"

"They were… stolen…" she responded in an ashamed voice.

"Stolen?!" Su Yang almost couldn’t believe his ears. "Who dares to steal m—the God of Pleasure’s dual cultivation techniques?! Directly from the Boundless Yin Yang Sect, no less!"

"The Mystic Delight Pavilion… They threatened to completely demolish the Boundless Yin Yang Sect shortly after Su Yang’s death unless we handed over his techniques to them. There was nothing we could’ve done since the Mystic Delight Pavilion has several God Ascension Realm cultivators…"

"It happened while I was away grieving for Su Yang’s death. By the time I returned, everything had been plundered. I tried seeking help, but Su Yang’s family went into hiding, and nobody was willing to associate with us after Su Yang’s death."

Su Yang was fuming in anger after learning the truth.

’So this is the real reason behind the Boundless Yin Yang Sect’s decline! Mystic Delight Pavilion, huh? Just you wait!’ Su Yang gritted his teeth.

"The Mystic Delight Pavilion used to be our allies. We helped them grow because we saw their potential, but once they were powerful enough, they decided to betray us."

The Mystic Delight Pavilion not only stole all of Su Yang’s techniques from the Boundless Yin Yang Sect, but they did so with such secrecy that only the Sect Leader, Vice Sect Leader, and a few longtime sect elders were aware of this betrayal.

"So, who was the one that gave away the God of Pleasure’s techniques?" Su Yang then asked.

"The Vice Sect Leader… but I do not really blame him. Anyone would hand over their valuables after being threatened in such a manner. Our sect’s life depended on it, too."

Hearing this, Su Yang sneered inwardly, ’Hmph! Knowing that old snake’s character, I bet he had something to do with it.’

Su Yang had clashed with Chen Yi many times in the past and was very familiar with his character. He’d even be willing to bet that Chen Yi had a hand in the Mystic Delight Pavilion’s actions.

’If I find out that you were involved, I swear on my name that I will send you to hell this time, no matter how much the Sect Leader begs me to spare you!’ Su Yang swore inwardly.

"Now that you know the situation, do you still blame me?" the Sect Leader suddenly asked.

Su Yang’s face stiffened.

After a moment of awkward silence, Su Yang cleared his throat and spoke, "I guess I spoke too soon. As an apology, I’ll participate in the Dual Cultivation Exchange and defeat the Mystic Delight Pavilion."

"What about the other matter?" the Sect Leader asked.

"What other matter?" Su Yang raised an eyebrow, still pretending to be ignorant.

She sighed, "You’re really not going to tell me? Are you waiting for me to beg you or something?"

"I am just a mere disciple! How could I ever ask the Sect Leader to beg? That’s outrageous!" Su Yang acted surprised.

"Fine. Don’t tell me if you don’t want to."

"In that case, are we done here?"

"Leave. I don’t want to see your face anymore," she sneered.

Su Yang nodded and turned around. Before walking out of the room, he muttered a few barely audible words, causing the Sect Leader’s eyes to widen.

"Wait for me a little longer, Qing Wen."

Once Su Yang left the room and closed the door behind him, the Sect Leader began shedding tears again.

"Damn it… You haven’t changed one bit, have you…?"

Once Elder Chu noticed Su Yang coming out, she immediately approached him.

"What happened? What did you talk with the Sect Leader about?"

Su Yang smiled and said, "It wasn’t much. The Sect Leader wanted me to participate in the upcoming Dual Cultivation Exchange. Although I refused at first, she promised me that she’d let me use the Eternal Yin Yang Cave if I won. It was an offer I couldn’t refuse."

"She what?!" Elder Chu cried out loud.

The Eternal Yin Yang Cave was one of the most valuable and sacred training sites within the Boundless Yin Yang Sect. Typically, only a select few sect elders and the top three disciples were granted permission to enter this revered space.

However, after Elder Chu thought about it, if Su Yang really won the Dual Cultivation Exchange, he’d essentially become the number one disciple in the sect, which is more than enough to qualify him for a spot in the Eternal Yin Yang Cave.

"If there’s nothing else, I am going to prepare for the Dual Cultivation Exchange," Su Yang said a moment later.

"Go ahead…" Elder Chu nodded in a dazed manner.

Once Su Yang left, Elder Chu went back inside to find the Sect Leader wiping her tears.

"S-Sect Leader?!" Elder Chu’s heart nearly jumped out of her throat after seeing this shocking scene.

chapters.title: Chapter 1119: The Tenth Participant
chapters.body:
Chapter 1119: The Tenth Participant

Chapter 1119: The Tenth Participant

"Damn it, Elder Chu! Why did you rush in here without knocking?! I didn’t even call for you!"

The Sect Leader hastily wiped her tears after seeing Elder Chu standing by the door with a dumbfounded expression on her face.

"I-I-I am terribly sorry, Sect Leader!" Elder Chu immediately fell to her knees and began kowtowing. "I didn’t mean to enter without your permission! And I most certainly didn’t mean to see you cry! Please forgive this useless disciple!"

"Haaa…" the Sect Leader released a deep sigh before glaring at Elder Chu with narrowed eyes, "You will not utter a word about what you witnessed here today. Do you understand me?"

"I swear on my life that I will not say a thing!" Elder Chu shouted.

"Good. Then you are excused. Don’t let anyone bother me for the next three days."

"Yes!"

Elder Chu stepped outside to stand guard. Though she wasn’t required to, she felt the need to punish herself for her earlier mistake, seeing this duty as a small act of penance.

Meanwhile, Su Yang returned to his living quarters and immediately continued his dual cultivation session with Lin Xinyi.

After their cultivation, Lin Xinyi inquired in a curious tone, "Why did the Sect Leader summon you? Ah, if you cannot tell me, I understand."

"It’s nothing worth keeping a secret about. The Sect Leader wanted me to participate in the Dual Cultivation Exchange," he revealed with a smile.

"Really? Why would she pick you?"

"I guess she learned of my recent assessment’s result." Su Yang shrugged.

Although the sect elders who witnessed the assessment had promised each other not to disclose any details to the Sect Leader, she had somehow managed to uncover the information. Su Yang had a good idea of how she might have obtained it, but he chose to play ignorant, letting the matter slide for now.

Lin Xinyi stared at him with a perplexed expression on her face for a good moment before asking, "You didn’t make her beg you to participate, right…?"

Su Yang laughed, "Of course not. That was just a joke."

"A joke? Then what about teaching her a lesson? You sounded quite serious back then."

"Did I say something like that? I don’t remember."

"You…" Lin Xinyi shook her head with a slight smile.

"If you really win the Dual Cultivation Exchange, there’s a good chance you’ll immediately be promoted to Core Disciple."

"If I don’t qualify to become a Core Disciple after all that, who will?"

"Then how are you going to prepare for the exchange? I don’t know much about it, but I’ll do my best to assist you," said Lin Xinyi.

Su Yang caressed her smooth legs and said, "You’re already assisting me."

"Then let’s keep going," she nodded with a smile.

As the day of the Dual Cultivation Exchange got closer, the disciples of the Boundless Yin Yang Sect grew more anxious, preparing themselves for their inevitable defeat to the Mystic Delight Pavilion.

Meanwhile, at the Mystic Delight Pavilion, their disciples were already celebrating their victory.

"Hahaha! What is the Boundless Yin Yang Sect thinking? How dare they challenge us to a Dual Cultivation Exchange! Does their sect leader still believe their sect is as powerful as before?"

"The only reason they managed to get so far was due to the God of Pleasure’s reputation. Without him, they’re just a slightly above-average sect!"

Since it was done in secrecy, most of the Mystic Delight Pavilion disciples didn’t realize that the techniques they were learning had been stolen from the Boundless Yin Yang Sect and once belonged to the God of Pleasure himself.

"Sect Master, what do you think forced Sect Leader Qing to challenge us?" one of the sect elders asked.

"Why do you assume it was a forced decision?" asked the Sect Master.

"What else could it possibly be? There’s no way the Boundless Yin Yang Sect could keep up with us now that we have the God of Pleasure’s techniques. Moreover, we can easily destroy them whenever we feel like it."

The Sect Master fell silent for a moment before speaking, "I was shocked when she initially proposed the Dual Cultivation Exchange, but when I looked at her face, I couldn’t see any doubt. I haven’t seen her in such a mood for a long, long time. Perhaps I am giving her too much credit, but I think she’s up to something."

"However, no matter what she is up to, I’ll make sure to crush her expectations. I will teach her what happens to those who try to plot against us!"

Several days later, the participants for the Dual Cultivation Exchange gathered outside the Sect Leader’s headquarters.

Eight handsome male disciples stood outside with the Vice Sect Leader. All of these disciples were Core Disciples.

"Sect Leader, where’s the final participant? My ninth will return to the sect in a few hours at the latest," Chen Yi asked when he couldn’t see the tenth participant anywhere.

"He should be here soon," she said.

"Did you manage to contact Hao Ran? Is he our tenth participant?" Chen Yi inquired with anticipation.

Hao Ran was their top male disciple, but he was unavailable at the sect, and Chen Yi couldn’t contact him. Otherwise, Chen Yi would’ve already recruited him for the exchange.

"No, it’s not Disciple Hao."

"It’s not?"

Knowing that it wasn’t Hao Ran, Chen Yi immediately lost interest. After all, he already had the top ten disciples recruited.

Two hours later, Chen Yi and the others noticed a figure approaching them from afar.

"Huh? What’s an Inner Court disciple doing here?" one of the Core Disciples questioned out loud after seeing Su Yang.

"Wait… Isn’t that Disciple Xiao, that troublemaker?" Chen Yi raised his eyebrows in a puzzled manner.

"Yes, and he’ll be our tenth participant," said the Sect Leader.

"What?!" Chen Yi exclaimed in a shocked voice. "Surely, you must be joking, Sect Leader! There’s no way someone who was only recently promoted to Inner Court could possibly qualify for this exchange! He’d only embarrass us!"

chapters.title: Chapter 1120: Top Ten Male Disciples
chapters.body:
Chapter 1120: Top Ten Male Disciples

Chapter 1120: Top Ten Male Disciples

"I assure you, I’m not joking. Though Disciple Xiao was only recently promoted to the Inner Court, his dual cultivation skills rival those of the Core Disciples. If his disciple rank is your only concern, I can promote him to Core Disciple right now. Would that resolve the issue?" the Sect Leader said.

"T-that’s not the issue at all!" The Vice Sect Leader was livid, but he couldn’t really argue with her before so many Core Disciples.

’Damn it! This is why the Boundless Yin Yang Sect is declining! Once I become the sect leader, I will show you what being a real sect leader is like!’ Chen Yi cursed inwardly.

The Core Disciples were speechless. They’d never seen the Vice Sect Leader acting in such a manner before, and they most certainly never expected an Inner Court disciple to participate in the Dual Cultivation Exchange with them.

Once Su Yang landed, Chen Yi immediately approached him and sneered, "I don’t know how you got yourself involved, but you better not humiliate the sect with your performance!"

"That’s harsh, Vice Sect Leader. It was the Sect Leader who requested me to participate in the first place. If it weren’t for her, I would still be at home right now, cuddling with my beautiful partner," Su Yang shook his head.

Chen Yi’s eyebrows twitched at Su Yang’s response.

’This brat’s attitude feels so nostalgic for some reason…’ he thought inwardly, but he couldn’t pinpoint the feeling.

Su Yang turned to look at the eight Core Disciples. He smiled when he saw a familiar face.

"Oh? If it isn’t Disciple Yun. What a coincidence."

Yun Xiao Hong, who had been frowning since he realized it was Su Yang, sneered, "Are you sure you didn’t join because you heard I would be joining?"

"What a weird assumption. I didn’t even know you qualified. In fact, I’m shocked that you’re even here."

"I dare you to say that again, you bastard!" Yun Xiao Hong snapped after hearing Su Yang’s blatant provocation.

"Disciple Yun! Do not forget where you are and who you are in the presence of!" the Sect Leader quickly reprimanded him.

"I apologize." Yun Xiao Hong apologized to her.

He gave Su Yang one more cold glare before turning to look in the opposite direction.

Experience exclusive tales on empire

"Disciple Xiao, you also need to mind your manners. Regardless of your relationship, he’s still your senior." Sect Leader Qing gave him a warning as well.

"This disciple understands." Su Yang nodded with an obedient smile.

Sect Leader Qing’s body trembled slightly as she recalled some old memories.

"By the way, where’s our last participant? We’re missing one," Su Yang then asked.

"He’ll be here soon," she said.

Sure enough, the last participant arrived about ten minutes after Su Yang.

"Disciple Yu greets the Sect Leader and the Vice Sect Leader."

The final participant was Yu Hang, the number two male disciple in the Boundless Yin Yang Sect. He was a tall and exceedingly handsome man with long blonde hair and violet-colored eyes.

Yu Hang turned to look at Su Yang for a split second without saying anything.

"Now that we’re all here, let’s go inside and talk about the exchange," said Sect Leader Qing.

Once they were all seated, Sect Leader Qing spoke, "Before we talk about the exchange in detail, the exchange itself will take place in our Boundless Yin Yang Sect."

This was a condition set by Sect Leader Qing herself, as she didn’t want to bring her valuable disciples into enemy territory. The Mystic Delight Pavilion had no issues accepting this condition since they were confident in their ability to repel the Boundless Yin Yang Sect if attacked.

"Now, onto the exchange itself. Even if you know about it, since none of you have experienced it before, I will still explain the process to you in detail."

"It’ll be just like a one-on-one match, but instead of fighting with martial techniques on a large stage, you’ll be trying to dominate your opponent with dual cultivation techniques in bed."

"You are only allowed to use dual cultivation techniques. The moment you use anything else, you’ll automatically be disqualified. While giving or sustaining minor injuries from rough techniques are sometimes unavoidable, you are prohibited from purposefully injuring your opponent."

"There are two ways to secure your victory. The first is to outlast your opponent. Each match will have a time limit, and the one who releases the most Qi at the end loses. The second method is to completely overwhelm your opponent by knocking them unconscious with pleasure. Naturally, this is easier said than done, especially when you’re against experienced dual cultivators. Any questions so far?" the Sect Leader explained.

One of the Core Disciples raised his hand and asked, "Do we get anything special for knocking out our opponent?"

"You get bragging rights, but I’ll also give anyone who can knock out their opponent a special reward," she said.

"What kind of reward?"

The disciples immediately became excited.

The Sect Leader pondered for a moment before responding, "A spot in the Eternal Yin Yang Cave."

"What?!" Chen Yi exclaimed. "That’s too much, Sect Leader!"

"Is it? I believe this reward matches its difficulty."

"That’s…"

Chen Yi couldn’t deny her logic. Even with his experience as a dual cultivator, he would struggle to overwhelm an ordinary Outer Court disciple with pleasure, let alone the top dual cultivators from the best dual cultivation sect in the Four Divine Heavens.

"What if we knock out more than one?" Su Yang suddenly asked. "Does that mean we get to enter the Eternal Yin Yang Cave twice?"

Chen Yi and the other disciples looked at him with disbelief written all over their faces.

However, the Sect Leader chuckled and said, "In that case, I’ll extend your time in the Eternal Yin Yang Cave. What do you think?"

Su Yang responded with a smile, "I think that’s perfect. I hope you won’t walk back on your words later."

"Who do you think I am?" she sneered.

chapters.title: Chapter 1121: Nothing More Than A Little Game
chapters.body:
Chapter 1121: Nothing More Than A Little Game

Chapter 1121: Nothing More Than a Little Game

"Now, let’s say you defeated your opponent. Since the Dual Cultivation Exchange won’t end until there is only one participant remaining, you’ll have to cultivate with a different opponent—someone who hasn’t lost yet because once you lose, you are out," the Sect Leader continued the explanation.

"For example, if there are ten participants on each side and one side has one winner and nine losers after all participants fought, that one winner will have to defeat nine opponents in a row to win the Dual Cultivation Exchange."

"That means your defeat will make it even harder for your fellow disciples to win since there will only be a short break between each match. In other words, don’t lose," said Chen Yi.

"You make it sound so easy, Vice Sect Leader." Su Yang commented.

"Are you purposefully trying to piss me off?" Chen Yi glared at him.

Su Yang silently shrugged.

"Any questions?" Sect Leader Qing asked a moment later.

"What about the spectators? Will everyone see our performance?"

"That will depend on you and your partner. You can broadcast your session or keep it private. However, both participants must agree to the same condition. Even if only one of you wants it private, nobody will be able to watch your session."

"Is cheating possible?" another disciple asked.

"Unless you made prior arrangements with the Mystic Delight Pavilion, it’s highly unlikely for either party to cheat. Once the participants enter their room, both are locked inside until the timer ends. However, the room will unlock early if one of you falls unconscious. It also has a system that automatically detects and counts each time someone releases their Qi," explained the Sect Leader.

"What if they knock us unconscious using force and then claim it’s through pleasure?"

Your next read awaits at empire

"Don’t worry. Both sect leaders will manually examine the participant if they’re knocked unconscious to make sure there was no foul play."

"Sect Leader, what are our chances of winning this exchange?" Yu Hang asked with a serious expression on his face.

"To be completely honest with you… our chances of winning are slim. As you already know, the Mystic Delight Pavilion has been the number one dual cultivation sect for the last several hundred years. Unless they purposefully made their weakest disciples participate, it’s unlikely for us to win."

"Since you know that, why did you challenge them to a Dual Cultivation Exchange?"

Sect Leader Qing remained calm and replied, "I already told Vice Sect Leader this, but this is a test and evaluation simultaneously. I want to see how our best disciples compare to their best, so I know where to start and what needs to be worked on."

"The test is mostly for Vice Sect Leader, but you can also consider it a test for yourself."

"I see…" Yu Hang muttered as if he finally understood something that had been bugging him.

"Pft." Su Yang couldn’t help but crack a chuckle after seeing the Sect Leader’s brilliant performance.

Yu Hang misunderstood this and glared at him with a frown, "What the hell is so funny?"

"Ah, don’t worry about it. I’m not laughing at you."

"And you expect me to believe that?" Yu Hang narrowed his eyes, looking agitated.

"I know all about you and your insolent behavior within the sect, Disciple Xiao," Yu Hang growled. "I don’t care what your issues are or if you make a fool of yourself, but if you dare treat the Dual Cultivation Exchange like a game and disgrace the sect, I’ll kill you myself."

"Unfortunately, that’s just what this exchange is in my eyes—nothing more than a little game with inexperienced brats like yourself as participants."

"You fucking—" Yu Hang began exuding killing intent.

"What do you think you’re doing?" Sect Leader Qing suddenly raised her voice.

Yu Hang trembled, and his killing intent instantly disappeared.

"My apologies, Sect Leader. I failed to control my emotions for a moment there," he said.

"I don’t care about your lack of control. If you dare act like I am invisible again, I’ll be the one doing the killing, understand?"

"Yes, Sect Leader." Yu Hang bowed to her.

"Disciple Xiao, you also need to take this seriously. Don’t be overconfident because you achieved a record or two within the sect. Otherwise, you’re in for a rude awakening."

"Sorry, Sect Leader. I’ll make it up by winning the exchange for you."

Not just Yu Hang but even the Vice Sect Leader was fuming in anger after hearing Su Yang’s arrogant words. However, they kept quiet, as their outbursts would only anger the Sect Leader even more.

Sect Leader Qing shook her head inwardly.

’Ah… this is invoking some bad memories…’

"Anyway, if you don’t have any more questions, I’ll end the briefing here. The Mystic Delight Pavilion will be here any minute, too."

When nobody spoke a word, Sect Leader Qing continued, "Then you’ll all remain here until the Mystic Delight Pavilion arrives. I will leave momentarily, but that does not mean you can do whatever you want. If I find out that any of you here caused trouble while I am away, I’ll expel everyone involved. Understand?"

"Yes, Sect Leader!"

All of the disciples in the room responded.

"Vice Sect Leader, follow me. We’re going to wait for the Mystic Delight Pavilion at the entrance," she looked at him.

Sect Leader Qing and Chen Yi left shortly after, leaving Su Yang alone with the other nine Core Disciples. Yet, none of the Core Disciples dared to touch Su Yang after the Sect Leader’s threat.

However, that didn’t mean they wouldn’t try to mess with Su Yang.

"If I win this exchange, I’ll use my wish to make the Sect Leader kick you out of the sect." Yu Hang sneered.

"Senior apprentice-brother Yu, that would be a waste. After all, he’s already leaving the sect in a few more weeks when he fails to become a Core Disciple and loses our bet." Yun Xiao Hong laughed out loud.

The other disciples joined, and they laughed at Su Yang together.

chapters.title: Chapter 1122: Mystic Delight Pavilion’S Arrival
chapters.body:
Chapter 1122: Mystic Delight Pavilion’S Arrival

Chapter 1122: Mystic Delight Pavilion’s Arrival

"Using the wish to expel someone, huh? That’s a great idea. Thanks." Su Yang responded a moment later, his expression as calm as it could be.

"Do you seriously think you will be the one to win this exchange? Talk about being delusional!"

"If you somehow win this exchange, I’ll eat my fucking uniform and call you father!"

"Hahah! Get a load of this guy! He’ll not only be the first to lose but probably even get knocked out by his opponent!"

Su Yang didn’t say another word and calmly sat there in silence as the small group of Core Disciples continued to mock him to pass the time.

Sometime later, the Mystic Delight Pavilion arrived at the Boundless Yin Yang Sect.

The Mystic Delight Pavilion showed up with a decently sized group of a little under a thousand disciples and sect elders. However, not everyone from their group belonged to the Mystic Delight Pavilion.

"Welcome to the Boundless Yin Yang Sect, Mystic Delight Pavilion, and other guests." Sect Leader Qing greeted them with a calm smile. Enjoy more content from empire

"I didn’t notify you beforehand since we were in a rush to get here, but I invited some of my friends to witness the Dual Cultivation Exchange between our sect. I hope you won’t mind, Sect Leader Qing," said the beautiful woman leading the group.

Sect Leader Qing shook her head and responded, "I do not mind at all, Sect Leader Shuang. The more, the merrier. As a matter of fact, I also invited a few friends to watch since this is our first Dual Cultivation Exchange in a long time."

Sect Leader Qing was not only unsurprised by the extra company; she had actually anticipated it.

"Please, follow me. I’ll bring you to the venue."

Sect Leader Qing proceeded to guide the Mystic Delight Pavilion to a specific peak in the Boundless Yin Yang Sect.

"I apologize if this place feels a bit dusty. Although we cleaned it, it was done hastily, and this place hasn’t been used in hundreds of years since it’s reserved specifically for Dual Cultivation Exchanges," said Sect Leader Qing.

At the peak was a large platform surrounded by rows of seats, with ten perfectly shaped black boxes arranged neatly on the platform. These black boxes were, in fact, concealment formations that could turn transparent. Inside each formation was a single bed prepared for the participants’ use during their session.

It was a simple but standard setup for Dual Cultivation Exchanges.

Once the Mystic Delight Pavilion’s group was seated on one side, Sect Leader Qing allowed the Boundless Yin Yang Sect disciples to take their seats on the opposite side.

However, not every individual from the Mystic Delight Pavilion took a seat. Several of them went onto the platform instead. Ten of them, to be exact. Naturally, they were the participants.

"Heavens! I recognize all ten of them! The Mystic Delight Pavilion actually brought out their top ten female disciples for this exchange!" someone from the Boundless Yin Yang Sect recognized the participants and remarked.

"It’s over. There’s no way we’re winning this…"

"I was expecting a handicap from them, too…"

"Where are your participants?" Sect Leader Shuang asked a moment after sitting down.

"They’ll be here soon,’ said Sect Leader Qing.

"Is that so?" Sect Leader Shuang no longer paid attention to her and began chatting with the friends she had brought.

Meanwhile, Elder Chu notified Su Yang and the others of the Mystic Delight Pavilion’s arrival before guiding them to the location of the exchange.

Sometime later, Su Yang and his group stepped onto the platform.

When the disciples of the Boundless Yin Yang Sect saw their own participants for the first time, they were all bewildered to see an Inner Court disciple amongst the group of Core Disciples.

"What the fuck?! Isn’t that Disciple Xiao?! What the hell is he doing on the stage with the other Core Disciples?!"

"Don’t tell me he’s participating in the exchange?! He just got promoted to the Inner Court!"

"How did he even get accepted?"

"There was probably a lack of participants, so the sect was forced to accept him…"

"Unbelievable! We’re already fighting a losing battle, and now we have to deal with this nonsense, too?! We’re definitely going to end up as laughingstocks after this!"

Meanwhile, the Mystic Delight Pavilion was just as surprised as the Boundless Yin Yang Sect spectators.

"That lineup… Their number one disciple isn’t participating, and they even got an Inner Court disciple in the mix? What is going on with the Boundless Yin Yang Sect?"

"Are they mocking us or something?"

After snapping out of her daze, Sect Leader Shuang turned to look at Sect Leader Qing with a frown and asked, "What is the meaning of this?"

"What do you mean?" Sect Leader Qing acted like she didn’t know what Sect Leader Shuang was talking about.

"We brought our best disciples for this exchange to show our respect, and this is how you repay us?"

Given the Boundless Yin Yang Sect’s current state, the Mystic Delight Pavilion could have chosen any random Core Disciple from their sect for the exchange and would still likely win against the Boundless Yin Yang Sect’s top ten disciples. Yet, the Mystic Delight Pavilion chose to bring its top ten disciples.

Although Sect Leader Shuang claimed it was out of respect for the Boundless Yin Yang Sect, the truth was she wanted to utterly crush them. However, she could’ve never expected the Boundless Yin Yang Sect to bring an Inner Court disciple for the exchange.

"I apologize if this doesn’t meet your expectations, but I assure you, they are the best we have at the moment," replied Sect Leader Qing.

"An Inner Court disciple is the best you have? If that’s not a joke, I truly feel sorry for your sect," one of Sect Leader Shuang’s friends remarked, a look of disdain and mockery on his face.

"He’s only an Inner Court disciple because he recently joined the sect. In reality, his skills are on par with the Core Disciples around him. You’ll regret it if you underestimate him," Sect Leader Qing replied, unfazed by the rude remark.

chapters.title: Chapter 1123: Thieves
chapters.body:
Chapter 1123: Thieves

Chapter 1123: Thieves

"Even if we left his talents aside… his appearance… is kind of lacking when compared to the rest of the sect. I always thought the Boundless Yin Yang Sect’s beauty standards were unrivaled. Guess I was wrong." Another expert there commented.

"Although having a good appearance is highly recommended, it’s not a requirement," said Sect Leader Qing. "Moreover, Disciple Xiao became a disciple through a special recommendation."

"Ah. I feel sorry for my disciples. If I had known they needed to cultivate with someone so ugly, I would’ve never brought them here." Sect Leader Shuang sighed out loud, not caring about being heard by others.

However, nobody dared to comment on it. After all, who in their right mind would protect an ordinary disciple like Su Yang and offend the Sect Leader of a powerful sect in the process?

Not even the sect elders at the Boundless Yin Yang Sect dared to complain.

Suddenly, a calm voice resounded, and it was loud enough for everyone there to hear, "And what good is a pretty appearance when they’re rotten on the inside?"

’Which insolent bastard dares to mock me?’ Sect Leader Shuang frowned as she turned to look at the person who’d just spoken.

"D-Disciple Xiao?!" Elder Chu and the others were stunned. They knew Su Yang was a bold and unrestrained character, but they never imagined he would be daring enough to openly mock the Sect Leader of the Mystic Delight Pavilion.

However, Sect Leader Shuang didn’t confront Su Yang directly. Instead, she turned to Sect Leader Qing and said, "Sect Leader Qing, is this how you raise your disciples these days? Or do you even bother with your sect at all? I’ve heard rumors claiming you’ve been uninvolved with your own sect for the past several hundred years. I didn’t want to believe it, but after seeing the state of your sect..."

It was clear that Sect Leader Shuang had no respect for Sect Leader Qing or the Boundless Yin Yang Sect, but who was going to call her out?

"Wow, this sect managed to survive that long without a sect leader? Forget about a niche place like the Boundless Yin Yang Sect; most ordinary sects would’ve collapsed within a hundred years."

A familiar voice resounded amid the awkward silence. Once again, Su Yang spoke up.

Sect Leader Shuang turned to look at Su Yang with a frown on her face. Yet, she didn’t lecture him, as she thought it was beneath her to entertain a mere disciple.

"Disciple Xiao, will it kill you to keep your mouth shut for a few days?!"

Another voice suddenly resounded. Surprisingly, it came from a fellow disciple—one who was standing on the stage beside Su Yang.

"Why are you even trying to provoke the Mystic Delight Pavilion?!" Yun Xiao Hong continued.

Su Yang looked at him and said, "They’re mere guests at our Boundless Yin Yang Sect, yet they dare to behave as if they’re back home. Are our sect nothing in their eyes? And why aren’t you saying anything? As a Core Disciple, you have an obligation to protect your sect’s honor."

Su Yang’s words resonated with the disciples of Boundless Yin Yang Sect. However, despite agreeing with Su Yang, none of them could find the courage to speak up.

Seeing this, Su Yang sighed, "Ah, this place has truly fallen."

When he spoke, his gaze met with Sect Leader Qing for a brief moment, causing her to tremble.

"Disciple Xiao, huh? You’re a bold one, I give you that. If you weren’t so ugly, I wouldn’t mind having you in our sect," Sect Leader Shuang suddenly said, finally speaking to him.

Su Yang sneered, "What’s so good about the Mystic Delight Pavilion? It’s just another dual cultivation sect."

"You bastard! How dare you look down on our sect!"

The disciples of the Mystic Delight Pavilion began cursing at him.

Su Yang smiled at this and said, "At least your disciples know when to use their mouths."

"Are you saying all this stuff because you think your sect will protect you?" one of the participants from the Mystic Delight Pavilion suddenly spoke. "The Boundless Yin Yang Sect will not last for much longer. Once they collapse, let’s see who will dare to protect you."

Su Yang laughed out loud, "Even if I were alone today, I would still dare to talk back. After all, why would I be afraid of some thieves?"

"What did you just call us? Thieves?" The female disciple frowned.

"Yes, I did."

The disciple laughed, "I’m actually curious. Out of the countless things you could’ve called us, why thieves? Because we stole the Boundless Yin Yang Sect’s spotlight?"

"No, I am calling you thieves because your sect stole the dual cultivation techniques the God of Pleasure had left behind for the Boundless Yin Yang Sect," said Su Yang, revealing this explosive news.

"W-what?!"

"That’s slander!"

"Do you have any idea what you’re saying?!"

The disciples and sect elders of Mystic Delight Pavilion began oozing with killing intent.

"How dare you, Junior!" Sect Leader Shuang stood up in anger and roared.

Stay tuned to empire

The Boundless Yin Yang Sect disciples were too puzzled and dumbfounded to even respond.

’What the hell is happening? How does a mere Inner Court disciple who’d only recently joined the sect know this information?’ Chen Yi’s eyes were wide open from disbelief.

He turned to look at Sect Leader Qing, who looked just as surprised, mostly because she didn’t expect Su Yang to expose this secret so early and openly.

’Did the Sect Leader tell him? But why? It makes no sense!’ Chen Yi wondered inwardly.

Witnessing the commotion he’d stirred, Su Yang continued speaking, "You probably don’t know this, but I once worked as a massager in the City of Pleasure, and I would hear all sorts of rumors from my clients. What I revealed just now is one of these rumors."

"So it’s just rumors!"

"Bastard! How dare you scare me like that!"

"Who in their right mind would believe such an outrageous rumor?!"

Hearing their criticism, Su Yang shrugged, "I am but an ignorant man who cannot bear to keep quiet before injustice, and I admit that I am a gullible man who tends to believe everything. However, my customers wouldn’t lie to me."

"Fuck! I have never seen someone this damn gullible before!"

"If I say that I am your father, would you believe me?!"

The entire place became livid again.

chapters.title: Chapter 1124: Start Of The Exchange
chapters.body:
Chapter 1124: Start Of The Exchange

Chapter 1124: Start of the Exchange

While the disciples of Mystic Delight Pavilion cursed at Su Yang out loud, their sect elders and even Sect Leader Shuang remained awfully quiet, almost as if they didn’t want to bring more attention to this subject.

Sect Leader Shuang turned to look at Sect Leader Qing to see how she’d respond.

When Sect Leader Qing first found out about the Mystic Delight Pavilion’s betrayal, she wanted to start a war despite the obvious disparity between their sect’s overall prowess. Naturally, Chen Yi and many of the sect elders at that time were against going to war with the Mystic Delight Pavilion.

In the end, the war never happened, and Sect Leader Qing stopped caring for the Boundless Yin Yang Sect as much, allowing it to decline, as she didn’t see any worth in it after what happened.

Seeing how Sect Leader Qing decided to remain quiet on the subject, Sect Leader Shuang smiled inwardly, ’At least you know your place.’

"Enough of this farce!" Chen Yi suddenly stood up and shouted. "Why do you think we’re here? To talk about baseless rumors or for the Dual Cultivation Exchange?!"

The disciples immediately stopped talking upon hearing Chen Yi’s voice. Su Yang also fell silent, but his face became solemn as he fixed a sharp glare on Chen Yi.

Chen Yi noticed Su Yang’s gaze and stared back, almost as if daring Su Yang to speak.

However, Su Yang didn’t say another word after that.

"That’s what I thought. Know your place," Chen Yi muttered, a hint of satisfaction in his tone as he sat down, clearly pleased with the outcome.

Unbeknownst to Chen Yi, he’d just sentenced himself to death.

’A baseless rumor, huh? As I thought, you are in cahoots with the Mystic Delight Pavilion.’ Su Yang clenched his fists, and his blood boiled in anger.

While it was possible that Chen Yi had spoken those words merely to quell the commotion or to prevent the relationship between the Boundless Yin Yang Sect and the Mystic Delight Pavilion from worsening, Su Yang knew Chen Yi well enough to be certain that wasn’t the case.

’This sect has truly gone to shit. However, now that I am back, I will make sure to cleanse it of its filth!’ Su Yang swore inwardly as he waited for the Dual Cultivation Exchange to begin.

"..."

After a moment of silence, Chen Yi looked at Sect Leader Shuang and asked, "Shall we start the Dual Cultivation Exchange?"

As if giving permission to an underling, Sect Leader Shuang nodded.

"Then we will begin the Dual Cultivation Exchange now! The rules are as follows—"

After announcing the rules that were already explained to Su Yang and the others not long ago, Chen Yi continued, "The participants from each side will pick a number from one to ten. Those with the same number will be partners for the exchange."

A few moments later, two sect elders from the Boundless Yin Yang Sect entered the platform and placed ten pieces of rock on each side.

These rocks had a special property that blocked spiritual sense, so the participants wouldn’t be able to cheat.

"Pick your number."

The participants on each side picked their rock and crushed it, revealing a piece of paper inside.

"Number four." Su Yang read the number on his paper.

"Once you have your number, proceed to your station, but do not go inside," Chen Yi continued.

"The Dual Cultivation Exchange for each match will last for… four hours."

Stay updated through empire

Su Yang approached the formation with the number ’four’ on it. Since the formation was closer to the Mystic Delight Pavilion’s side, his opponent arrived there first.

She was an exceedingly beautiful woman with a tall and slender frame, skin as white as snow, and fierce facial features as if she were a natural-born fighter.

The female disciple frowned when she realized her opponent was Su Yang.

She sucked her teeth with annoyance and sighed out loud, "Damn it, I really don’t want to cultivate with this ugly bastard."

Su Yang looked at her and smiled, "Don’t worry, it’ll only be for a few minutes since you’ll be sleeping for the rest of that time."

The female disciple looked at him with wide eyes filled with disbelief. Once she realized what he was implying, she burst out laughing, "You think you have what it takes to overwhelm me? Hahaha! That’s the most ridiculous thing I’ve heard all year long!"

"Then would you be willing to show the others our session?" Su Yang asked.

The female disciple frowned and said, "Hell no. I don’t want the others to see me cultivating with such a toad, even if I am going to humiliate you in bed!"

Su Yang shrugged, "If you say so."

Once both sides were standing in front of their station, Chen Yi asked each team whether they wanted to showcase their session. Out of the ten pairs, only three of them agreed to showcase their session.

"Look at Disciple Xiao’s opponent! Feng Ling, also known as the Mystic Delight Pavilion’s Phoenix! She’s actually in the top three within the entire sect!" The Boundless Yin Yang Sect disciples recognized Su Yang’s opponent.

"Even if his opponent were their weakest disciple, he’d still be no match for her."

Disciples on both sides mocked Su Yang, and almost nobody there believed in him.

’Xiao Yang…’ Lin Xinyin wore a somewhat worried expression on her face. Although she’d cultivated plenty with him and was confident in his abilities, she knew nothing about the Mystic Delight Pavilion.

"You may enter your stations. The timer will start now," Chen Yi announced a moment later.

Su Yang entered the formation with Feng Ling the next moment.

Upon stepping into the formation, the scenery around them shifted, and as if teleported to a different world, they found themselves standing inside a pavilion surrounded by tranquil water and vibrant, blooming flowers.

The scene felt so real that they could feel the gentle breeze brushing against their skin and smell the fragrant aroma of the flowers surrounding them.

"Let’s get this over with," said Feng Ling as she removed her clothes and walked to the bed at the center of the pavilion.

chapters.title: Chapter 1125: Dominating The Mystic Delight Pavilion’S Disciples
chapters.body:
Chapter 1125: Dominating The Mystic Delight Pavilion’S Disciples

Chapter 1125: Dominating the Mystic Delight Pavilion’s Disciples

Once Feng Ling was lying on the bed with her peerless naked body exposed, Su Yang also removed his clothes, revealing his majestic sword to her.

Feng Ling’s eyes widened with shock after seeing Su Yang’s lower sword. Although she had seen bigger, none could compare to how perfectly shaped it was.

’What a perfect meatstick! It has just the right amount of thickness and is long enough to please most women out there, not to mention its shape and how it curves when hard!’ Feng Ling cried inwardly, silently admiring Su Yang’s rod.

A moment later, Feng Ling snapped out of her daze, only to be appalled as she suddenly realized her lower lips were already soaked and twitching with anticipation.

Su Yang approached the bed and said, "Looks like we won’t need any foreplay, seeing how wet you already are."

Feng Ling’s face flushed with redness after being provoked in such a manner.

She sneered a moment later, "This must be your first time doing a Dual Cultivation Exchange. There are customs you should follow, and the most important one is that you let the woman act first!"

Although it was not a rule, it was customary for the female to start the exchange.

"I am well aware of the customs, but you wanted to end this as soon as possible, right?" Su Yang said.

"T-that’s…" Feng Ling became slightly speechless. "A-although I am in a hurry, customs are customs!"

Su Yang shrugged, "Fine. If you say so, go ahead."

He walked to the edge of the bed and pointed his sword in her direction.

Feng Ling unconsciously licked her lips and approached his rod.

However, before tasting it with her mouth, she used her hands to play with it. Naturally, it wasn’t just casual play, and a technique was being used to please him.

’Watch as I turn you into my obedient dog!’ she smiled inwardly as she skillfully stroked his rod.

Although Feng Ling ranked in the top three overall within her sect, when it came to hand techniques, she was undeniably number one. She had never encountered a man who could maintain a straight face while experiencing the full extent of her skills.

Yet, at this very moment, Su Yang’s expression remained as ordinary as ever, perhaps even nonchalant. If there were spectators observing the scene, they might genuinely question whether Su Yang was even being pleasured at all.

’So you’re good at pretending, huh? I’ll break down your wall in moments!’ Feng Ling refused to believe that she was unable to satisfy a mere Inner Court disciple from the Boundless Yin Yang Sect with her godlike hand techniques.

However, in Su Yang’s eyes, he was only being touched by someone with stolen techniques.

As a man, most of the techniques he left behind at the Boundless Yin Yang Sect were designed for male disciples. However, he wouldn’t have earned the title of God of Pleasure if his expertise was limited to male techniques alone. He also left behind a significant number of techniques tailored for females, and at this very moment, Feng Ling was employing one of them.

’She’s cultivated this hand technique to a pretty decent level. No wonder why she’s top three in her sect.’ Su Yang thought to himself.

Unfortunately, even if Feng Ling had fully mastered the hand technique, it wouldn’t have been enough to satisfy Su Yang.

Many minutes later, Su Yang suddenly yawned out loud, "Are we ready to move on?"

’T-this bastard! The audacity to yawn in this situation!’ Feng Ling stopped moving her hand and trembled in anger.

"Not yet!"

She said before opening her mouth and sticking the meatstick inside her mouth.

Not willing to give up, Feng Ling used her mouth to please the rod while her hands massaged Su Yang’s family jewels.

’Damn it! Why isn’t he ejaculating?! Even the Core Disciples at my sect would’ve released their Yang Qi by now!’ Feng Ling gritted her teeth in frustration.

Sometime later, Su Yang yawned again, "Your techniques aren’t bad, but if you put no emotion into it, you’ll never utilize the techniques at their full potential."

Feng Ling frowned and said, "You speak as if you know our sect’s technique!"

"Why wouldn’t I?"

"Bullshit!"

"Then let me prove it to you."

Su Yang held Feng Ling’s shoulder and pushed her down, pinning her to the bed.

"I have seen enough of your techniques. Now it’s time you experience mine."

Without needing to look down, Su Yang poked Feng Ling’s lower entrance with his stiff rod that was still soaked in her saliva.

Feng Ling’s body trembled at the hot rod pressing against her cave.

After a moment of anticipation, Feng Ling released a loud moan as Su Yang’s sword penetrated her cave, reaching the depths of her cave in one go.

Su Yang immediately started moving his hips.

"T-that technique is—!"

Feng Ling recognized the technique Su Yang was using since it was a popular technique within the Mystic Delight Pavilion, but that raised many questions.

However, Feng Ling was in no condition to ponder about anything as she was quickly consumed by an overwhelming wave of pleasure.

Continue your journey on empire

Within mere seconds of having Su Yang’s rod inside her body, Feng Ling was already on the verge of climaxing.

She could no longer endure it after a few more seconds, and she began spraying Yin Qi uncontrollably.

Meanwhile, outside the formation, where two zeros were displayed, one of the numbers changed to a ’one,’ indicating that someone had released their Qi.

The number quickly flickered from one to two, then three, and finally four within a matter of moments, surprising the spectators.

The two numbers were displayed in blue and red, with blue signifying Yin Qi and red representing Yang Qi.

"Look! The Mystic Delight Pavilion’s disciple climaxed four times in just a few moments after half an hour of nothing happening!" one of the spectators exclaimed, their voice filled with surprise.

"Wait… Isn’t that Disciple Xiao’s room?"

"No way… So he’s actually defeating his opponent?"

The spectators were in disbelief, especially those from the Mystic Delight Pavilion.

"T-there must be something wrong with the counter!" They refuted.

chapters.title: Chapter 1126: First Victory
chapters.body:
Chapter 1126: First Victory

Chapter 1126: First Victory

"What’s going on with the counter? Are your formations malfunctioning?" Sect Leader Shuang questioned Sect Lader Qing after seeing the puzzling situation.

Sect Leader Qing calmly responded, "The formations are working properly. We had tested them prior to your arrival."

Sect Leader Shuang was not satisfied by this answer and continued, "You’re telling me to believe that an Inner Court disciple from the Boundless Yin Yang Sect is overwhelming a top three disciple from my sect? That won’t happen even in your dreams! There must be something wrong with the formation!"

As the spectators began to question the functionality of the formation, the Yin Qi counter continued to climb at an astonishing pace. In fact, the rate of increase grew even faster with each passing moment, leaving the onlookers in disbelief.

Within minutes, Feng Ling’s counter had reached an astonishing ’126’. Meanwhile, Su Yang’s counter remained at zero.

Inside the formation, Feng Ling was overwhelmed with pleasure, moaning uncontrollably as her once dignified appearance had disappeared entirely.

"Please! This is too much pleasure! I am going to go crazy at this rate!" Feng Ling pleaded with an erotic expression on her pretty face.

"Don’t worry, it’ll end very soon," Su Yang responded as he increased the intensity of his techniques even more.

"Ahhh~!"

Feng Ling’s little sister gushed with Yin Qi until every last drop was drained from her body.

"W-what is this?! What kind of pleasure is this?!" Feng Ling cried out in a terrified voice. Not even the number one disciple of the Mystic Delight Pavilion had ever managed to come close to what she was currently experiencing.

If she had to compare the two, it would be like comparing a toddler’s clumsy massage to the skilled hands of a seasoned master.

"This is what your sect stole from the Boundless Yin Yang Sect. This is the God of Pleasure’s dual cultivation technique!" Su Yang said to her.

However, Feng Ling didn’t respond, and she’d also stopped moaning.

Feng Ling had collapsed from overwhelming pleasure.

Seeing this, Su Yang stopped moving. However, before leaving the formation, Su Yang made sure to release his Yang Qi several times, filling Feng Ling’s cave and covering her body with it.

When Su Yang left the formation, the counter above him was at ’4’ and ’301’.

The entire area fell into a stunned silence as Su Yang stepped out of the formation. Not only was he the first to win, but he had done so before the time limit expired. This could only mean one thing—his partner had fallen unconscious!

After coming out of the formation, Su Yang looked at Sect Leader Qing and gestured, "My partner is unconscious. I’d like the Sect Leader to confirm it."

Sect Leader Qing nodded and entered the platform.

"I am also coming!" Sect Leader Shuang followed to ensure there was no foul play.

Sect Leader Qing and Sect Leader Shuang stepped into the formation together. While Sect Leader Qing remained composed, showing little reaction as though she had anticipated this outcome, Sect Leader Shuang wore an expression of utter bewilderment, clearly stunned by the scene before her.

Sect Leader Qing made a gesture toward one of the sect elders from the Boundless Yin Yang Sect, who happened to be a doctor.

"Examine this disciple for any injuries," she said.

"Yes, Sect Leader."

While the sect elder carefully examined Feng Ling, Sect Leader Shuang summoned her own doctor for a second opinion. Unlike the sect elder from the Boundless Yin Yang Sect, this doctor wasn’t part of the Mystic Delight Pavilion but one of the esteemed guests Sect Leader Shuang had brought with her.

"Sect Leader, after careful examination, I can guarantee that this disciple collapsed due to exhaustion, and there are no indications of foul play," said the sect elder.

"Thank you."

"Doctor Hu, if you don’t mind…" Sect Leader Shuang looked at the handsome man standing before her.

Notably, all of Sect Leader Shuang’s guests were handsome men.

Doctor Hu examined Feng Ling a moment later.

In the end, he came to the same conclusion as the sect elder—that there was no foul play.

Despite the outcome, Sect Leader Shuang still couldn’t believe that Su Yang had managed to overwhelm one of their top disciples in just a few minutes. Even the sect elders at her sect wouldn’t be able to achieve this astonishing feat.

She turned to look at Su Yang and asked with a frown on her face, "What did you do to my disciple?"

"I only did what I was supposed to," Su Yang replied with a teasing smile. "But if the Sect Leader doesn’t believe me, I’m more than willing to prove it to you directly. After all, we have plenty of time before the others are finished." Your next chapter is on empire

Sect Leader Shuang’s eyebrows twitched at Su Yang’s implication.

"You dare ask to cultivate with me? You don’t even qualify to lick my feet!" She exclaimed.

"If you say so." Su Yang shrugged, seemingly unaffected by Sect Leader Shuang’s words.

"The audacity of this disciple is truly something else. How can he speak to Fairy Shuang with such a tone?" Sect Leader Shuang’s guests commented.

"Honestly, I kind of like his fearless character. You don’t see that often these days."

Sometime later, Su Yang said, "If there’s nothing else, I’d like to go cultivate and prepare for my next exchange."

Although he had seemingly overwhelmed Feng Ling with ease, in reality, he had exerted some effort. After all, his opponent was a top disciple who learned his dual cultivation techniques. While it wasn’t enough to deplete all of his energy, he would need to replenish his Profound Qi before the next match. Otherwise, he risked running out of energy before securing victory against the Mystic Delight Pavilion.

"You can go cultivate. Good job, Disciple Xiao. I’ll make sure to reward you properly once this is all over," Sect Leader Qing said with a gentle smile gracing her beautiful face as she returned to her seat.

Meanwhile, Sect Leader Shuang wore a grumpy expression, her displeasure evident as she took her seat.

chapters.title: Chapter 1127: Standard Procedure
chapters.body:
Chapter 1127: Standard Procedure

Chapter 1127: Standard Procedure

Once the Sect Leaders returned to their seats, Su Yang sat on the platform and closed his eyes to cultivate, quickly restoring his Profound Qi.

For the next four hours, nearly every single individual in the audience speculated about Su Yang’s true abilities.

"Disciple Xiao actually managed to defeat one of their top three disciples in less than half an hour. There’s a good chance he might actually help the Boundless Yin Yang Sect win this Dual Cultivation Exchange!" One excited disciple said, her voice filled with anticipation,

"I wouldn’t get my hopes up if I were you. Although Disciple Xiao has defeated one of their top three disciples, we don’t know how many more victories we’ll achieve. If none of the Core Disciples can beat their opponent, that would mean Disciple Xiao has to cultivate several more times, and I highly doubt he could last that long against so many elites."

"Even if we don’t win this exchange, it wasn’t an utter defeat, and we even defeated one of their top three disciples, saving us an unfathomable amount of face."

Meanwhile, the Mystic Delight Pavilion disciples were seething with anger, cursing at Su Yang under their breath. Most of them believed that he hadn’t resorted to some foul play against Feng Ling, convinced that his victory couldn’t have been fair.

"Damn it! I can’t believe Senior apprentice-sister Feng would lose in such a manner!"

"Nonsense! Senior apprentice-sister Feng did not lose! Foul play doesn’t count!"

"There’s no way a disciple of the Boundless Yin Yang Sect could defeat our disciples, much less a mere Inner Court disciple!"

At the same time, Sect Leader Qing’s guests were intrigued by Su Yang’s existence.

"Fairy Qing, where did the Boundless Yin Yang Sect find such a unique disciple?" A beautiful young woman wearing crimson robes asked.

"The City of Pleasure," she replied.

"What? The City of Pleasure?" Discover more stories at empire

Nobody there expected Su Yang to come from such a vulgar background.

"He worked as a masseur there, and he even had his own store. According to the sect elder who recruited him, his business was quite popular. Isn’t that right, Elder Chu?" Sect Leader Qing directly mentioned the one responsible for recruiting Su Yang.

Elder Chu, sitting nearby, added, "Yes, that’s correct. Not only was his business situated in the Red Light District, the most prominent business area, but he also possessed a Medallion of Pleasure."

"What?! His business had a Medallion of Pleasure?!"

The woman in crimson robes exclaimed, her eyes widening in surprise. Though she had never visited the City of Pleasure, even someone like her had heard of the Medallion of Pleasure and understood its immense significance.

’Medallion of Pleasure…?’ Sect Leader Shuang frowned after hearing this information.

Before rising to her current position as the Sect Leader of the Mystic Delight Pavilion, Sect Leader Shuang had run a business in the City of Pleasure. This firsthand experience meant she was well aware of the prestige and significance of the Medallion of Pleasure.

’The only way for someone his age to have a Medallion of Pleasure is through inheritance…’ Sect Leader Shuang narrowed her eyes at Su Yang and tried to guess where his medallion came from.

An hour later, Feng Ling woke up from her slumber.

"Where am I?" she looked around in a daze.

"You’re currently at the Boundless Yin Yang Sect’s medical hall. How are you feeling, Disciple Feng?"

"Master…" Feng Ling stared at the woman sitting beside her.

Then she remembered about the Dual Cultivation Exchange.

"T-the exchange! What happened?!" she asked.

"You lost after falling unconscious. It’s only been two hours since then."

"Is that so… What about that disciple—my opponent?" she then asked.

"Why are you asking about him? Don’t tell me you…"

Feng Ling blushed as she hastily responded, "What?! Of course not! I’m just curious if he’s still able to continue!"

"He’s currently cultivating to replenish his Profound Qi, but I doubt he’ll be able to achieve another victory."

Feng Ling fell silent. After a moment of silence, she muttered, "I don’t know… There’s something different—strange about him."

"Can you elaborate? What happened during your session? How did he overwhelm you?" Her Master inquired.

"That disciple… he knew our sect’s techniques…"

"What?!" Her Master stood up in shock.

"That’s impossible! You must’ve remembered wrong because—"

"No, I am certain that was our sect’s technique. I have experienced it countless times by now, so there’s no way I could be wrong about this, and his understanding of the technique is incomparably better than even our elders. I don’t understand how he achieved it."

After a moment of silence, her Master said, "Disciple Feng, I don’t doubt you. However, take a moment to recall your exchange again."

Feng Ling sighed, "You don’t have to believe my words, Master. Just wait until the others cultivate with him. I’m sure they’ll say the same thing."

"Okay… Get some more rest. I’ll speak with the Sect Leader."

Feng Ling nodded.

Sometime later, formation number seven opened, and only one participant emerged. She was a disciple of the Mystic Delight Pavilion, having successfully overwhelmed her partner and ended the exchange early.

"Look! Senior apprentice-sister Jin has come out! She’s overwhelmed her opponent!"

"That’s only natural. She’s our number one disciple, after all."

After coming out, Disciple Jin looked around to see if anyone else had managed to come out earlier.

When she noticed Su Yang in the corner of her eyes, her head automatically snapped to look in his direction.

"What…? Why is he out already?" she muttered in a daze.

However, before she could figure anything out, Sect Leader Qing appeared on the stage again with the doctor.

"Sect Leader Shuang, are you not going to confirm the results?" Sect Leader Qing asked when Sect Leader Shuang hadn’t left her seat.

"Hah! Unlike the Boundless Yin Yang Sect, I am confident that my disciple would never resort to foul play. There’s simply no need, after all. However, if you’re worried, you can go ahead and check the results," she said.

"It’s not a matter of trust. This is just standard procedure." Sect Leader Qing shook her head as she entered the formation with her doctor.

Hearing this, Disciple Jin raised an eyebrow, puzzled by the situation.

"Foul play?"

She turned to look at Su Yang with a deep frown.

chapters.title: Chapter 1128: Break Time
chapters.body:
Chapter 1128: Break Time

Chapter 1128: Break Time

While Sect Leader Qing went to check on her disciple with a doctor, Disciple Jin approached Su Yang and inquired with a frown on her face, "What did you do? Where is Disciple Feng Ling, your opponent?"

Su Yang calmly responded, "The same thing as you."

The frown on Disciple Jin’s face deepened, and she sneered, "You mean to tell me that you overwhelmed Feng Ling before I managed to dominate my opponent? You’re quite the jester. I don’t believe you."

Su Yang smiled and said, "Whether you believe me or not isn’t important, nor does it matter. After all, you’ll be experiencing it soon enough."

"You—"

"I have confirmed that there was no foul play," Sect Leader Qing interrupted Disciple Jin as she stepped outside the formation.

"That’s only natural. I wouldn’t resort to such detestable actions, unlike someone," Disciple Jin commented.

Knowing they’d never believe him regardless of what he said, Su Yang remained silent.

As time passed, more and more formations opened up. In just three hours, six people, including Su Yang, finished their exchange. However, Su Yang was the only one from the Boundless Yin Yang Sect who dominated his opponent. The others had been dominated by the disciples of Mystic Delight Pavilion.

As for the disciples of the Mystic Delight Pavilion, they all exited their formation with prideful expressions on their faces. However, their faces became filled with shock after seeing Su Yang.

"W-what’s he doing out here?"

"His opponent was Sister Feng Ling, right? Where is she?"

"Disciple Jin, what happened?"

These disciples all turned to Disciple Jin for answers, and she explained the situation to them.

"What?! He dominated Sister Feng?! Impossible! Her hand techniques are the best within the sect! There’s no way she could’ve lost to that… ugly buffoon!"

"He must’ve cheated somehow!"

Disciple Jin then said, "Unfortunately, the doctor Sect Master Shuang brought had confirmed that there was no foul play, so there’s nothing we can do about it."

After another half an hour, another individual exited the formation. Unsurprisingly, it was another disciple from the Mystic Delight Pavilion.

The odds were fully stacked against the Boundless Yin Yang Sect now, with seven defeats, one victory, and two unknowns.

Once the final hour ended and the four-hour time limit had been reached, the remaining formations opened, and the disciples inside exited shortly after.

In the end, the Boundless Yin Yang Sect had eight defeats and two victories, one of which belonged to Yu Hang.

"Although Senior Apprentice Yu won his exchange, it’s hopeless. There’s no way our two disciples can defeat the remaining eight, and the Mystic Delight Pavilion still has their top 2 disciples…"

"Ahh… I knew it was over before it even began."

The Boundless Yin Yang Sect disciples were dispirited, but it was an outcome they all expected.

"What? We had two victories? Who won the other match?" Yu Hang was surprised to hear this.

Before he could get an answer, Sect Leader Qing said, "If you have been eliminated, please leave the stage immediately."

Soon, the majority of the disciples from the Boundless Yin Yang Sect exited the stage except for two individuals.

"That bastard actually won his exchange?! Impossible!" Yun Xiao Hong exclaimed after seeing Su Yang remain on the stage, his eyes wide with shock and disbelief. "He must have gotten lucky with his opponent!"

Su Yang looked over at him and sneered, "For that to be the first thing you utter after losing, how pathetic."

"You—?!" Yun Xiao Hong’s face flushed with redness after being mocked, but he was unable to retort.

The judge spoke a moment later, "The Mystic Delight Pavilion has eight disciples left while the Boundless Yin Yang Sect only has two. We will begin the next exchange in ten minutes. Take your next number while you’re at it."

Su Yang was the first to grab his next number.

"Number one." Su Yang showed his number to the Mystic Delight Pavilion, almost as if he was challenging them.

Yu Hang didn’t bother taking a number since he was automatically number two. Meanwhile, the Mystic Delight Pavilion disciples went to grab a number from one to eight.

Explore more at empire

"Yes! I got number one! I can’t wait to show him who’s boss!" the disciple who picked Su Yang’s number almost began jumping joyfully.

Su Yang looked at that disciple and asked, "What rank are you? Wait, let me take a guess."

After assessing the eight disciples one by one, he smiled and said, "You’re either number 6 or 7 out of the eight, am I right?"

That disciple’s eyes widened after hearing Su Yang’s words. Sure enough, she was ranked 6th out of the eight female disciples there.

"He can tell our capabilities just by looking at us?" she mumbled in a terrified tone.

"What a joke. He obviously researched us beforehand. Don’t fall for his trickey."

Su Yang responded to that comment, "How could I have researched you beforehand when I didn’t even know who’d be participating until the last moment? Also, I don’t know anyone from your sect."

Su Yang suddenly pointed at the female disciple on the far left and started numbering them from left to right, "Fourth, sixth, second, first, fifth, seventh, eighth, and third."

The female disciples were dumbfounded. Although they didn’t want to entertain him, they had to look around to see if he was right.

"Impossible… He’s actually right…"

"H-he must’ve gotten lucky. There’s no way he could see our dual cultivation skills just by looking at our appearance…"

After looking at their fellow disciples, they realized that Su Yang had managed to guess their ranks accordingly.

Of course, he didn’t come to this conclusion just by looking at their appearance. Although it didn’t seem like it, he had been paying attention to their counter since he finished his exchange, and he estimated their abilities based on the results.

"Your break time is over. Number one and number two, enter your rooms."

The judge announced a moment later.

chapters.title: Chapter 1129: Recording Device
chapters.body:
Chapter 1129: Recording Device

Chapter 1129: Recording Device

After being called, Su Yang approached the formation with the female disciple.

"Do you wish to showcase your session?" The judge asked them.

"I do," said the female disciple, who immediately glared at Su Yang afterward.

"I’ll decline," Su Yang shook his head.

"Why? Are you afraid of being exposed?" the disciple swiftly commented.

Su Yang didn’t respond and merely smiled in silence.

"Hmph."

With a cold sneer, the female disciple walked inside the formation. Su Yang also went inside a moment later.

Meanwhile, Yu Hang and his opponent agreed to showcase their session. Discover stories with empire

Once the formations were sealed, the female disciple with Su Yang retrieved a crystal ball and said, "I will be using this to record our session. This is for my protection. It’s not against the rules, either."

Su Yang chuckled, "You can record all you want, but I have a feeling you won’t show it to anyone afterward."

The disciple frowned, "How would you know?"

"Because I know you’d be too embarrassed."

"Embarrassed? Me? Hahaha!" the disciple burst out laughing while holding her stomach.

"I don’t know who you think you are, but you will never be able to embarrass me!"

Su Yang ignored her and began removing his clothes, revealing his perfect and refined physique to her.

The disciple’s eyes widened when she saw the majestic sword between his legs, even swallowing nervously. She could’ve never anticipated that someone with such an ordinary face would pack such a powerful weapon.

"Want to skip the foreplay?" Su Yang asked her.

"I don’t know what you’re planning, but I won’t fall for it." The female disciple removed her robes and entered the bed. "I’ll make you regret looking down on our Mystic Delight Pavilion!"

As Su Yang approached the bed, the disciple’s little sister became wetter with anticipation.

"Looks like foreplay won’t be necessary."

Su Yang inserted his rod inside the disciple’s lower cave a moment later.

"Ah~!"

The female disciple immediately released a loud moan, which greatly shocked her.

’Why am I moaning already?!’ she cried inwardly.

It didn’t take long for the disciple to realize and comprehend how Su Yang had managed to defeat Feng Ling, their top disciple.

’This intensity! This pleasure! It’s too much!’ she cried inwardly as her body gushed with Yin Qi nonstop.

’T-this technique! He knows our sect’s techniques!’

The female disciple was so overwhelmed with pleasure that all thoughts of the exchange vanished from her mind. She was in no condition to focus on anything other than the intense waves of pleasure coursing through her.

Eventually, she could no longer endure the overwhelming sensations and collapsed, her body succumbing to exhaustion as she drifted into a deep sleep.

"Seven minutes, huh?"

Su Yang calmly put his clothes back on and turned to look at the crystal ball, which was still recording.

After spending a few minutes fiddling with the crystal ball, Su Yang calmly placed it back down and prepared to leave the formation.

Outside, the atmosphere was eerily silent, and nearly all eyes were fixed on Su Yang’s formation.

"The counter has to be broken, right?" One of the six participating disciples muttered out loud after seeing the results.

According to the counter, Yin Qi was released over a hundred times while the counter for Yang Qi remained at zero, and it’d only been a few minutes since Su Yang and his opponent entered the formation.

The participants stared at the results in disbelief, unable to fathom how such an outcome was possible. The only explanation they could come up with was that the counter must have been broken or malfunctioning.

Suddenly, the formation opened, and Su Yang could be seen casually walking out.

"W-what!?"

Several individuals within the audience could be seen standing up in shock after seeing Su Yang.

"Why is he out already?! Don’t tell me he overwhelmed his opponent again?!"

Sect Master Shaung clenched her fists in frustration after seeing Su Yang’s face so soon again.

’This cannot be! There’s no way he overwhelmed another disciple of mine!’

After coming out of the formation, Su Yang looked at Sect Leader Qing and spoke in a worried tone, "Sect Leader, my opponent abruptly fell asleep in the middle of our cultivation. Can you check on her?"

"That bastard is mocking us again!" the Mystic Delight Pavilion disciples trembled in anger.

Sometime later, Sect Leader Qing and Sect Leader Shuang entered the platform with their doctors.

Soon, they began examining the female disciple, who was sleeping with a satisfied expression on her face.

"The results are the same as last time," said the Boundless Yin Yang Sect’s doctor.

The doctor with Sect Leader Shuang could only silently nod his head in agreement.

"There’s no way!" Sect Leader Shuang exclaimed.

Suddenly, she noticed the crystal ball resting by the bed.

’This is a recording device!’ she swiftly identified the item and grabbed it.

However, she quickly realized it was sealed after trying to access the recording.

She didn’t think too much about it and decided to wait for the disciple to wake up and access the recording.

Meanwhile, noticing the female disciples staring at him, Su Yang turned to look at them and smiled, "Just so you know, she had recorded our whole session."

"What?" the disciples were surprised to hear this coming from him.

"Don’t worry, I didn’t touch the recording."

"Why are you telling us this?" one of them asked.

"Because I have nothing to hide," he said with a shrug.

Sometime later, the Sect Leaders walked out of the formation and declared the results.

"There was no foul play. Disciple Xiao Yang has overwhelmed his opponent."

The results sparked another outrage among the audience, with most of the uproar coming from the Mystic Delight Pavilion’s side.

"There’s no way!"

"He must’ve cheated somehow!"

Unfortunately for the outraged disciples of the Mystic Delight Pavilion, no amount of shouting could alter the results. The decision was final, and their frustration hung in the air like an unresolved storm.

Meanwhile, the defeated female disciple was quietly carried away and brought to the same recovery area as Feng Ling.

chapters.title: Chapter 1130: Recording Device(2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 1130: Recording Device(2)

Chapter 1130: Recording Device(2)

Two hours have passed since Su Yang’s second exchange came to an end. When the female disciple who was knocked unconscious finally woke up, she found herself resting beside Feng Ling.

"Huh? Senior Sister Feng?" the female disciple muttered, clearly still in a daze.

"Welcome back, Junior Sister Ni."

"Senior Sister… where am I? What happened to me? I swear I was in the middle of the exchange…"

"You were brought here after losing consciousness during the exchange. It’s been two hours since then."

Disciple Ni’s eyes widened, and her memories gradually returned. Once she recalled everything, her face flushed with redness.

’Heavens! Did such things really happen?! Are my memories…correct?!’ she doubted her own memories after recalling them.

Suddenly, a sect elder of the Mystic Delight Pavilion entered the room.

"How are you feeling, Disciple Ni?"

"I feel a little exhausted," she said.

The sect elder proceeded to retrieve a crystal ball and showed it to her.

"Disciple Ni, this is your recording device, correct?" she asked.

"Yes, it’s mine." Disciple Ni confirmed.

"Then you must’ve recorded your session with Xiao Yang. The Sect Leader wants to see it, but she cannot access it without you."

Disciple Ni trembled after hearing this.

"T-that’s… Can I see it for a moment?"

The sect elder handed the recording device to her, who immediately looked at the recording inside.

As she watched the recording, Disciple Ni’s expression grew stiffer.

’There’s no way I can let the Sect Leader see this recording!’ she cried inwardly, her back soaked in cold sweat.

After a few minutes of awkward silence, Disciple Ni uttered in a low voice, "I-I’m sorry, but something seems to be wrong with the recording device… I think that Xiao Yang did something to it while I was unconscious…"

The sect elder frowned upon hearing this, but it wasn’t because she doubted Disciple Ni’s words.

"That despicable bastard!" she growled in a cold voice.

"Sorry for being useless," Disciple Ni sighed.

The sect elder shook her head and said, "This isn’t your fault. We didn’t anticipate that someone like Xiao Yang would be participating in the exchange, nor did we expect the Boundless Yin Yang Sect to act so shameless."

"I have to return to the Sect Leader now. Get some rest."
