Once the sect elder left and it was just Disciple Ni and Feng Ling in the room, Feng Ling spoke with a slight smile on her face, "There’s nothing wrong with the recording, am I right?"

Disciple Ni visibly shook at such words, and she quickly responded, "T-that’s not true! There’s really something wrong with the device!"

Feng Ling chuckled and said, "There’s no need to hide it from me. I also cultivated with him, so I know what you’re feeling. The way I acted during that exchange was unbefitting of me—it was almost like I’d turned into a different person—a beast."

"Senior Sister…" Disciple Ni looked at her with trembling eyes.

During her session with Su Yang, she had uttered words so embarrassing and shameful that they would utterly shatter her image if revealed. The mere thought of others hearing those recordings filled her with dread. Although she felt a deep sense of guilt for lying to the sect elder and Sect Leader Shuang, she knew she would rather die than allow those recordings to be exposed to anyone. Discover stories with empire

"Why don’t you just destroy the device?" Feng Ling suddenly suggested.

"That’s…" Disciple Ni looked at the crystal ball in her hands with a perplexed expression.

Although destroying the device would guarantee that nobody could ever view the recording, she found herself unable to bring herself to take such an action. Whether it was out of some inexplicable attachment to the memory or something else entirely, her hands trembled when she considered destroying it.

"I-I’ll do it later…" she eventually said.

Back at the exchange, Su Yang suddenly stood up and turned to look at Sect Leader Qing.

"Sect Leader, I have a suggestion."

"What is it?" she asked, sounding a little intrigued.

"In order to not waste time, I would like to immediately start the next exchange," he said, surprising everyone there.

"I don’t see how that would benefit you."

"It doesn’t benefit me, but I like a challenge. After all, this is currently too boring."

"Are you sure?"

Su Yang turned to look at the remaining participants and nodded with a confident smile, "I’m sure."

"This arrogant bastard…"

The female disciples clenched their fists and glared at him.

"What do you think, Sect Leader Shuang?" Sect Leader Qing turned to look at her.

Sect Leader Shuang didn’t respond immediately, her expression contemplative. This proposal clearly benefited the Mystic Delight Pavilion, as it meant Su Yang would have less time to recover his energy before the next round. From a strategic standpoint, it would be only natural for her to accept such an advantageous offer.

However, if Su Yang somehow manages to defeat the Mystic Delight Pavilion despite being at such a disadvantage, it would be a catastrophic blow to their sect’s reputation. The risk of humiliation weighed heavily on Sect Leader Shuang’s mind, making the decision far more complex than it initially seemed.

’Damn it, why am I contemplating so much on this? There’s no way the Boundless Yin Yang Sect would win this exchange, regardless of what that bastard has up his sleeves!’

Eventually, Sect Leader Shuang nodded, "Alright, let’s do it. However, I don’t want to hear any excuses when you lose."

After receiving the Sect Leaders’ approval, Su Yang looked at the remaining six participants and said, "So, who wants to be my partner next? I’ll make sure to end each session within fifteen minutes so that we can be done before the other two come out in two hours."

Hearing Su Yang’s outrageous declaration, one of the participants stepped forward. However, another disciple suddenly held her back and said, "There’s no need for you to deal with him, Senior Sister Xiao. You’re our top disciple, after all."

"Hmph," Disciple Xiao sneered before taking a step back.

chapters.title: Chapter 1131: Within 15 Minutes
chapters.body:
Chapter 1131: Within 15 Minutes

Chapter 1131: Within 15 Minutes

"I will be more than enough to take care of this arrogant bastard," said the disciple who stopped Disciple Xiao from stepping forward.

"I will leave him to you, Junior Sister Xue," said Disciple Xiao.

"Leave him to me!"

Once his next opponent was decided, Su Yang entered the formation with her.

The audience immediately began counting the seconds, their eyes staring at the counter.

"He said he’ll overwhelm his opponents within fifteen minutes, right? Do you think he’ll actually achieve it?"

"Hard to say, but he’s already overwhelmed two opponents within ten minutes, so it’s possible."

"It will only get harder for him since he has to defeat multiple opponents to win."

For the first three minutes, the counter remained steady at zero. Then, without warning, the Yin Counter ticked up to one. Once the shift occurred, the number began to climb rapidly, accelerating at an astonishing pace until it quickly entered double digits, leaving the onlookers in shock and disbelief.

"It has begun!"

The counter continued to rise relentlessly, showing no signs of slowing down. The numbers climbed higher and higher, mesmerizing and unsettling the onlookers. After several minutes, it finally paused, giving a fleeting moment of stillness. However, before anyone could blink twice, the counter resumed its ascent, climbing even higher, leaving everyone in awe and disbelief. Find adventures on empire

Eight minutes later, the counter finally came to a full halt, and Su Yang emerged from the formation shortly after.

The remaining 5 participants clenched their fists and jaws after seeing this.

"There’s no way!" they muttered under their breath.

Without giving them a glance, Su Yang walked straight to an unoccupied formation and said, "Next!"

The participants exchanged glances with each other.

"I-I will go!"

One of the female disciples said after a brief moment of hesitation, entering the formation with Su Yang while the Sect Leaders checked on the previous disciple.

’How?! How is he achieving this?!’ Sect Leader Shuang gritted her teeth in frustration after the doctors confirmed no foul play was involved.

In her mind, there was no way a disciple from the Boundless Yin Yang Sect could dominate their top disciples so easily.

’This is almost just like when the God of Pleasure was a disciple of the Boundless Yin Yang Sect!’ Sect Leader Shuang recalled all of the stories she’d heard about Su Yang during his days as a disciple.

Ten minutes later, Su Yang emerged from the formation again.

"Next!" he declared in a loud and confident voice.

"N-no way… How is he doing this…?"

The remaining participants trembled at his prowess. Even their number one disciple couldn’t help but feel overwhelmed by his presence.

"Allow me to go next."

One of them eventually stepped forward.

"Senior Sister Xi!"

The others looked at her with wide eyes. Disciple Xi was their number two, right behind Disciple Xiao.

"Senior Sister, why don’t we go first? That way, we can tire him out for—"

"Are you looking down on me?" Disciple Xi frowned.

"T-that’s not—"

"I don’t need anyone to ’weaken’ him for me! I can’t believe you would even utter such words! Are you not ashamed of yourself?!"

After lecturing her junior sister, Disciple Xi approached Su Yang and said, "I’ll give you some time to recover your energy. I don’t want any excuses when you lose to me."

Su Yang smiled at her words and said, "I like your attitude. As a reward, I’ll treat you especially well. Also, I don’t need any rest."

"Suit yourself." Disciple Xi did not try to persuade him and entered the formation first.

Once the formation was sealed, Disciple Xi said, "I will go first. In the Mystic Delight Pavilion, my mouth techniques are second to none!"

Su Yang nodded and said, "I will give you five minutes to show off."

He removed his clothes, revealing his majestic sword to her.

Disciple Xi swallowed nervously.

’S-so big…?’

Su Yang approached her, who was sitting on the bed, and said, "Your five minutes starts now."

The very next moment, Disciple Xi grabbed his hot rod with her hands and moved her mouth toward the tip.

Soon, she began licking it. Once she was used to his size, she opened her mouth wide and began pleasing him with it.

Meanwhile, Feng Ling and Disciple Ni returned to the platform as spectators.

"What’s going on? Why are there only four sisters left?" Disciple Ni wore a puzzled look on her face.

She’d only been gone for a little over two hours, but the number of participants left suggested much longer had passed.

"Hm? Senior Sister Ni and Senior Sister Feng? You’re back?"

"What’s going on?" Feng Ling inquired.

"Ah… this is what is happening…" The spectators explained the situation to them.

"What?! He’s taking on the others one after another without rest?!"

Feng Ling trembled in awe after learning the truth.

’To think he’d do something so arrogant! While his skills are godlike—enough to defeat even Disciple Xiao, he might not have the stamina to last until the end!’

Feng Ling didn’t doubt that Su Yang had the capability to defeat even their best disciple. However, whether he had the stamina to do such a thing was an entirely different story.

To overwhelm dual cultivators of their caliber in such a short time demanded an extraordinary level of stamina and immense Profound Qi. The intensity of such an exchange was equivalent to weeks of normal dual cultivation compressed into just a few minutes, so while their session may seem short, it was unfathomably exhausting.

"Your mouth techniques are not bad, but unfortunately, you’ll need much more than this to truly satisfy me," said Su Yang after the five minutes were up.

’N-no way! Why hasn’t he released his Yang Qi?! Most people don’t last even a minute under my techniques!’ Disciple Xi gnashed her teeth in frustration and puzzlement.

"Now it’s my turn."

Su Yang pressed her down on the bed and poked her lower entrance with his saliva-soaked sword.

Disciple Xi moaned loudly when she felt his massive rod spreading her inner cave wide apart, her body trembling in excitement.

chapters.title: Chapter 1132: Only One Left
chapters.body:
Chapter 1132: Only One Left

Chapter 1132: Only One Left

When the spectators saw the Yin Counter increasing rapidly as usual, the Mystic Delight Pavilion disciples swallowed nervously, their faces filled with awe and fear.

"Even Senior Sister Xi couldn’t make him release his Yang Qi once?! That’s ridiculous!"

"I bet she didn’t even use her mouth techniques."

"It took Xiao Yang five whole minutes to make his opponent climax this time. He must be getting tired."

"It’ll only be a matter of time before we defeat him!"

"..."

Although the Mystic Delight Pavilion disciples remained confident in their ultimate victory over the Boundless Yin Yang Sect, there was no sense of happiness or pride in their expressions. After all, it had taken several of their top disciples to subdue a single individual.

The haughty arrogance that had surrounded them when they first arrived at the Boundless Yin Yang Sect had completely vanished. Now, their expressions were heavy with frustration and discomfort, and it was clear they no longer wished to linger.

Shortly after fourteen minutes had passed, Su Yang calmly emerged from the formation. However, it was clear to everyone present that he wasn’t in perfect condition. His normally composed demeanor was slightly offset by the faint sheen of sweat on his face. Despite this, his steady steps and calm expression exuded confidence.

"Next!" he declared as he walked to the next available formation.

"Disciple Xiao, are you sure you don’t want any rest? We only agreed that you could start the next exchange whenever you want. We didn’t say anything about having no breaks," Sect Leader Qing suddenly said to him.

The Mystic Delight Pavilion disciples flinched at such words, especially the participants. After hearing Sect Leader Qing’s words, they realized that Su Yang wasn’t forbidden from having breaks.

When they realized this, they began sweating with worry, as none of them were confident they’d defeat Su Yang if he were in perfect condition.

However, in response, Su Yang looked at her and laughed, "Do I look tired to you? I am just getting warmed up! Next! Or should I just take a break?"

Hearing this, two of the participants stepped forward at the same time.

"Ah, you can go first, Senior Sister Ruo."

"You can go first if you want, Junior Sister Miao."

Seeing this, Su Yang beckoned at them and said, "You know what? I can do it with both of you at the same time."

"You what?!" they exclaimed simultaneously.

"How much more do you have to mock us before you’re satisfied?!"

"Even if it were not against the rules, we’d never fight you together!"

They responded after snapping out of their daze.

Su Yang shrugged.

Without saying anything else, he entered the formation.

Not wanting to give him any more time to rest, the disciple surnamed Miao entered first.

Ten minutes later, Su Yang emerged from the formation. This time, there were several more drops of sweat on his face. Yet, his demeanor remained the same—full of confidence.

"Three left, huh? Come."

"..."

This time, Disciple Ruo entered the formation with him.

"This cannot be happening… Am I dreaming right now, Senior Sister Xiao?" The only other disciple asked her in a trembling voice.

Disciple Xiao clenched her fists and gritted her teeth. She wanted to give a response, but she also had the same doubts, so she couldn’t answer.

Thirteen minutes later, Su Yang came out of the formation again.

Su Yang didn’t say anything this time and walked straight into the next formation.

"I’ll go, Senior Sister Xiao. I know I shouldn’t say this, but—"

"I know," she interrupted.

The disciple nodded and entered the formation shortly after.

Meanwhile, Sect Leader Shuang was trembling in her seat.

’How?! How is this possible?! How is he defeating all of my disciples?! He’s even knocking them unconscious!’

However, no matter how much she thought about it, Sect Leader Shuang couldn’t comprehend the situation.

Eventually, she turned to look at Sect Leader Qing and said, "I see! That disciple—he’s not actually a real disciple but someone you hired just for this! This explains why you suddenly challenged us! This explains why none of our disciples can defeat him! This explains everything!"

Sect Leader Qing turned to face her and, for the first time ever, showed clear mockery on her face and said, "Sect Leader Shuang, you should keep your delusions at the Mystic Delight Pavilion."

"What did you say?!"

"While it’s true that I challenged your Mystic Delight Pavilion because I knew our chances of winning were high, I wouldn’t do something as shameless as hiring a professional dual cultivator to disguise as a disciple just for a mere dual cultivation exchange."

"Also, I already told you about Xiao Yang’s background. He’s from the City of Pleasure. If you don’t believe me, you can investigate his background yourself later."

"T-that doesn’t mean anything! You could’ve easily created that identity!"

Sect Leader Qing sighed, "You’re quite the sore loser, Sect Leader Shuang, and the exchange hasn’t even come to an end yet. I cannot imagine how much noise you’ll make when you actually lose."

Sect Leader Shuang trembled in anger, and her body exuded obvious bloodlust.

"Sect Leader Shuang, if you think we’ll just sit here and let you attack Sect Leader Qing, think twice," said one of the guests brought by Sect Leader Qing.

"Do not forget where you are. This is not the Mystic Delight Pavilion but the Boundless Yin Yang Sect," said another.

"Why don’t we all calm down?" Sect Leader Qing said with a calm expression.

At this moment, Su Yang emerged from the formation once again.

"Heavens! He’s actually defeated another opponent!"

"You can do it, Senior apprentice-brother Xiao! Defeat the Mystic Delight Pavilion!"

"The Mystic Delight Pavilion is no match for Senior Brother Xiao! Hahaha!"

The Boundless Yin Yang Sect disciples started cheering loudly, their faces filled with hope as Su Yang defeated his 7th opponent in a row. .comy Virtual Library Empire

"You’re the only one left—assuming my fellow disciple also wins his match," Su Yang said to the last participant from the Mystic Delight Pavilion, who was also their top disciple.

chapters.title: Chapter 1133: End Of The Exchange
chapters.body:
Chapter 1133: End Of The Exchange

Chapter 1133: End of the Exchange

After being called out by Su Yang, Disciple Xiao, the Mystic Delight Pavilion’s top disciple, closed her eyes and took a long, deep breath, her chest rising and falling rhythmically as she worked to stabilize her emotions.

’Calm down. There’s no way I’d lose to someone who looks like he’s on the verge of falling unconscious from exhaustion!’ Disciple Xiao encouraged herself as she stared at Su Yang, who was soaked in sweat.

’Who am I? I am the undisputed number one disciple in the Mystic Delight Pavilion—the number one dual cultivation sect in the Four Divine Heavens!’

Disciple Xiao entered the formation with Su Yang shortly after.

The Mystic Delight Pavilion disciples could only clench their fists—and their buttocks—as they anxiously awaited the results. Although they had unwavering trust in Disciple Xiao’s abilities as their number one female disciple, a sense of unease lingered in the air. Facing a dual cultivation monster like Su Yang, who had already overwhelmed so many of their top disciples, made it difficult to hold onto hope.

Inside the formation, Su Yang removed his clothes, revealing his glistening body and majestic sword.

Disciple Xiao subconsciously swallowed after seeing his sword, and her body began heating up with anticipation.

"Before we begin, I have a question for you," Su Yang suddenly said.

Disciple Xiao didn’t respond and silently stared at him.

"As the number one disciple of the Mystic Delight Pavilion, I find it hard to believe you’re unaware of the origins of your sect’s techniques," Su Yang said calmly, his piercing gaze fixed on Disciple Xiao. "Surely, you must know the truth—their true origins."

Disciple Xiao narrowed her eyes and said, "You’re still trying to slander our sect? There’s no way the Mystic Delight Pavilion’s techniques belonged to the Boundless Yin Yang Sect. You must be confused and unwilling to accept the fact that our Mystic Delight Pavilion surpassed your Boundless Yin Yang Sect."

"I see… I guess you really don’t know anything. Forget it."

"Forget it?! You think you can slander my sect and just tell me to ’forget about it’?!"

Su Yang shrugged, "The truth will be revealed eventually. Anyway, let’s get this exchange started."

Disciple Xiao removed her clothes, revealing her beautiful, slender body.

"You will not defeat me—the Mystic Delight Pavilion!"

While they began their cultivation session, the spectators waiting outside were filled with worry, especially the Mystic Delight Pavilion disciples.

None of them had anticipated the dual cultivation exchange would reach this point. Most of them expected an overwhelming victory against the Boundless Yin Yang Sect, so being on the verge of defeat really messed with their minds.

However, no one felt as ashamed and humiliated as Sect Leader Shuang. She had brought her esteemed friends to witness what she believed would be the Boundless Yin Yang Sect’s inevitable downfall, only for them to bear witness to the Mystic Delight Pavilion’s embarrassing and unexpected defeat. Her face was pale with frustration, her pride as sect leader crumbling under the weight of their failure.

’No! We haven’t been defeated yet! Disciple Xiao will defeat that detestable bastard for sure!’

Meanwhile, the Boundless Yin Yang Sect disciples felt like they were on cloud nine. Even if Su Yang were to be defeated at this point, none of them would be upset, as he’d already prevented the Boundless Yin Yang Sect from utter humiliation.

Of course, there were a few who weren’t happy about the situation—about Su Yang’s performance.

Yun Xiao Hong was one of these few individuals.

’Damn it! Due to his performance, his reputation will undoubtedly skyrocket, becoming a hero in the sect, and I, who butted heads with him, will become the villain!’’

Six minutes into Su Yang’s exchange, the Yin Counter started increasing. This time, it would reach a number that far exceeded what the previous participants were able to endure.

Ten minutes… fifteen minutes…

Fifteen minutes had passed since they entered the formation, but Su Yang hadn’t emerged yet, and the Yin Counter continued to increase, reaching nearly half a thousand.

"A-as expected of the number one disciple… I cannot imagine releasing my Yin Qi nearly half a thousand times in such a short amount of time…"

Both sects were in awe of Disciple Xiao’s achievement.

"She even managed to endure more than fifteen minutes."

However, the Yin Counter stopped right before another minute could pass.

"N-no way… Did Senior Sister Xiao lose…?"

Everyone there held their breath for the next few moments until the formation opened and Su Yang walked out.

After taking a deep breath, Su Yang looked at Sect Leader Qing and said, "Sect Leader, my opponent has collapsed from exhaustion. You can examine her."

Sect Leader Qing nodded with a smile on her face.

She looked at Sect Leader Shuang as she stood up and said, "Are you going to come with me?"

"..."

Sect Leader Shuang remained silent.

Sect Leader Qing didn’t say anything else and entered the formation with a doctor.

Continue your journey on My Virtual Library Empire

She came back out a few moments later and declared, "I have confirmed that there was no foul play involved!"

"We won! We actually defeated the Mystic Delight Pavilion!" The Boundless Yin Yang Sect disciples immediately began celebrating wildly.

Meanwhile, Su Yang ignored the commotion and immediately began cultivating to recover his energy, as he was almost exhausted from doing so many sessions back to back without rest.

"Why the hell are you celebrating when the exchange is still ongoing?!" Sect Leader Shuang suddenly roared, instantly halting the commotion.

Everyone turned to look at formation number two, which was still sealed. The Yin and Yang Counters for it were neck-to-neck, with both counters at 16.

Sure enough, the exchange was still ongoing. However, everyone knew the outcome had already been decided. Even if the final participant from the Mystic Delight Pavilion were to win her match against Yu Hang, there was no way she could defeat Su Yang, someone even their number one disciple couldn’t defeat.

Sometime later, formation number two opened, and both participants stepped out, their appearances visibly exhausted.

chapters.title: Chapter 1134: End Of The Exchange(2)
chapters.body:
Chapter 1134: End Of The Exchange(2)

Chapter 1134: End of the Exchange(2)

When Yu Hang and his opponent emerged from the formation, the Yin and Yang Counter displayed the numbers 16 and 17, with the Yin Qi Counter slightly higher. This result indicated that Yu Hang had barely managed to secure his second victory in the exchange.

However, Yu Hang stumbled out of the formation, his body visibly trembling with exhaustion. His eyelids drooped heavily, and it was clear that he could barely remain standing, let alone face another opponent. Any chance of him continuing further was out of the question. Even so, his achievements were nothing short of remarkable. Defeating two Mystic Delight Pavilion disciples was an accomplishment to be proud of, especially given the circumstances.

Unfortunately for him, his achievements were completely overshadowed by Su Yang’s achievements, and the disciples barely paid him any attention.

"You might have defeated me, but this is the end for the Boundless Yin Yang Sect!" said the female disciple who was defeated by Yu Hang.

Yu Hang could only frown at her words, as he was already aware of that.

However, when the judge announced the results shortly after, both of them were left speechless.

"The Mystic Delight Pavilion has exhausted all of its participants! The winner of this dual cultivation exchange is the Boundless Yin Yang Sect!"

"WHAT?!"

Yu Hang and his opponent exclaimed after hearing this puzzling announcement.

"W-wait a minute! Why are you declaring the Boundless Yin Yang Sect’s victory when we still have matches left?!" the female disciple asked.

"Actually, your match was the last one."

The judge proceeded to explain the situation to them.

"T-that arrogant bastard defeated 8 of us by himself within four hours…? That’s impossible! Do you really expect me to believe—"

"We’re leaving!" Sect Leader Shuang suddenly stood up and yelled, interrupting the disciple.

However, Su Yang opened his eyes and stopped cultivating to speak, "Before you go, you should know that this isn’t over yet Mystic Delight Pavilion."

"What?" Sect Leader Shuang halted her steps and turned to look at Su Yang.

"Have you forgotten already? You stole our sect’s techniques. This won’t be over until you return what you’ve stolen and pay for your crimes," he reminded her of their crimes.

Sect Leader Shuang trembled in anger. Due to their humiliating defeat, she was no longer as patient as before, and killing intent exploded from her body.

Seeing this, Sect Leader Qing swiftly moved to stand between them and said, "If you attack my disciple after losing to him, who knows how it’ll affect the Mystic Delight Pavilion’s image? You should save whatever face you have left and leave peacefully."

Sect Leader Shuang trembled violently, but she somehow managed to control her emotions.

She glared at Su Yang and spoke to him using voice transmission, "You’ll regret offending me—the Mystic Delight Pavilion!" Enjoy new adventures from My Virtual Library Empire

Su Yang narrowed his eyes and glared back at her, "And you’ll regret stealing our techniques."

"What can you, a mere disciple, do about it? You don’t even have any proof!"

"Don’t worry, I have my ways to expose the Mystic Delight Pavilion."

Sect Leader Shuang frowned after hearing such bold claims, but she quickly dismissed them.

Without saying another word, she turned around and flew away.

The rest of the Mystic Delight Pavilion disciples hastily followed her.

Once the Mystic Delight Pavilion left the sect, Sect Leader Qing approached Su Yang and said, "Congratulations, Disciple Xiao. Not only did you manage to defeat the Mystic Delight Pavilion, but it was a complete victory for the Boundless Yin Yang Sect."

"I was only fulfilling my duties as a disciple," Su Yang said.

Sect Leader Qing smiled and said, "Now it is my turn to fulfill my duties as the Sect Leader. Disciple Xiao, for your achievements, I hereby promote you to Core Disciple. Moreover, since you were able to overwhelm your opponents, I will grant you an additional reward—access to the Eternal Yin Yang Cave."

"What?! Access to the Eternal Yin Yang Cave?!" The sect elders exclaimed in shock after hearing this generous reward for the first time.

"Is there anything else you want, Disciple Xiao? If it’s within my capabilities, I’ll do my best to help you." Sect Leader Qing continued, ignoring the sect elders.

"I don’t have anything in mind at the moment, but I will let you know once I need something."

Sect Leader Qing nodded.

She turned to look at the disciples and said, "The dual cultivation exchange has ended. You can all return to your lives."

"Disciple Xiao, I still need to speak with you. Come find me once you’ve recovered."

"I understand."

Su Yang left shortly after and returned to his living quarters.

Meanwhile, news of the Boundless Yin Yang Sect’s victory over the Mystic Delight Pavilion quickly spread, shocking the dual cultivation world.

"What? A single individual dominated the Mystic Delight Pavilion? Who and when did the Boundless Yin Yang Sect acquire such a talent?"

"I heard they recruited this individual from the City of Pleasure."

"Are you sure the rumors are exaggerated?"

"Wait a second… Xiao Yang… I know him! I experienced his massage before! I didn’t know he was a genius dual cultivator, too!"

Although the Mystic Delight Pavilion’s defeat became a widespread topic of discussion, it was largely confined to the dual cultivation community. Outside of this circle, most ordinary sects and cultivators paid little attention to the events. Dual cultivation was often seen as a niche practice, and many sects viewed it as irrelevant to their own pursuits.

That said, the Mystic Delight Pavilion’s defeat dealt a significant blow to its reputation within the dual cultivation world, while the Boundless Yin Yang Sect managed to reclaim some of its lost glory.

"What did you think of the exchange?" Su Yang asked Lin Xinyi once they returned home.

She pondered for a moment before responding, "It made me curious more than anything. What did you do to overwhelm those disciples?"

"Want to experience it yourself?"

"T-that’s…" she swallowed nervously.

"I’m joking. You won’t be able to handle it in your current state. However, once you increase your cultivation and endurance, I’ll let you experience it. Don’t worry, it won’t take too long."

Lin Xinyi nodded, but she couldn’t help but feel a bit disappointed.

chapters.title: Chapter 1135: After The Exchange
chapters.body:
Chapter 1135: After The Exchange

Chapter 1135: After the Exchange

"Congratulations on your promotion, Senior apprentice-disciple Xiao!"

"I knew you’d become a Core Disciple soon with your skills, but you still managed to surpass my expectations!"

A large group of female disciples gathered outside Su Yang’s living quarters early the following day, causing quite a commotion at Outcast Peak.

The outcast triples were also there. They stood together with dumbfounded expressions on their faces.

"D-did that newbie really defeat eight of Mystic Delight Pavilion’s top disciples by himself? It’s hard to believe."

"Even if we do not want to believe it, it won’t change the fact that it happened. The Sect Leader and many sect elders witnessed it."

"This begs the question, who the hell is Xiao Yang? I do not believe that he has improved that much in just a few months. He was definitely an expert dual cultivator even before coming to the Boundless Yin Yang Sect."

"But why would he lie about something like that? How does it benefit him?"

"Who knows…"

Sometime later, the door opened, and Lin Xinyi came outside to deal with the growing crowd outside her living quarters.

"Xiao Yang isn’t home. He already left to meet the Sect Leader," she said to the disciples.

The place became silent for a brief moment before the disciples started talking again.

"Junior—No, Senior apprentice-sister Lin, did Senior apprentice-disciple Xiao tell you anything about his achievements?! Such as the kind of techniques he used to subdue those Mystic Delight Pavilion disciples!"

There were several Core Disciples within the crowd, and despite Lin Xinyi being an Outer Court disciple, they still addressed her as senior apprentice-sister. Yet, nobody there found it odd.

Lin Xinyi proceeded to spend some time satisfying the disciples’ curiosity.

Meanwhile, Su Yang stood before Sect Leader Qing inside her quarters.

"Are you still going to deny your identity after pulling a stunt like that?" Sect Leader Qing asked him.

"Stunt? What are you talking about?" Su Yang acted ignorant.

"Why did you expose the Mystic Delight Pavilion? Now that everyone is aware of it, who knows what they’ll do to us? We don’t have the power to defend ourselves against the Mystic Delight Pavilion." Sect Leader Qing rubbed her eyes and sighed.

"Do you really intend to let them get away with stealing my—the sect’s techniques?" Su Yang asked with a frown.

"Of course not. However, it’s also true that there’s nothing we can do about it. Also, you just—"

"There’s nothing you can do, but I will do something about it." Su Yang interrupted.

Enjoy exclusive chapters from My Virtual Library Empire

"What are you going to do? Without evidence, it’ll only remain as hearsay and slander. You left the techniques behind without letting anyone know, so very few individuals knew about it. However, most of them have long left the sect. Besides Chen Yi and myself, nobody else knows about it."

"Speaking of Chen Yi, what’s that traitorous bastard up to right now?"

"He left the sect last night for some business. And to call him traitorous… are you implying that he had something to do with the Mystic Delight Pavilion stealing our techniques?" Sect Leader Qing frowned.

She didn’t want to believe that Chen Yi, who she’d spared before, would be willing to stab her in the back like this.

"You’re still as naive as ever, Sect Leader. If he was willing to stab you in the back once, why wouldn’t he be able to do it again? Although I am not 100 percent certain he is responsible, I am 99 percent certain. The way he defended the Mystic Delight Pavilion has the same vibe as that incident."

Sect Leader Qing’s jaw dropped at his words, not because she was shocked that Chen Yi had most likely betrayed the sect.

"Are you still going to deny that you’re—"

Su Yang suddenly approached her and pressed his fingers on her lips, sealing them.

He proceeded to create a formation around them that blocked all sound and said, "You never know when someone is hearing."

Once Su Yang released her lips, she said, "You know my room has multiple formations, right? Nobody will be able to eavesdrop on us."

"I am aware, but it’s not strong enough to reassure me. How about giving my living quarters a visit? There are several powerful formations placed there."

"Formations even more powerful than mine? How is that possible?" Sect Leader Qing looked at him with a suspicious gaze.

"It was set up by Xing Aiying."

"Senior Xing?! She was at the sect?!" Sect Leader Qing exclaimed, her face full of shock.

After recovering from her shock, she said, "Alright, let’s go to your place. However, I cannot go as the Sect Leader, as that would raise eyebrows."

She retrieved an appearance-altering pill and consumed it, transforming into someone he was familiar with.

"Chun Hua, huh? What happened to the real one?" Su Yang asked with a smile.

"I made her take a vacation," she responded with a smile.

The two of them left the Sect Leader’s quarters and went to Su Yang’s living quarters. When he returned, it was still crowded with female disciples.

"Senior apprentice-brother Xiao! You’re back!"

The female disciples quickly surrounded Su Yang.

"Sorry, everybody, but I have some urgent business with Disciple Chun here. I’ll entertain you afterward," he said to them.

"It’s a promise!"

Su Yang entered his living quarters with Chun Hua shortly after.

"Welcome ba—" Lin Xinyi froze after seeing Chun Hua.

"Sorry for the intrusion. I’ll be gone soon," said Sect Leader Qing.

"No, it’s fine. You’re not intruding at all."

"I need to speak with Disciple Chun here privately for a moment," Su Yang said.

"Okay."

Lin Xinyi watched as Su Yang and Chun Hua disappeared into their room.

’Does he intend to accept Senior apprentice-sister Chun as his next partner?’ she wondered inwardly.

Meanwhile, once Su Yang closed the door, he activated the formations left behind by Xing Aiying.

A moment later, he removed his disguise, revealing his handsome face again.

"S-Su Yang…"

Although she was already convinced of his identity as Su Yang, seeing him with her own eyes invoked a completely different feeling. The confirmation brought a wave of emotions, causing her to nearly fall to her knees.

chapters.title: Chapter 1136: The Problem With The Sect
chapters.body:
Chapter 1136: The Problem With The Sect

Chapter 1136: The Problem With the Sect

"S-Su Yang…" Sect Leader Qing muttered after snapping out of her daze. "Why do you look so… young?"

"Because this is how old I currently am. I died and reincarnated," he explained.

"Wait a second… you mean you actually died? I thought you somehow managed to come back to life. That—or you somehow faked your death."

Su Yang shook his head, "No, I truly died."

He explained his situation—what he’d been doing since his reincarnation. Naturally, he omitted some details, such as his new partners and having his own children now.

"Heavens…" Sect Leader Qing almost couldn’t believe her ears.

"Besides a few individuals, nobody is aware of my return. This is why I didn’t reveal my identity to you immediately. Moreover, if my enemies discover I’d returned, the Boundless Yin Yang Sect would be in trouble."

"I understand. Don’t worry, I won’t let another soul know about your return—even if that individual is from the Su Family."

"Thank you."

"But I must ask… Why did you come to the Boundless Yin Yang Sect first?"

Su Yang’s expression grew serious.

"I’ll get straight to the point. I came to the Boundless Yin Yang Sect for the Boundless Yin Yang Immortal Caves."

Sect Leader Qing’s eyes widened, but she wasn’t surprised.

"The Boundless Yin Yang Immortal Caves, huh? I haven’t allowed another disciple to visit that place since your last visit—mostly because it was still recovering its energy. That said, I don’t think you’ll be able to handle the energy in that place with your current cultivation," she said.

"I’m actually in the Divine Origin Realm right now."

"That still wouldn’t be enough. You should be at least at the Divine Saint Realm to be safe."

"I have a unique cultivation technique, so I’ll be fine. Moreover, I still have the Eternal Yin Yang Cave. That place will definitely boost my cultivation significantly."

"Do you intend on sucking the entire Enteral Yin Yang Cave dry as you did with the Fiery Yang Cavern?"

"Who knows." He shrugged.

Sect Leader Qing rubbed her eyes and sighed, "Anyway, if you want to enter the Boundless Yin Yang Immortal Caves, I can arrange it. However, you’ll need to do something for me."

However, Sect Leader Qing paused for a brief moment with a hesitant look on her face, "I know it is embarrassing for me to even say this, but I want you to help the Boundless Yin Yang Sect regain some of its footing. We’re in a worse shape than you think…"

Sect Leader Qing had a feeling that Su Yang would leave the Boundless Yin Yang Sect after using their Boundless Yin Yang Immortal Caves, so this was one way to keep him there for a little longer.

Su Yang narrowed his eyes and said, "You’re right. I never thought you’d be capable enough to utter such nonsense."

Sect Leader Qing trembled at his words.

"Did you think I was going to leave after getting what I needed from here?" Su Yang continued.

"If the sect weren’t in such a pathetic condition, I would’ve definitely left after entering the Boundless Yin Yang Immortal Caves. However, after seeing how pathetic the Boundless Yin Yang Sect has become, I can’t leave even if I want to."

Sect Leader Qing’s eyes flickered with emotions after hearing this.

Su Yang pointed at her and said, "Although I don’t have much time, I’ll put the Boundless Yin Yang Sect back on the right path."

Sect Leader Qing nodded, "The Eternal Yin Yang Caves is scheduled to open in a few months, but I’ll open it earlier for you. As for the Boundless Yin Yang Immortal Caves… You can come to me whenever you’re ready for it."

"Alright."

"So, do you have anything in mind now?" Sect Leader Qing asked a moment later.

"What do you think is the problem with the Boundless Yin Yang Sect right now? The sect operated properly before without my techniques, so it has nothing to do with the Mystic Delight Pavilion stealing my techniques."

Sect Leader Qing sighed, "As the Sect Leader, I can only blame myself for the sect’s downfall. After all, I went into seclusion after your death and allowed it to fall."

"And even at this moment, you don’t appear as passionate as you were in my memories," said Su Yang.

Sect Leader Qing looked Su Yang in the eyes and said, "To be honest, I think I am done being a dual cultivator. Besides cultivating with you as Chun Hua, I haven’t dual cultivated since you died."

"So you want to retire?"

Sect Leader Qing immediately shook her head, "No! I cannot retire while the Boundless Yin Yang Sect is in such a state, or my predecessors will haunt me. If I am going to retire, it has to be after the sect regains its glory."

"So you want to retire, just not now."

"It’s not like I can occupy my position as the Sect Leader forever, and it’s true that I no longer qualify to be one."

"What are you going to do after you retire?"

"I don’t know yet, but I am thinking of traveling the Divine Heavens. Some of my fondest memories in the sect were when I was an Inner Court disciple and traveling the world."

"What about you? What are you going to do now that you’ve returned?"

"There are too many things to count. Now there is another."

"Sorry…"

"Anyway, let’s get back to the topic. Besides your impotence as the Sect Leader, the disciples of this sect are also responsible for the sect’s downfall. Although their overall skills have grown compared to before, they lack pride and loyalty. None of them seem proud to be a disciple of this sect, and I don’t blame them."

.comy Virtual Library Empire

"The Sect Leader rarely shows her presence, our sect’s techniques are outdated, and worst of all, the sect is constantly being looked down on. I wouldn’t feel any pride being a disciple of such a place either," Su Yang shook his head.

chapters.title: Chapter 1137: Challenging Yun Xiao Hong
chapters.body:
Chapter 1137: Challenging Yun Xiao Hong

Chapter 1137: Challenging Yun Xiao Hong

"Then what do you suggest we do?" Sect Leader Qing asked.

"The disciples will naturally become more prideful as the sect’s status grows," Su Yang said thoughtfully. "However, a good reputation alone won’t be enough if I’m the one doing all the work. The others need to contribute to the sect’s growth as well. They must feel like they are actively a part of the sect, not just members who happen to belong here."

"Contribution, huh?" Sect Leader Qing mumbled with a pondering face.

Su Yang smiled and said, "There’s no need to overthink it. They may not be good enough to deal with the Mystic Delight Pavilion now, but once they learn my dual cultivation techniques, they’ll definitely surpass them."

"Your dual cultivation techniques?" she raised an eyebrow.

"The Mystic Delight Pavilion may have stolen the techniques, but the one who created them is right here. I can simply remake them."

Sect Leader Qing’s eyes widened after realizing this.

’He’s right! Why didn’t I think of this sooner?!’ she cried inwardly.

"How long will it take to replace the techniques?"

Su Yang pondered for a moment before responding, "About a week, I guess."

"That fast?"

"It’s not like I am creating new techniques. I am simply writing out existing techniques."

"Then I’ll leave it to you."

"I’ll start once I finish my deathmatch."

Sect Leader Qing raised her eyebrows and said, "You mean you’re really going to enter a deathmatch with Disciple Yun Xiao Hong? He’s no different than a little kid in your eyes. Why bother with him? You’re basically bullying him."

"Age doesn’t matter. I will slay anyone who deserves to be slain in my eyes. And if you consider this bullying, I have bullied people far weaker and younger than him in the other world. However, if you insist, I’ll give him a chance to apologize."

"Do as you wish," she sighed.

"Anyway, I’ll leave you alone for now. I’ll open the Eternal Yin Yang Cave for you in two weeks."

Su Yang nodded.

New n𝙤vel chapters are published on .cσ๓.

Sect Leader Qing returned to her quarters shortly after.

"Is everything okay?" Lin Xinyi asked him afterward.

"Yes, but I’ll be busy for a bit. By the way, I am going to fulfill my promise with Disciple Yun now. Want to watch?"

"You’re really going to fight him?" she looked at him with a worried face.

Su Yang placed a hand on her head and caressed her hair before speaking in a reassuring tone, "I’ll be fine."

"I’ll come with you," she said a moment later.

"Sure."

As they stepped out of their living quarters, Su Yang was reminded of the female disciples outside.

"I’m going to meet Disciple Yun right now, but we can chat on the way there," he said to them.

"Disciple Yun? Who?"

"I think he’s talking about Yun Xiao Hong."

"Ah! I remember now! They had a little argument, and Senior apprentice-brother Xiao promised he’d challenge Senior apprentice-brother Yun to a deathmatch if he became a Core Disciple."

"Senior apprentice-brother Xiao, you just became the sect’s hero. Why would you do something so reckless? You don’t gain anything from this."

"You’re right. I don’t gain anything from killing a nobody like Disciple Yun. However, this is about sending a message."

The female disciples swallowed nervously as they followed him.

Discover hidden tales at My Virtual Library Empire

The outcast triplets also decided to follow him.

After reaching the Inner Court, they were stopped by someone, as there were Outer Court disciples within their group.

"Can you let them inside for a bit? It won’t be long, and they won’t wander around," Su Yang said to the sect elder who stopped them.

"..."

"Alright. Make sure you keep an eye on them…" The sect elder said a moment later.

"Thank you."

Soon, they were stopped again right before reaching the Core Disciple’s area.

Normally, this place would be extremely strict with their rules, but with Su Yang being backed by the Sect Leader, the sect elder had to take a step back and let them pass.

"I never thought I’d be able to enter the Core Disciple’s area while only being an Outer Court disciple…" Wu Bing sighed.

"That pales in comparison to Disciple Xiao’s achievements. He became a Core Disciple in record time—even faster than the God of Pleasure!" Ji Ning said.

Sometime later, they arrived at Yun Xiao Hong’s living quarters.

Coincidentally, Yun Xiao Hong stood outside his door with another Core Disciple beside him, looking like they were returning home.

When the female Core Disicple noticed Su Yang and his group, she quickly mumbled something to Yun Xiao Hong, who was oblivious.

Yun Xiao Hong frowned and turned around to face Su Yang.

"W-what are you doing here?" he asked.

"What do you think? I came here to challenge you to a deathmatch just like I said I would if I became a Core Disciple. However, I’m willing to forgive you if you get on your knees and apologize to my partner for harassing her."

"What? Are you insane?" Yun Xiao Hong clenched his fists in anger.

"Are you scared?" Su Yang asked, a mocking smile tugging at the corners of his lips.

"Hahaha! Scared? Why would I be scared of you?!" Yun Xiao Hong began approaching Su Yang with a cold expression on his face.

"Are you sure you want to do this? You just became a Core Disciple, and even your reputation within the sect has skyrocketed. Do you really want to throw away everything so quickly?"

"If I don’t make an example out of you, people will think they can harass my partners. If you accept my challenge, come with me. Of course, you can just ignore me and walk away. However, I remember you swearing that you’d not refuse it. Are you a man of your own words, Disciple Yun? Or are you just another pathetic bastard who can only bark?"

Yun Xiao Hong began trembling in anger.

"Since you want to die an early death, I’ll gladly help you! After all, you’re our sect’s hero!" he roared.

chapters.title: Chapter 1138: A Peculiar Rumor
chapters.body:
Chapter 1138: A Peculiar Rumor

Chapter 1138: A Peculiar Rumor

After agreeing to Su Yang's deathmatch, Yun Xiao Hong followed him to the registration area. The sect elder in charge of overseeing such matters looked up and blinked in surprise, as it'd been hundreds of years since two Core Disciples wanted to fight each other to the death.

"I don't normally say this, but I think you should reconsider. You're both Core Disciples. It'd be a great loss to the sect to lose even one of you."

Su Yang then spoke, "I agree, and I gave him a chance to keep his life. However, he refused to even apologize, so here we are."

"Bastard, you're speaking as if my life is already in your hands!" Yun Xiao Hong gritted his teeth in frustration.

"Elder, it's not that I want to kill him either. However, he's simply too arrogant and doesn't know when to give up. With his character, he'll eventually offend someone he shouldn't and die a gruesome death. In that case, I might as well end his life right now and make it as painless as possible."

The sect elder rubbed his eyes in a stressed manner and sighed, "Are you sure you cannot reconcile with each other?"

Su Yang looked at Yun Xiao Hong and said, "I'm a generous and forgiving man, so I will give you another chance right now to apologize to me and my partner."

Yun Xiao Hong sneered in disdain at the thought of apologizing to Su Yang and said, "And I am a merciful man, so I will give you a painless death. Once you die, I will also take care of your partner for you."

Su Yang burst out laughing. Once he stopped, he turned to look at the sect elder with a serious expression and said, "Don't try to convince us anymore."

The sect elder sighed and said, "Unfortunately, this is out of my authority. If two Core Disciples are involved in a deathmatch, only the Sect Leader can approve of your match."

"The Sect Leader already approved of our deathmatch. I spoke to her before coming here."

"Really? Let me confirm it with her real quick."

The sect elder retrieved a communication jade slip and contacted her.

A few moments later, the sect elder put away the jade slip and looked at Su Yang in defeat.

"The Sect Leader has approved of this match. When do you want to fight?"

"I want to get this over with as soon as possible, so let's do it right now," said Yun Xiao Hong.

However, Su Yang shook his head and said, "I'm willing to fight today but not immediately. We can fight in six hours from now."

"Hahaha! After all that big talk, you want to wait?!" Yun Xiao Hong laughed, his voice full of mockery.

Su Yang sighed and said, "You should be thanking me. I'm giving you six more hours to live. Go spend that time embracing your partner one last time or something. Anyway, the reason I want to wait is simple—I want there to be a proper audience. If I don't make an example out of you in front of as many disciples as possible, others might try the same thing."

"Make an example out of me, you say?" Yun Xiao Hong was so angry that his entire body began trembling.

However, he suddenly stopped trembling a moment later.

"I will see you on the stage in six hours."

He spoke in a suspiciously calm voice and walked away.

Once Yun Xiao Hong left, Su Yang turned to face the group of disciples following him and said, "I'd appreciate it if you could help spread the word about our upcoming match."

"Of course!"

"Leave it to us!"

"I will personally ensure that every Outer Court disciple will be there to witness it!"

With the group's assistance, it didn't take long before news of Su Yang and Yun Xiao Hong's deathmatch spread throughout the sect, igniting excitement for many disciples, especially those who wished to see Su Yang's downfall.

"That Xiao Yang's arrogance truly knows no bounds. He just became a Core Disciple but thinks he's already on the level of those like Senior apprentice-brother Yun? What a joke!"

"I cannot wait to see Senior apprentice-brother Yun put that arrogant cunt in his place—six feet underground!"

While nearly half of the sect anticipated Su Yang's downfall with excitement, the other half was filled with concern over his upcoming deathmatch with Yun Xiao Hong. After all, Yun Xiao Hong had been a disciple of the sect for over two centuries, and his reputation was both well-earned and deeply rooted.

As news of the deathmatch spread like wildfire through the sect, disciples quickly filled the spectator stands. The arena wasn't built to accommodate the entire sect, so many were forced to watch from above, hovering in the air.

"Huh? He's already here?"

The disciples who had just arrived at the arena were surprised to see Su Yang already present and on the stage. However, he was sitting on the stage with his eyes closed, seemingly in cultivation.

The deathmatch had attracted so much attention that even the sect elders decided to show up to watch it, something that rarely happened.

"Seeing him on the stage made me recall a peculiar rumor." One of the sect elders suddenly commented out loud.

"What rumor?"

"That he used Sword Will in his last deathmatch."

"Sword Will?!"

The sect elders around him exclaimed in shock, their faces full of disbelief.

"That's right. And if I recall correctly, he was only an Outer Court disciple when I heard that rumor for the first time. Naturally, I didn't believe it. However, seeing him acting so confident… I don't know what to think."

"Hahaha! That's such bullshit! I'll eat my own underwear if he can use Sword Will!"

"Then I'll shave my hair and remain bald for the next decade!"

The sect elders began cracking jokes at each other.

"I hope you'll keep your words."

Sect Leader Qing suddenly appeared out of thin air, startling the sect elders with her unexpected presence.

chapters.title: Chapter 1139: Fighting Yun Xiao Hong
chapters.body:
Chapter 1139: Fighting Yun Xiao Hong

Chapter 1139: Fighting Yun Xiao Hong

"S-Sect Leader?! What are you doing here?"

The sect elders hastily stood up to properly greet her when they saw her face.

"You make it sound like I am not supposed to be here. Nearly the entire sect is here, yet you are surprised by my presence?" Sect Leader Qing calmly spoke.

"T-That's not what I meant… It's just that you've never participated before…" the sect elder scrambled his mind to make an excuse.

"You mean you've never seen me here before. However, I have definitely witnessed plenty."

The sect elders raised their eyebrows at her puzzling statement. Most of them had served the sect for thousands of years, yet none could recall a single instance where the Sect Leader had ever attended a deathmatch.

What they didn't know was that Sect Leader Qing was speaking of a time long before their own—an era when Su Yang had walked the sect grounds as a disciple for the first time. Back then, he had taken part in so many deathmatches that he came dangerously close to wiping out the entire Core Disciple ranks.

"Disciple Fei, what do you think will happen in this deathmatch? Although Senior apprentice-brother Yun has been a Core Disciple for much longer, I was there to witness Senior apprentice-brother Xiao's deathmatch with Shao Jianjun, and he killed Shao Jianjun without moving a muscle."

Disciple Fei and her roommate were also present at the deathmatch.

"I remember you said it wasn't Sword Will but some trickery," said Disciple Fei.

"T-That was back then! I have changed my mind since then!" her roommate quickly responded.

Disciple Fei narrowed her eyes at Su Yang and continued, "Whether it was really Sword Will or something else, we will find out the truth today."

"I don't see Disciple Lin anywhere. This is such an important event for her partner, yet she's nowhere to be seen?" One of the disciples there noticed Lin Xinyi's absence.

"She's probably already mourning his death."

"Hahaha! That's possible! I'm definitely going to try courting her later. Although she no longer has her Pure Yin Essence, she's still a top beauty and is sought-after."

Time passed swiftly, and in the blink of an eye, it was already time for the deathmatch to begin.

"Senior apprentice-brother Yun has arrived!"

All the attention in the arena instantly went to Yun Xiao Hong, who was making an entrance with his partner by his side.

"Make sure to give him a painful death for daring to fight you."

Yun Xiao Hong kissed his partner and responded in a confident voice, "Of course."

He turned to look at Su Yang, who was still cultivating on the stage, and coldly sneered, "You won't be able to continue acting tough in a moment."

Yun Xiao Hong entered the stage and stood on the opposite end of Su Yang.

Su Yang opened his eyes for the first time in six hours and calmly stood up.

A moment later, the judge stepped onto the stage and spoke loudly, "It has been a long time since two Core Disciples faced each other in the Life or Death arena. But now that you've both taken your places on the stage, your titles and status within the sect no longer hold meaning. From this point on, only one of you will walk away alive. If you have any last words, say them now."

"Any last words for your partner before you die?" Yun Xiao Hong said to Su Yang.

"That won't be necessary since I can speak with her later—after I clean up some trash here."

"Is that so? Don't regret that decision when you wake up in hell!" Yun Xiao Hong shouted as he retrieved his Empyrean-grade sword, one grade higher than Su Yang's Divine-grade sword.

Su Yang glanced at Yun Xiao Hong's sword and smiled, "Looks like I'll also be upgrading my sword after this."

Veins appeared on Yun Xiao Hong's forehead as he turned to the judge and shouted, "Can we begin the fight already?!"

The judge shook his head and said, "Since the Sect Leader is also here, she will be the one to begin the match."

Sect Leader Qing then spoke, "I don't have anything to say, so you may begin whenever."

The instant Sect Leader Qing finished her sentence, Yun Xiao Hong pounced at Su Yang.

"DIE, YOU ARROGANT BASTARD!" he roared as he swung his sword.

Just as Yun Xiao Hong closed the distance, Su Yang's sword moved with swift, precise grace, effortlessly deflecting the incoming strike.

In the next instant, Su Yang countered, unleashing a sword technique that was both elegant and fierce.

Disciple Fei's eyes widened in shock and disbelief as she recognized the technique.

'That's my family's sword technique! How does he know it?!' she screamed inwardly.

A few more exchanges later.

"What's wrong? Why aren't you using your Sword Will?" Yun Xiao Hong taunted, a mocking grin on his face. "Oh, I know, it's because you can't—"

Before he could finish, a sudden, searing pain tore through his lower body. His vision blurred, the world tilted, and in the next moment, he collapsed to the ground.

Lying on the ground, Yun Xiao Hong's gaze lifted weakly—only to see a pair of legs standing before him. But as his eyes traced upward, there was nothing else. No torso, no face—just two legs, standing alone.

It took a moment for Yun Xiao Hong to comprehend what he was seeing. Then the truth hit him—those were his own legs.

His face drained of all color as the horror sank in, and a bloodcurdling scream tore from his throat, echoing through the arena.

"W-What the hell just happened?!"

The spectators sat in stunned silence, their faces frozen in disbelief. Not a single one could explain what had just happened. One moment, Yun Xiao Hong was perfectly fine; the next, he fell to the ground, his legs severed cleanly, as if by an invisible sword.

"Sorry, what were you saying just now?" Su Yang calmly asked as he stood over Yun Xiao Hong with an overbearing presence.

chapters.title: Chapter 1140: An Unusual Guest
chapters.body:
Chapter 1140: An Unusual Guest

Chapter 1140: An Unusual Guest

"Could it really be?! Can he actually use Sword Will?!" a sect elder exclaimed, rising to his feet, disbelief etched across his face.

Several other elders stood up as well, equally stunned. Though they didn't want to believe it, they had all witnessed the event with their own eyes. To deny that Su Yang possessed Sword Will now would require another explanation—but none of them could think of one.

And yet, the notion that a mere disciple of the Boundless Yin Yang Sect could wield Sword Will—a power even sword sect elites struggled to grasp—was too far-fetched to accept. It defied logic, experience, and everything they believed to be true.

Unfortunately, since nobody was a swordmaster in the sect, they could not confirm Su Yang's abilities by themselves.

Meanwhile, on the stage, Yun Xiao Hong hurriedly swallowed a recovery pill, desperate to stabilize himself despite it being a clear violation of the rules.

Su Yang ignored his actions and sneered, "What a pointless action."

He casually swung his sword, severing Yun Xiao Hong's arms this time.

"Fuck!" Yun Xiao Hao screamed.

Instead of ending the deathmatch there, Su Yang shifted his focus from Yun Xiao Hong to the audience.

"Listen closely—this will be my first and only warning to anyone thinking of avenging him or causing trouble for me or my partner. If you dare come after us, be ready to face the consequences... and more often than not, that means death."

After his declaration, Su Yang turned around and began walking away from Yun Xiao Hong. This left the spectators puzzled since Yun Xiao Hong was still alive, albeit barely.

However, just as Su Yang reached the edge of the stage, he used Sword Will again to decapitate Yun Xiao Hong from a distance, dumbfounding everyone.

Without sparing a glance behind him or waiting for the judge to announce his victory, Su Yang walked off the stage, his figure fading into the distance. Naturally, he didn't leave empty-handed. With a simple flick of his finger, Yun Xiao Hong's Empyrean-grade sword slipped free from the grip of his severed arm and flew into Su Yang's hand.

Even long after Su Yang had left the arena, not a single spectator moved. They remained seated, their faces frozen in disbelief, each of them struggling to process the spectacle they had just witnessed.

No one could fathom how a dual cultivator as young as Su Yang had managed to grasp Sword Will. Even more baffling was why someone of his caliber would join the Boundless Yin Yang Sect when he could easily claim a place among the greatest sword sects in the Divine Heavens.

After the deathmatch, Su Yang returned to his living quarters.

"Welcome back." Lin Xinyi greeted him with a calm smile on her face, not even mentioning the deathmatch.

"I'm back. Let's cultivate, shall we?"

Lin Xinyi nodded, and they entered his room to cultivate.

Meanwhile, the entire sect remained in a state of shock long after the deathmatch had ended. For the rest of the month, it became the sole topic of conversation among the disciples.

"I can't believe it. We actually have a swordmaster in our sect."

"Hah! What swordmaster! I bet it was some cheap trick!"

However, some of the disciples remained skeptical. After all, it was simply too hard to believe.

"If it was just a trick, why haven't any of the sect elders said anything?"

"T-That's…"

While most disciples were caught up in gossip about Su Yang's Sword Will, one disciple's thoughts were elsewhere.

'Just what is that Xiao Yang up to?' Disciple Fei bit her nails anxiously, her brows furrowed. 'He definitely used my family's sword techniques to provoke me... but why?' She wracked her mind, trying to make sense of his intentions.

She recalled her first encounter with Su Yang and how he had claimed to have no ties to the Ouyang Family. But if he could wield their sword techniques with such skill, that clearly couldn't be true.

Eventually, Disciple Fei decided to stop wasting time and energy on something she would never guess and went to confront Su Yang instead. She visited his living quarters a few days after his match.

"How can I help you?" Mei Ying greeted her at the door.

"I need to speak with Disciple Xiao Yang."

Mei Ying quickly replied, "I'm sorry, but the manager is currently cultivating with his partner."

Disciple Fei's eyebrows twitched at this, but she kept a calm expression and asked, "When will he be done?"

"He's been at it since he came back a few days ago, so it shouldn't be too long… Unfortunately, I cannot give you an exact time."

"In that case, I'll wait for him."

"Okay. Would you like to wait inside?"

Disciple Fei hesitated for a moment before nodding her head and entering the building.

"Can I serve you some tea in the meantime?" Mei Ying asked once Disciple Fei sat down.

"No, it's fine. Instead, can you tell me what kind of person Disciple Xiao is?"

"If you're fine with a biased answer…"

"I don't care."

Mei Ying nodded and began revealing her own biased feelings for Su Yang.

Disciple Fei listened without interrupting until the very end.

"I see. Do you know anything about his swordsmanship background?"

"I do not."

"Is that so…"

Sometime later, Su Yang emerged from his room.

His gaze quickly landed on Disciple Fei.

"Oh? We have quite an unusual guest today. How can I help you, Disciple Fei?" Su Yang asked, his tone casual, as if he'd only just noticed her.

In truth, he had sensed her presence well before she ever reached his doorstep. He even expected her to show up eventually and had notified Mei Ying about it before he started his cultivation. Otherwise, she would've been turned away at the door like the other visitors who have shown up before her.

"I think you know why I am here," Disciple Fei replied as she looked at him with a narrowed gaze.

chapters.title: Chapter 1141: Disciple Ouyang
chapters.body:
Chapter 1141: Disciple Ouyang

Chapter 1141: Disciple Ouyang

"I think you know why I am here."

"I do?" Su Yang raised his eyebrows in a puzzled manner, looking genuinely puzzled by her claim.

Disciple Fei trembled with fury before slamming her hand against the table, her voice rising in frustration, "That sword technique you used during the deathmatch—!"

Su Yang remained calm and tilted his head, looking even more puzzled.

"That sword technique? What about it?"

"Still acting dumb? That was my family's technique! Why do you know it?!"

Su Yang finally smiled and said, "Your family? I thought your surname was Fei? Meanwhile, that sword technique—"

Disciple Fei finally understood why Su Yang was playing dumb and interrupted him, "Okay! Fine! You were right! My real surname is Ouyang! Are you happy now?!"

Su Yang chuckled lightly and said, "Truthfully, I was just toying with you for a bit of amusement. I never needed you to admit anything—I'd already confirmed your identity long ago."

Disciple Ouyang looked at him with a dumbfounded face.

"W-What are you planning? Why did you show me my family's technique? And more importantly, how did you learn it? Only those from the main bloodline are allowed to learn that sword technique!"

"No real reason. I just wanted to tease you a bit," Su Yang said while shrugging.

"Do you honestly expect me to believe that?!"

"No, nor do I care if you believe me or not."

Disciple Ouyang gritted her teeth before asking, "How did you learn it?"

"I traveled around the Divine Heavens before I became a disciple here, and I just happened to meet someone from your Ouyang Family. Of course, it was that person who taught me the sword technique."

"Outrageous! Nobody in the family would be sane enough to teach the family's sword technique to a stranger! Even the Family Head would be executed if caught!"

"Again, I don't expect you to believe me." Su Yang shook his head before continuing, "Anyway, I've answered enough questions. Why don't you answer some of mine, too? It'd only be fair."

Before Disciple Ouyang could even respond, Su Yang asked, "Why did you come to the Boundless Yin Yang Sect? And did you come here without letting your family know? I said this before, during our first encounter, but your family hates dual cultivators. There's no way they'd let one of their own join one."

Disciple Ouyang sneered, "So what if I came here without their permission or knowledge? I don't intend on staying here for too long, anyway. In fact, I'll be leaving soon."

However, Su Yang didn't appear to be surprised to learn that she'd be leaving the sect soon, almost as if he'd already anticipated it.

"So, why did you come here in the first place?" he asked, his expression genuinely puzzled.

"..."

Disciple Ouyang fell silent, her gaze dropping as if weighed down by the past. For a moment, it seemed she might say nothing at all.

But after carrying the burden for so many years, she finally decided to reveal it to someone, "Because a dual cultivator destroyed my family."

"He didn't just destroy my family—he shattered the lives of others too by bewitching my grandmother right before her wedding. Because of him, my mother and grandmother had to endure years of mockery and scorn from every direction."

"Do you know what it's like to be called the child of a whore? My mother had to listen to such insults ever since she was born." Disciple Ouyang clenched her teeth in anger as she recalled the injustice her mother had faced.

Su Yang remained silent as he listened to Disciple Ouyang's words. Long before he became the man he was today, he had been a carefree playboy, seducing women and engaging in dual cultivation without a second thought, blind to the consequences his actions would leave behind.

Though that chapter of his life was brief, it left behind a trail of devastation across the Divine Heavens—wounds so deep that even now, they likely remain unhealed.

"As for why I came to this sect… honestly, even I'm not sure anymore," Disciple Ouyang said, her voice laced with bitterness. "Maybe I wanted to see for myself what ruined my family—maybe even try to understand it. But so far, I've found nothing worth admiring in dual cultivators. You're all the same—driven by lust, with minds clouded by nothing but desire."

Su Yang could only smile at her rude remarks, as they were not too far from the truth.

"I honestly can't understand what my grandmother ever saw in that dual cultivator, especially when he was already infamous for being a heartbreaker and a shameless playboy."

"Love is sometimes irrational like that," Su Yang suddenly commented.

"Huh? Love? What kind of bullshit is that?" Disciple Ouyang frowned.

"Why else would she throw away the wedding and her future like that if not for love? You said it yourself—that she was bewitched. Although I cannot tell you what she liked that about dual cultivator, I am confident that she loved him."

Disciple Ouyang could only suck her teeth at his comment.

"Love? Don't make me laugh. Do cultivators even understand what love is?"

"Why wouldn't we?" Su Yang replied calmly. "We have hearts too… and we feel just as deeply as anyone else. However, because of the nature of our cultivation, it's much harder for us to feel love in the first place, which, if you ask me, makes it all the more special when we do."

"Hmph. Even more nonsense. Forget it. If you're not going to tell me how you learned the sword technique, I have no reason to stay here."

With that, Disciple Ouyang stood up and left.

Su Yang remained seated and didn't even try to stop her.

Once he could no longer sense her presence, Su Yang looked at where she'd been sitting and sighed inwardly, 'Oh, Lufei, did you pass away without telling your child anything? Ah, whatever. Although I was unable to protect your daughter, I'll try to keep an eye on your granddaughter.'

chapters.title: Chapter 1142: Preparing For The Eternal Yin Yang Caves
chapters.body:
Chapter 1142: Preparing For The Eternal Yin Yang Caves

Chapter 1142: Preparing for the Eternal Yin Yang Caves

After Disciple Ouyang left, Su Yang returned to his own business and continued preparing for the upcoming Eternal Yin Yang Caves.

Lin Xinyi woke up from her slumber a few hours later and turned to look at Su Yang, who was quietly cultivating beside her.

Without even opening his eyes, Su Yang spoke, "Good morning."

"Good morning…" Lin Xinyi mumbled as she sat up on the bed, her lower body still sore from their previous cultivation session.

"This may sound sudden, but how would you like to cultivate with me in the Eternal Yin Yang Caves?" Su Yang said.

"Huh?"

Lin Xinyi's eyes widened, but her face looked doubtful, almost as if she couldn't believe what she'd just heard.

"I-I think I misheard you just now… Can you repeat it?" she asked.

"The Eternal Yin Yang Caves. I'd like you to enter it with me," he said.

'I didn't hear wrong!' she cried inwardly.

"B-But isn't that something only the Sect Elders are allowed to participate in…? I'm just an Outer Court disciple," she said.

"I got permission from the Sect Leader. It's my reward for defeating Mystic Delight Pavilion. Although she didn't mention anything about bringing a partner, it'd be more beneficial for me to have a partner to speed up the process. I'm sure she wouldn't mind, either, but I'll ask her later just in case."

While Su Yang could cultivate in the Eternal Yin Yang Caves alone, it had the name 'Yin Yang' for a reason.

"But why me…? I'm just an Outer Court disciple. My cultivation is also lacking. I don't qualify. Wouldn't it benefit you more to go with a Core Disciple instead?" Lin Xinyi asked.

Su Yang smiled and said, "So what? You're my partner. That's the only qualification you need. And while it may benefit my cultivation if I go with a Core Disciple, the benefits aren't as vast as you think."

"Xiao Yang…" Lin Xinyin was speechless, but she looked at him with adoring eyes.

"Then it's decided. I'll speak with the Sect Leader later. For now, prepare for the caves."

"Okay," she nodded.

A few days later, somewhere in the Inner Court, a handsome man just finished his cultivation session with a female disciple.

"I heard an interesting rumor when I arrived. Is it true that there's a disciple here who can use Sword Will?" asked the handsome man, who was not a disciple but a guest.

It was common for cultivators from outside to visit dual cultivation sects. In fact, disciples spend most of their time outside to make connections just for this purpose.

"Oh, you mean Disciple Xiao? Yeah, he can use Sword Will… probably. We can't really confirm it since nobody else in the sect can use it," said the female disciple who was there to witness the deathmatch.

"Can you describe what you felt and saw?" the man continued.

The female disciple nodded and recalled everything she saw and sensed during the deathmatch.

"I see… how intriguing…"

"You're from the Limitless Sword Sect, right? Is that why you're interested?"

The handsome man smiled and said, "Of course. Our sect is always looking to recruit talented people, especially those talented with the sword. If this Disciple Xiao is truly that talented and can use Sword Will, I'd love to talk to him."

"Honestly, it would be for the best if the Limitless Sword Sect took him in. He's too much for us. His arrogance knows no bounds," sighed the female disciple.

"Arrogance, huh? I think I like him even more now. The most important trait in being a great swordmaster is having confidence, or what some call arrogance."

"If you're serious about recruiting him, you should speak with an elder."

"I'll do that right after this."

Shortly after the handsome man left the disciple's living quarters, he went straight to speak with a sect elder.

"You want to speak with Disciple Xiao? Why do you want to speak with him?"

"I heard about his talents with Sword Will and wanted to confirm it myself."

The sect elder shook his head and said, "I wouldn't get involved with him if I were you. He'd only bring nothing but trouble. As for him being able to use Sword Will… I still cannot believe it. I mean, he's a dual cultivator. How can someone like that know Sword Will? It's simply too outrageous."

"Perhaps it's all a misunderstanding, but I won't know until I speak with him. Where can I find him?"

"You can find him at the Outcast Peak."

"I understand. Thank you."

Meanwhile, numerous sect elders began to gather outside the Eternal Yin Yang Caves, following the Sect Leader's announcement of its early opening.

"Why do you think the Sect Leader decided to open the Eternal Yin Yang Caves early this year?"

"Who knows? Maybe the caves recovered their resources faster this time."

At the Outcast Peak, Su Yang and Lin Xinyi had just left their house and prepared to head to the Eternal Yin Yang Caves.

"W-Wait!"

Just as they prepared to fly away, a handsome man rushed over to stop them.

"Are you Disciple Xiao?"

Su Yang didn't immediately respond and looked at the man's outfit.

"You must be from the Limitless Sword Sect. How can I help you?" Su Yang could recognize their outfit at a glance from miles away due to how much he had dealt with them in the past.

"Oh? To recognize my outfit so quickly, you must be interested in swords, too. I heard that you could use Sword Will and came here to see whether it was true or not."

Su Yang smiled and said, "So what will you do once you confirm that I can use Sword Will? Are you going to try to recruit me? Even though I am already a disciple of the Boundless Yin Yang Sect?"

The handsome man was quite surprised by Su Yang's guess. It was almost as if he could read minds.

"You seem to know a lot about our Limitless Sword Sect. Did you research us in hopes of joining us?" the man had to ask.

chapters.title: Chapter 1143: A Brief Exchange
chapters.body:
Chapter 1143: A Brief Exchange

Chapter 1143: A Brief Exchange

"Join you... the Limitless Sword Sect...?" Su Yang let out an amused chuckle at the man’s words.

The Limitless Sword Sect had attempted to recruit him countless times in the past, even though he was already part of the Celestial Sword Sect. Of course, they were never successful. Worse still, in a fit of petty vengeance for choosing the Celestial Sword Sect over them, they had crippled the sect entirely after he died.

"What’s so funny?" the man frowned, a faint unease creeping into his expression.

Su Yang wiped the smile from his face and spoke in a cold voice. "If someone unqualified to teach you asks you to be their disciple... Wouldn’t you also find it laughable?"

"What?! Not qualified?!" The handsome man exclaimed, not daring to believe his ears.

The Limitless Sword Sect was one of the top sects in the Divine Heavens. If they were not qualified to teach the sword, nobody else would dare to claim they qualify!

The man’s face darkened with displeasure. "If you think the Limitless Sword Sect isn’t qualified to teach you, then tell me—who is?"

Su Yang pretended to think for a moment before responding with a warm smile, "If I were to pick a place, it would be the Celestial Sword Sect."

The handsome man’s face froze upon hearing Su Yang’s unexpected answer.

"HAHAHA!"

He suddenly burst into loud laughter, clutching his stomach while repeatedly slapping his thigh.

"The Celestial Sword Sect?! That pathetic place without even a single Swordmaster? If you weren’t aware, allow this senior to enlighten you! In the past, the Celestial Sword Sect was utterly crushed by our Limitless Sword Sect’s superior sword techniques. Now they’re barely managing to survive!"

"To think you’d want to join that garbage sect filled with useless talents! There’s no way you know Sword Will! I can’t believe I even considered such nonsense! A dual cultivator wielding Sword Will? Don’t make me laugh! Hahaha!"

"Hey." Su Yang suddenly called out, interrupting the handsome man’s laughter. "Judging by your robes, you’re a Core Disciple from the Limitless Sword Sect, right?"

"That’s right." The man confirmed with a prideful head nod.

"If you’re so confident in the Limitless Sword Sect’s sword technique, why don’t we put it to the test right here and now?"

The man raised his eyebrows, looking puzzled by Su Yang’s abrupt challenge.

"Test? Who will test me?" he asked.

With a calm smile on his face, Su Yang raised his arm and pointed at himself.

"You wanted to confirm whether I can use Sword Will, right? This is the perfect opportunity, don’t you think?"

"You want to clash swords with me...?" The man almost couldn’t believe his ears.

Su Yang raised an eyebrow, his voice carrying a hint of provocation. "Hm? Don’t tell me you can’t use Sword Will?"

"Who the hell said I can’t use Sword Will?!" the handsome man exploded with rage the moment Su Yang suggested such a thing.
